      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (!key) throw new Error('Kein Gerät ausgewählt.');
      await fetchJson('/mobile/api/request-location', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          deviceKey: key,
          action: 'sync_saved_items',
          requestId: 'saved-sync-' + Date.now() + '-' + Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 8)
        })
      });
      await waitForSavedItemsSyncRefresh(4);
    }

    async function syncSavedItemsManually() {
      if (!browserSeemsOnline()) {
        window.alert('Keine Internetverbindung. Orte und Routen bleiben lokal gespeichert.');
        return;
      }
      const pendingCount = countLocalSavedItemsForSync();
      if (!pendingCount && !isNativeAppContext()) {
        await requestRemoteSavedItemsSync(getSavedItemsDeviceKey());
        window.alert('Synchronisierung am Gerät angefordert.');
        return;
      }
      if (!pendingCount) {
        window.alert('Keine lokalen Orte oder Routen zum Synchronisieren.');
        return;
      }
      const syncResult = await syncLocalSavedItemsAndRefresh();
      window.alert(formatSavedItemsSyncAlert(syncResult));
    }

    function getNativeLocalRoutePoints() {
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.getLocalRoute === 'function') {
        const route = bridge.getLocalRoute();
        return Array.isArray(route) ? route : [];
      }
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem('capBridge:localRoute') || '[]');
        return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed : [];
      } catch (error) {
        return [];
      }
    }

    function getNativeQueueLength() {
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.getQueueLength === 'function') {
        const count = Number(bridge.getQueueLength());
        return Number.isFinite(count) ? count : 0;
      }
      try {
        const parsed = JSON.parse(window.localStorage.getItem('capBridge:pointQueue') || '[]');
        return Array.isArray(parsed) ? parsed.length : 0;
      } catch (error) {
        return 0;
      }
    }

    function updateNativeLocalPointCounters(point) {
      const nativeKey = String((point && point.deviceKey) || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!nativeKey) return;
      const receivedByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY);
      if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) {
        const routeCount = getNativeLocalRoutePoints().filter(function (routePoint) {
          return routePoint && routePoint.routePoint !== false &&
            typeof routePoint.lat === 'number' && typeof routePoint.lon === 'number';
        }).length;
        updateDevicePointCounters(Number(receivedByKey[nativeKey] || 0), routeCount, nativeKey);
        updateSyncPendingCounter(getNativeQueueLength());
        const routeElement = byId('countRoute');
        if (routeElement) routeElement.title = 'Finale lokale Route-Punkte; Sync offen: ' + getNativeQueueLength();
      }
    }

    function resetNativeLocalTrackingData(deviceKey) {
      const nativeKey = String(deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!nativeKey) return false;
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.resetLocalRoute === 'function') bridge.resetLocalRoute();
      const receivedByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY);
      const lastByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_LAST_KEY_STORAGE_KEY);
      delete receivedByKey[nativeKey];
      delete lastByKey[nativeKey];
      writeLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY, receivedByKey);
      writeLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_LAST_KEY_STORAGE_KEY, lastByKey);
      setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, false, true);
      if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === nativeKey) {
        state.trackingEnabled = false;
        updateTrackingButtonLabel();
        updateTrackingStatusChip();
        updateDevicePointCounters(0, 0, nativeKey);
        updateSyncPendingCounter(0);
      }
      delete state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[nativeKey];
      removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(nativeKey);
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      return true;
    }

    function getLocalTrackingState(deviceKey) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      return key && state.localTrackingStateByDeviceKey
        ? state.localTrackingStateByDeviceKey[key] || null
        : null;
    }

    function setLocalTrackingState(deviceKey, active, syncPending) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (!key) return null;
      const previous = getLocalTrackingState(key) || {};
      const nowMs = Date.now();
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      const bridgeState = bridge && typeof bridge.getTrackingState === 'function'
        ? bridge.getTrackingState()
        : null;
      const next = Object.assign({}, previous, {
        active: !!active,
        syncPending: !!syncPending,
        updatedAt: nowMs
      });
      if (active) {
        next.startedAt = previous.startedAt || nowMs;
        next.stoppedAt = null;
      } else {
        next.stoppedAt = nowMs;
      }
      if (bridgeState) {
        if (bridgeState.trackId) next.trackId = bridgeState.trackId;
        if (bridgeState.sequenceNumber != null) next.sequenceNumber = bridgeState.sequenceNumber;
      }
      state.localTrackingStateByDeviceKey[key] = next;
      persistLocalTrackingStateMap();
      return next;
    }

    function clearLocalTrackingSyncPending(deviceKey, active) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      const localState = getLocalTrackingState(key);
      if (!key || !localState) return;
      localState.active = !!active;
      localState.syncPending = false;
      localState.updatedAt = Date.now();
      state.localTrackingStateByDeviceKey[key] = localState;
      persistLocalTrackingStateMap();
    }

    function effectiveTrackingActiveFromStatus(deviceKey, trackingStatusData) {
      const localState = getLocalTrackingState(deviceKey);
      // Handy: lokale Tracking-Logik ist die alleinige Wahrheit (entkoppelt vom Server).
      if (isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey)) {
        return localState ? !!localState.active : false;
      }
      if (trackingStatusData && typeof trackingStatusData.active !== 'undefined') {
        return !!trackingStatusData.active;
      }
      return localState ? !!localState.active : false;
    }

    function applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(deviceKey) {
      const localState = getLocalTrackingState(deviceKey);
      if (!localState) return false;
      state.trackingEnabled = !!localState.active;
      updateTrackingButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingStatusChip();
      return true;
    }

    function updateDeviceSwitcherUi() {
      const previousDeviceButton = byId('prevDeviceBtn');
      const nextDeviceButton = byId('nextDeviceBtn');
      const toggleDeviceViewButton = byId('toggleDeviceViewBtn');
      const dropDeviceButton = byId('dropDeviceBtn');
      const deviceSwitchMeta = byId('deviceSwitchMeta');
      const totalDevices = state.orderedDeviceKeys.length;
      const selectedIndex = state.selectedDeviceKey
        ? state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(state.selectedDeviceKey)
        : -1;
      if (previousDeviceButton) {
        previousDeviceButton.disabled = totalDevices <= 1;
      }
      if (nextDeviceButton) {
        nextDeviceButton.disabled = totalDevices <= 1;
      }
      if (dropDeviceButton) {
        dropDeviceButton.disabled = totalDevices === 0;
      }
      if (toggleDeviceViewButton) {
        toggleDeviceViewButton.disabled = totalDevices === 0;
        toggleDeviceViewButton.classList.toggle('active', !!state.showAllDevicesOnMap);
        toggleDeviceViewButton.title = state.showAllDevicesOnMap
          ? 'Nur ausgewähltes Gerät auf Karte anzeigen'
          : 'Alle Geräte auf Karte anzeigen';
      }
      if (deviceSwitchMeta) {
        if (totalDevices === 0 || selectedIndex < 0) {
          deviceSwitchMeta.textContent = '0/0';
        } else {
          deviceSwitchMeta.textContent = String(selectedIndex + 1) + '/' + String(totalDevices);
        }
      }
    }

    function getNativePhoneDeviceKey() {
      if (state.cachedNativePhoneDeviceKey) {
        return state.cachedNativePhoneDeviceKey;
      }
      if (!window.CapacitorMobileBridge || typeof window.CapacitorMobileBridge.getDeviceKey !== 'function') {
        return '';
      }
      const key = String(window.CapacitorMobileBridge.getDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (key) {
        state.cachedNativePhoneDeviceKey = key;
      }
      return key;
    }

    function refreshCachedNativePhoneDeviceKey() {
      state.cachedNativePhoneDeviceKey = '';
      const key = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (key) {
        state.cachedNativePhoneDeviceKey = key;
      }
      return key;
    }

    function sanitizeLastKnownLatLngByDevice() {
      Object.keys(state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        const cached = state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey];
        if (!cached || cached.length < 2 ||
          !coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(Number(cached[0]), Number(cached[1])) ||
          !state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]) {
          delete state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey];
        }
      });
    }

    function mergeNativePhoneDisplayEntry(serverEntry, localEntry, nativeKey) {
      if (!localEntry) {
        return serverEntry || null;
      }
      return Object.assign({}, serverEntry || {}, {
        lat: localEntry.lat,
        lon: localEntry.lon,
        rawLat: localEntry.rawLat,
        rawLon: localEntry.rawLon,
        stationary: localEntry.stationary,
        filters: localEntry.filters,
        source: localEntry.source || 'mobile_app',
        speed: localEntry.speed,
        heading: localEntry.heading,
        headingSource: localEntry.headingSource || (serverEntry && serverEntry.headingSource) || null,
        headingMode: localEntry.headingMode || (serverEntry && serverEntry.headingMode) || null,
        driveModeActive: localEntry.driveModeActive != null
          ? localEntry.driveModeActive
          : (serverEntry && serverEntry.driveModeActive),
        accuracy: localEntry.accuracy,
        timestamp: localEntry.timestamp,
        receivedAt: serverEntry && serverEntry.receivedAt,
        user: localEntry.user || (serverEntry && serverEntry.user),
        device: localEntry.device || (serverEntry && serverEntry.device),
        key: nativeKey
      });
    }

    function ensureSelectedDeviceKeyForPanel() {
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      var selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (nativeKey && isNativeAppContext() && !state.userSelectedDeviceKey &&
        (!selectedKey || state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(selectedKey) < 0)) {
        enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeKey);
        return;
      }
      if (!selectedKey && state.orderedDeviceKeys.length > 0) {
        var pickNative = nativeKey && isNativeAppContext() && state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(nativeKey) >= 0;
        state.selectedDeviceKey = pickNative ? nativeKey : state.orderedDeviceKeys[0];
        state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
      }
    }

    function syncNativeDeviceRegistry() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      refreshCachedNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      ensureNativePhoneRegisteredBeforeTracking();
      if (!state.userSelectedDeviceKey) ensureSelectedDeviceKeyForPanel();
    }

    function reconcileDeviceSelectionAfterSnapshot(preferredKey) {
      var key = String(preferredKey || '').trim();
      if (key && state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(key) >= 0) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = key;
      } else if (!state.userSelectedDeviceKey) {
        ensureSelectedDeviceKeyForPanel();
      }
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
    }

    function applyNativePhoneServerLastForMap(deviceKey, lastRecord) {
      if (!deviceKey || !lastRecord || !nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(deviceKey)) return;
      if (resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey)) return;
      var serverLl = parseEntryLatLon(lastRecord);
      if (!serverLl) return;
      state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] = mergeNativePhoneDisplayEntry(
        lastRecord, state.devicesByKey[deviceKey], deviceKey
      );
      cacheNativePhoneDisplayLatLng(deviceKey, state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]);
    }

    function updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(deviceKey) {
      var selectedDeviceKey = String(deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!selectedDeviceKey) {
        setStatusChip('connStatus', 'Keine Geräte', 'gray');
        return;
      }
      var statusPositionEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey] || null;
      var connectionStatus = evaluateConnectionStatus(statusPositionEntry, selectedDeviceKey);
      if (!isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey)) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[connectionStatusKeyForDevice(selectedDeviceKey)] =
          connectionStatus.level === 'green';
      }
      var failureStateKey = selectedDeviceKey || '__default__';
      if (state.connectionFailureByKey[failureStateKey] && connectionStatus.text !== 'Offline') {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[connectionStatusKeyForDevice(selectedDeviceKey)] = false;
        connectionStatus = { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
      }
      setStatusChip('connStatus', connectionStatus.text, connectionStatus.level);
      var connChipElement = byId('connStatus');
      if (connChipElement) {
        connChipElement.removeAttribute('title');
      }
    }

    function cacheNativePhoneDisplayLatLng(nativeKey, entry) {
      if (!nativeKey || !entry) {
        return;
      }
      const displayLl = nativeLiveDisplayLatLng(entry) || parseEntryLatLon(entry);
      if (displayLl) {
        state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[nativeKey] = displayLl;
      }
    }

    function applyDeviceSnapshot(deviceMap) {
      const nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      const previousSelectedKey = state.selectedDeviceKey;
      const previousDevicesByKey = state.devicesByKey || {};
      const normalizedEntries = getNormalizedDeviceEntries(deviceMap);
      state.devicesByKey = {};
      normalizedEntries.forEach(function (wrappedEntry) {
        state.devicesByKey[wrappedEntry.key] = wrappedEntry.entry;
        if (nativeKey && wrappedEntry.key === nativeKey && isNativeAppContext()) {
          return;
        }
        const ll = parseEntryLatLon(wrappedEntry.entry);
        if (ll) {
          state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[wrappedEntry.key] = ll;
        }
      });
      state.orderedDeviceKeys = normalizedEntries.map(function (wrappedEntry) {
        return wrappedEntry.key;
      });
      if (nativeKey) {
        const serverEntry = state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] || null;
        const localEntry = previousDevicesByKey[nativeKey];
        if (isNativeAppContext() && localEntry) {
          state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] = mergeNativePhoneDisplayEntry(serverEntry, localEntry, nativeKey);
          cacheNativePhoneDisplayLatLng(nativeKey, state.devicesByKey[nativeKey]);
        } else if (serverEntry) {
          const cleanedServerEntry = Object.assign({}, serverEntry);
          if (!parseEntryLatLon(cleanedServerEntry)) {
            cleanedServerEntry.lat = null;
            cleanedServerEntry.lon = null;
          }
          state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] = cleanedServerEntry;
        } else if (localEntry) {
          state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] = localEntry;
          cacheNativePhoneDisplayLatLng(nativeKey, localEntry);
        } else if (!state.devicesByKey[nativeKey]) {
          state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] = {
            user: nativeKey.split('/')[0] || 'mobile',
            device: nativeKey.split('/').slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
            key: nativeKey,
            lat: null,
            lon: null
          };
        }
        if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(nativeKey) < 0) {
          state.orderedDeviceKeys.push(nativeKey);
        }
      }
      Object.keys(state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        if (!state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]) {
          delete state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey];
        }
      });
      syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      sanitizeLastKnownLatLngByDevice();
      if (state.userSelectedDeviceKey && previousSelectedKey &&
        state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(previousSelectedKey) >= 0) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = previousSelectedKey;
      } else if (!state.userSelectedDeviceKey) {
        ensureSelectedDeviceKeyForPanel();
      } else if (!getSelectedDeviceKey() && state.orderedDeviceKeys.length > 0) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = state.orderedDeviceKeys[0];
      } else if (!state.orderedDeviceKeys.length) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = null;
      }
      persistCachedDeviceSnapshot(state.devicesByKey);
    }

    function getSelectedDeviceTarget() {
      const selectedDeviceEntry = state.selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
        : null;
      if (selectedDeviceEntry && typeof selectedDeviceEntry.user === 'string' && typeof selectedDeviceEntry.device === 'string') {
        return {
          user: selectedDeviceEntry.user,
          device: selectedDeviceEntry.device
        };
      }
      if (state.selectedDeviceKey && state.selectedDeviceKey.indexOf('/') > 0) {
        const separatorIndex = state.selectedDeviceKey.indexOf('/');
        const fallbackUser = state.selectedDeviceKey.slice(0, separatorIndex).trim();
        const fallbackDevice = state.selectedDeviceKey.slice(separatorIndex + 1).trim();
        if (fallbackUser && fallbackDevice) {
          return {
            user: fallbackUser,
            device: fallbackDevice
          };
        }
      }
      return null;
    }

    function getSelectedDeviceKey() {
      return state.selectedDeviceKey || '';
    }

    function updateSelectedDeviceTextFromState() {
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const selectedEntry = selectedKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedKey] ? state.devicesByKey[selectedKey] : null;
      setTextIfPresent('device', selectedKey ? getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedKey, selectedEntry) : '-');
      fillOwntracksDetailPanel(selectedEntry);
    }

    function isDeviceSwitchAnimating() {
      return !!state.deviceSwitchAnimationActive;
    }

    function armFollowSelectedDeviceAfterSwitch() {
      state.deviceSwitchAnimationActive = false;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = true;
      enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
    }

    function followSelectedDeviceOnMapIfArmed(latLng) {
      if (!state.map || !latLng || state.showAllDevicesOnMap || isDeviceSwitchAnimating()) {
        return;
      }
      if (!state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation) {
        state.map.setView(latLng, 16);
        state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = true;
        return;
      }
      // Wenn das mittige Andocken (locate-follow) die Kamera steuert, zentriert
      // bereits das native Follow-easeTo -> kein zweiter Pan (keine Konflikte).
      if (locateFollowControlsMap()) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.autoFollowEnabled && !state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
        followCurrentPositionOnMap(latLng, false);
      } else {
        rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused();
      }
    }

    function enforceSelectedDeviceKey(deviceKey) {
      if (!deviceKey) {
        return;
      }
      state.selectedDeviceKey = deviceKey;
      if (!state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]) {
        var selectedParts = String(deviceKey).split('/');
        state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] = {
          user: selectedParts[0] || 'mobile',
          device: selectedParts.slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
          key: deviceKey,
          lat: null,
          lon: null
        };
      }
      if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(deviceKey) < 0) {
        state.orderedDeviceKeys.push(deviceKey);
      }
      syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
    }

    function updateNativePhoneLocalState(point) {
      var nativeKey = String((point && point.deviceKey) || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!point || !nativeKey) return null;
      var entry = bridgePointToPositionEntry(point);
      if (!entry) return null;
      var serverReceivedAt = state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] && state.devicesByKey[nativeKey].receivedAt;
      var wasListed = state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(nativeKey) >= 0;
      state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] = Object.assign({}, state.devicesByKey[nativeKey] || {}, entry);
      if (serverReceivedAt) state.devicesByKey[nativeKey].receivedAt = serverReceivedAt;
      else delete state.devicesByKey[nativeKey].receivedAt;
      cacheNativePhoneDisplayLatLng(nativeKey, state.devicesByKey[nativeKey]);
      if (!wasListed) {
        syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      }
      if (!state.selectedDeviceKey) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = nativeKey;
      }
      if (!wasListed || state.selectedDeviceKey === nativeKey) {
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      }
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart();
      }
      return entry;
    }

    function clearAllDeviceMarkers() {
      Object.keys(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        const marker = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (marker && marker._moveAnimationFrame) cancelAnimationFrame(marker._moveAnimationFrame);
        if (marker && state.map) {
          state.map.removeLayer(marker);
        }
        delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
      });
    }

    function allDeviceLatLngsForView() {
      return allMapDeviceKeysOrdered().map(resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice).filter(Boolean);
    }

    function fitAllDevicesOnMapAnimated(durationSec) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      const latLngs = allDeviceLatLngsForView();
      if (latLngs.length === 0) return;
      resetMapPitchFlat();
      if (latLngs.length === 1) {
        state.map.flyTo(latLngs[0], Math.min(10, state.map.getMaxZoom()), { duration: durationSec || 1.4, easeLinearity: 0.12 });
        return;
      }
      state.map.fitBounds(L.latLngBounds(latLngs), {
        padding: [72, 72],
        maxZoom: 18,
        duration: durationSec || 1.7
      });
    }

    function removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap() {
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      if (state.currentMarker && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentMarker);
        state.currentMarker = null;
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
        state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
      }
    }

    function isMapDefaultSeedCoordinates(lat, lon) {
      return Math.abs(lat - MAP_DEFAULT_CENTER_LAT) < MAP_DEFAULT_CENTER_EPS &&
        Math.abs(lon - MAP_DEFAULT_CENTER_LON) < MAP_DEFAULT_CENTER_EPS;
    }

    function coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(lat, lon) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) {
        return false;
      }
      if (lat < -90 || lat > 90 || lon < -180 || lon > 180) {
        return false;
      }
      if (Math.abs(lat) < 1e-6 && Math.abs(lon) < 1e-6) {
        return false;
      }
      if (isMapDefaultSeedCoordinates(lat, lon)) {
        return false;
      }
      return true;
    }

    function parseEntryLatLon(entry) {
      if (!entry || typeof entry !== 'object') {
        return null;
      }
      const lat = Number(entry.lat);
      const lon = Number(entry.lon);
      if (!coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(lat, lon)) {
        return null;
      }
      return [lat, lon];
    }

    function resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey) {
      const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey];
      if (entry && nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(deviceKey)) {
        const fromNative = nativeLiveDisplayLatLng(entry) || parseEntryLatLon(entry);
        if (fromNative) {
          state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey] = fromNative;
          return fromNative;
        }
      }
      const fromEntry = parseEntryLatLon(entry ? fusePositionForMap(entry, {
        allowRouteSnap: deviceKey === getSelectedDeviceKey()
      }) : entry);
      if (fromEntry) {
        state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey] = fromEntry;
        return fromEntry;
      }
      const cached = state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[deviceKey];
      if (cached && Array.isArray(cached) && cached.length >= 2 &&
        coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(Number(cached[0]), Number(cached[1]))) {
        return [Number(cached[0]), Number(cached[1])];
      }
      return null;
    }

    function allMapDeviceKeysOrdered() {
      const seen = {};
      const out = [];
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      function add(key) {
        if (!key || !String(key).trim() || seen[key]) {
          return;
        }
        seen[key] = true;
        out.push(key);
      }
      if (selectedKey) {
        add(selectedKey);
      }
      state.orderedDeviceKeys.forEach(add);
      Object.keys(state.devicesByKey).forEach(add);
      Object.keys(state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        if (state.devicesByKey[deviceKey]) {
          add(deviceKey);
        }
      });
      const rest = out.filter(function (key) { return key !== selectedKey; }).sort(function (a, b) {
        return a.localeCompare(b);
      });
      return selectedKey ? [selectedKey].concat(rest) : rest;
    }

    function syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices() {
      state.orderedDeviceKeys = Object.keys(state.devicesByKey).filter(function (deviceKey) {
        return !!String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      }).sort(function (leftKey, rightKey) {
        return leftKey.localeCompare(rightKey);
      });
      return state.orderedDeviceKeys;
    }

    function animateSelectedDeviceSwitch(previousKey, nextKey) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      if (state.deviceSwitchViewTimerId) clearTimeout(state.deviceSwitchViewTimerId);
      state.deviceSwitchViewTimerId = null;
      if (typeof state.map.stop === 'function') state.map.stop();
      state.deviceSwitchAnimationActive = true;
      const fromLatLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(previousKey);
      const toLatLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(nextKey);
      function finishDeviceSwitchAnimation() {
        armFollowSelectedDeviceAfterSwitch();
        var switchKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        var switchEntry = switchKey && state.devicesByKey[switchKey];
        rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(switchKey, normalizeHeadingDegrees(switchEntry && switchEntry.heading));
        syncMapBearingFromHeading(
          effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(switchKey, null)
        );
      }
      if (!toLatLng) {
        finishDeviceSwitchAnimation();
        return;
      }
      if (fromLatLng && previousKey && previousKey !== nextKey) {
        state.map.fitBounds(L.latLngBounds([fromLatLng, toLatLng]), { padding: [150, 150], maxZoom: 12, duration: 1.1 });
        state.deviceSwitchViewTimerId = setTimeout(function () {
          if (state.selectedDeviceKey !== nextKey) {
            finishDeviceSwitchAnimation();
            return;
          }
          waitForMapMoveEnd(1800).then(finishDeviceSwitchAnimation);
          state.map.flyTo(toLatLng, 16, { duration: 1.35, easeLinearity: 0.12 });
        }, 1120);
      } else {
        waitForMapMoveEnd(1800).then(finishDeviceSwitchAnimation);
        state.map.flyTo(toLatLng, 16, { duration: 1.25, easeLinearity: 0.12 });
      }
    }

    function placeSelectedDeviceMarkerImmediately(deviceKey) {
      if (!state.map || !deviceKey || state.showAllDevicesOnMap) return;
      const latLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey);
      if (!latLng) return;
      const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] || {};
      const heading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(entry.heading);
      rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(deviceKey, heading);
      const icon = createCurrentPositionIcon(deviceKey, effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(deviceKey, null));
      state.currentMarker = L.marker(latLng, {
        icon: icon,
        zIndexOffset: 2000,
        rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
        rotation: 0
      }).addTo(state.map);
      state.currentMarker.bindPopup('Aktuelle Position');
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [latLng[0], latLng[1]];
    }

    const DEVICE_MARKER_ACCENTS = [
      '#c0392b', '#2980b9', '#27ae60', '#8e44ad', '#d35400', '#16a085', '#e67e22', '#34495e'
    ];
    const PER_DEVICE_MAP_CIRCLE_RADIUS = 8;

    function normalizeDeviceColorValue(value) {
      const color = typeof value === 'string' ? value.trim() : '';
      return /^#[0-9a-fA-F]{6}$/.test(color) ? color : '';
    }

    function getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey) {
      const key = deviceKey ? String(deviceKey) : '';
      const entry = key && state.devicesByKey ? state.devicesByKey[key] : null;
      const serverColor = normalizeDeviceColorValue(
        entry && (entry.deviceColor || entry.color || entry.accentColor)
      );
      if (serverColor) return serverColor;
      let hash = 0;
      for (let i = 0; i < key.length; i += 1) {
        hash = ((hash << 5) - hash) + key.charCodeAt(i);
        hash |= 0;
      }
      return DEVICE_MARKER_ACCENTS[(hash >>> 0) % DEVICE_MARKER_ACCENTS.length];
    }

    function syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers() {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const nextKeys = {};
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const showEveryDevice = !!state.showAllDevicesOnMap;

      function removeMarkerIfWrongType(deviceKey, wantDivIconMarker) {
        const existing = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (!existing) {
          return;
        }
        const isDivIcon = typeof existing.setIcon === 'function';
        if (wantDivIconMarker === isDivIcon) {
          return;
        }
        if (existing._moveAnimationFrame) cancelAnimationFrame(existing._moveAnimationFrame);
        state.map.removeLayer(existing);
        delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
      }

      function upsertCircleMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng, circleStyle) {
        nextKeys[deviceKey] = true;
        removeMarkerIfWrongType(deviceKey, false);
        const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey];
        const popupLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKey, entry);
        let existingMarker = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (!existingMarker) {
          existingMarker = L.circleMarker(markerLatLng, withVectorRenderer(circleStyle)).addTo(state.map);
          state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey] = existingMarker;
        } else {
          existingMarker.setStyle(withVectorRenderer(circleStyle));
          animateMapDeviceMarkerTo(
            existingMarker,
            markerLatLng,
            entry && entry.timestamp,
            existingMarker,
            '_moveAnimationFrame'
          );
        }
        existingMarker.bindPopup('Gerät: ' + popupLabel);
      }

      function upsertAllModeFacingMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng) {
        nextKeys[deviceKey] = true;
        removeMarkerIfWrongType(deviceKey, true);
        const entry = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey];
        const popupLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKey, entry);
        const nh = normalizeHeadingDegrees(entry && entry.heading);
        rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(deviceKey, nh);
        const eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(deviceKey, null);
        const icon = createCurrentPositionIcon(deviceKey, eff, deviceKey === selectedKey);
        let m = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        if (!m) {
          m = L.marker(markerLatLng, {
            icon: icon,
            zIndexOffset: 2000,
            rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
            rotation: 0
          }).addTo(state.map);
          state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey] = m;
        } else {
          m.options.rotateWithView = facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption();
          m.options.rotation = 0;
          animateMapDeviceMarkerTo(
            m,
            markerLatLng,
            entry && entry.timestamp,
            m,
            '_moveAnimationFrame',
            deviceKey === selectedKey ? updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng : null,
            nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(deviceKey)
          );
          updateCurrentPositionIcon(m, deviceKey, eff, deviceKey === selectedKey);
        }
        m.bindPopup('Gerät: ' + popupLabel);
      }

      if (showEveryDevice) {
        allMapDeviceKeysOrdered().forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          const markerLatLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey);
          if (!markerLatLng) {
            return;
          }
          upsertAllModeFacingMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng);
        });
      } else {
        if (selectedKey && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey]) {
          if (state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey]._moveAnimationFrame) {
            cancelAnimationFrame(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey]._moveAnimationFrame);
          }
          state.map.removeLayer(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey]);
          delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[selectedKey];
        }
        allMapDeviceKeysOrdered().forEach(function (deviceKey) {
          if (!selectedKey || deviceKey === selectedKey) {
            return;
          }
          const markerLatLng = resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(deviceKey);
          if (!markerLatLng) {
            return;
          }
          upsertCircleMarker(deviceKey, markerLatLng, {
            radius: PER_DEVICE_MAP_CIRCLE_RADIUS,
            color: getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey),
            fillColor: '#ffffff',
            fillOpacity: 0.58,
            weight: 2
          });
        });
      }

      Object.keys(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey).forEach(function (deviceKey) {
        if (!nextKeys[deviceKey]) {
          const marker = state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
          if (marker && marker._moveAnimationFrame) cancelAnimationFrame(marker._moveAnimationFrame);
          if (marker && state.map) {
            state.map.removeLayer(marker);
          }
          delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[deviceKey];
        }
      });
      if (typeof performBearingSyncNow === 'function') {
        performBearingSyncNow();
      }
    }

    function renderAllDeviceMarkers() {
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
    }

    function toggleDeviceViewMode() {
      state.userSelectedDeviceKey = true;
      state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit = false;
      // Mittiges Andocken stoppen (Geraetewechsel / All-Modus).
      cancelLocateFollowDock();
      state.showAllDevicesOnMap = !state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
        state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode = null;
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        fitAllDevicesOnMapAnimated(1.7);
        updateFailsafeOverlaysForAllDevices().catch(function (failsafeError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Aktualisieren der Failsafe-Overlays im ALL-Modus:', failsafeError);
        });
      } else {
        state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode = null;
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        const selectedLatLng = selectedKey ? resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(selectedKey) : null;
        if (selectedLatLng) {
          const selectedEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedKey];
          flyMapToDeviceLocationAnimated(selectedLatLng[0], selectedLatLng[1], selectedEntry && selectedEntry.heading, true);
        }
      }
      triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
      Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes()]).catch(function (reloadError) {
        console.warn('Orte/Routen nach Ansichtsmodus-Wechsel:', reloadError);
      });
    }

    async function fetchHistoryForDeviceKey(deviceKey) {
      if (!deviceKey) {
        return { data: [], count: 0, received: 0 };
      }
      if (isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey) && hasPendingServerReset(deviceKey)) {
        return { data: [], count: 0, received: 0 };
      }
      const slashIndex = deviceKey.indexOf('/');
      if (slashIndex < 0) {
        return await fetchJson('/api/history');
      }
      return await fetchJson(
        '/api/history/' +
        encodeURIComponent(deviceKey.slice(0, slashIndex)) + '/' +
        encodeURIComponent(deviceKey.slice(slashIndex + 1))
      );
    }

    async function fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice() {
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedKey) && hasPendingServerReset(selectedKey)) {
        return { data: [], count: 0, received: 0 };
      }
      const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
      if (selectedTarget && selectedTarget.user && selectedTarget.device) {
        const historyUrl = '/api/history/' +
          encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.user) + '/' +
          encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.device);
        return await fetchJson(historyUrl);
      }
      return await fetchJson('/api/history');
    }

    function positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(positionEntry, selectedKey) {
      if (!positionEntry || !selectedKey) {
        return false;
      }
      const selectedEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedKey];
      if (selectedEntry === positionEntry) {
        return true;
      }
      if (typeof positionEntry.key === 'string' && positionEntry.key === selectedKey) {
        return true;
      }
      if (!selectedEntry) {
        return false;
      }
      const positionUser = typeof positionEntry.user === 'string' ? positionEntry.user.trim() : '';
      const positionDevice = typeof positionEntry.device === 'string' ? positionEntry.device.trim() : '';
      const selectedUser = typeof selectedEntry.user === 'string' ? selectedEntry.user.trim() : '';
      const selectedDevice = typeof selectedEntry.device === 'string' ? selectedEntry.device.trim() : '';
      if (positionUser && positionDevice && selectedUser && selectedDevice &&
        positionUser === selectedUser && positionDevice === selectedDevice) {
        return true;
      }
      return false;
    }

    function getSelectedOrFallbackPosition(lastPositionEntry, overrideSelectedKey) {
      const selectedKey = overrideSelectedKey || state.selectedDeviceKey;
      const selectedDeviceEntry = selectedKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[selectedKey]
        : null;
      if (selectedDeviceEntry &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof selectedDeviceEntry.lon === 'number') {
        return selectedDeviceEntry;
      }
      if (lastPositionEntry &&
        selectedKey &&
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lon === 'number' &&
        positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(lastPositionEntry, selectedKey)) {
        return lastPositionEntry;
      }
      return selectedDeviceEntry || null;
    }

    function switchDevice(stepDirection) {
      syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      if (!Array.isArray(state.orderedDeviceKeys) || state.orderedDeviceKeys.length < 2) {
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        return;
      }
      const currentIndex = state.selectedDeviceKey
        ? state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(state.selectedDeviceKey)
        : -1;
      const safeIndex = currentIndex >= 0 ? currentIndex : 0;
      const previousKey = state.selectedDeviceKey;
      const nextIndex = (safeIndex + stepDirection + state.orderedDeviceKeys.length) % state.orderedDeviceKeys.length;
      state.userSelectedDeviceKey = true;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      state.deviceSwitchAnimationActive = true;
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = false;
      state.selectedDeviceKey = state.orderedDeviceKeys[nextIndex];
      removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
      placeSelectedDeviceMarkerImmediately(state.selectedDeviceKey);
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      updateSelectedDeviceTextFromState();
      updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(state.selectedDeviceKey);
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        animateSelectedDeviceSwitch(previousKey, state.selectedDeviceKey);
      }
      Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes()]).catch(function (reloadError) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Laden der Orte/Routen nach Gerätewechsel:', reloadError);
      });
      syncTrackingStateFromServer().catch(function (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Synchronisieren des Tracking-Status nach Gerätewechsel:', error);
      });
      loadTracking().catch(function (switchLoadError) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Laden nach Gerätewechsel:', switchLoadError);
      });
      triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
    }

    async function removeSelectedDevice() {
      const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
      if (!selectedTarget) {
        return;
      }
      const confirmRemoval = window.confirm('Gerät "' + (state.selectedDeviceKey || (selectedTarget.user + '/' + selectedTarget.device)) + '" entfernen?');
      if (!confirmRemoval) {
        return;
      }
      await fetchJson(
        '/api/devices/' + encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.user) + '/' + encodeURIComponent(selectedTarget.device),
        { method: 'DELETE' }
      );
      const removedDeviceKey = state.selectedDeviceKey;
      if (state.devicesByKey[removedDeviceKey]) {
        delete state.devicesByKey[removedDeviceKey];
      }
      delete state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[removedDeviceKey];
      removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(removedDeviceKey);
      if (removedDeviceKey && state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[removedDeviceKey]) {
        delete state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[removedDeviceKey];
      }
      syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.length > 0) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = state.orderedDeviceKeys[0];
      } else {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = null;
      }
      state.savedPlaces = [];
      state.savedRoutes = [];
      clearSavedPlaceMarkers();
      clearSavedRouteLayers();
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      await Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes(), loadTracking()]);
    }

    function clearAutoFollowResumeTimer() {
      if (!state.autoFollowResumeTimer) {
        return;
      }
      clearTimeout(state.autoFollowResumeTimer);
      state.autoFollowResumeTimer = null;
    }

    function navigationMapDockIsActive() {
      return !!(state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive && state.navigationMapDockActive);
    }

    function navigationMapDockControlsMap() {
      return navigationMapDockIsActive() && !state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
    }

    function clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation() {
      if (state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame);
        state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame = null;
      }
    }

    function clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer() {
      if (state.navigationAdaptiveZoomTimerId !== null) {
        clearTimeout(state.navigationAdaptiveZoomTimerId);
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomTimerId = null;
      }
    }

    function markNavigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress(durationMs, onComplete) {
      clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer();
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = true;
      cancelMapBearingAnimation();
      let zoomFinished = false;
      function finishNavigationAdaptiveZoom() {
        if (zoomFinished) return;
        zoomFinished = true;
        clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer();
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = false;
        if (state.map && typeof state.map.off === 'function') {
          state.map.off('moveend', finishNavigationAdaptiveZoom);
        }
        if (typeof onComplete === 'function') {
          try {
            onComplete();
          } catch (zoomCompleteError) {
            console.warn('Navigation-Zoom konnte nicht final angedockt werden:', zoomCompleteError);
          }
        }
        syncMapBearingFromHeading(effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees));
      }
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomTimerId = window.setTimeout(finishNavigationAdaptiveZoom, Math.max(0, durationMs || 0) + 120);
      return function armNavigationAdaptiveZoomMoveEndListener() {
        if (zoomFinished || !state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress || !state.map || typeof state.map.on !== 'function') {
          return;
        }
        state.map.off('moveend', finishNavigationAdaptiveZoom);
        state.map.on('moveend', finishNavigationAdaptiveZoom);
      };
    }

    function setNavigationMapDockActive(isActive) {
      state.navigationMapDockActive = !!isActive;
      if (!isActive) {
        state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords = null;
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = false;
        clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer();
        clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      }
      const mapContainer = state.map && typeof state.map.getContainer === 'function'
        ? state.map.getContainer()
        : null;
      if (mapContainer) {
        mapContainer.classList.toggle('navigation-map-dock-active', !!isActive);
      }
    }

    function measureNavigationCompactSheetVisibleHeightPx() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const mapContainer = state.map && typeof state.map.getContainer === 'function'
        ? state.map.getContainer()
        : null;
      if (!sheetElement || !mapContainer) {
        return 124;
      }
      const mapRect = mapContainer.getBoundingClientRect();
      const sheetRect = sheetElement.getBoundingClientRect();
      return Math.max(96, Math.round(mapRect.bottom - sheetRect.top));
    }

    function measureNavigationDockAnchorPoint() {
      const mapSize = state.map.getSize();
      if (!mapSize || mapSize.x < 2 || mapSize.y < 2) {
        return L.point(0, 0);
      }
      const sheetVisiblePx = measureNavigationCompactSheetVisibleHeightPx();
      const visibleMapBottomY = Math.max(96, mapSize.y - sheetVisiblePx);
      const anchorY = Math.max(72, visibleMapBottomY - NAV_MAP_DOCK_MARGIN_ABOVE_SHEET_PX);
      return L.point(mapSize.x / 2, anchorY);
    }

    function resolveMapCenterForDockedLatLng(markerLatLng, zoom) {
      const map = state.map;
      const targetLatLng = L.latLng(markerLatLng);
      const targetZoom = typeof zoom === 'number' && Number.isFinite(zoom) ? zoom : map.getZoom();
      const mapSize = map.getSize();
      if (!mapSize || mapSize.x < 2 || mapSize.y < 2) {
        return targetLatLng;
      }
      const offsetFromCenter = measureNavigationDockAnchorPoint().subtract(mapSize.divideBy(2));
      if (typeof map.project === 'function' && typeof map.unproject === 'function') {
        let projectedOffset = offsetFromCenter;
        if (typeof map.getBearing === 'function') {
          const bearingDegrees = map.getBearing();
          if (typeof bearingDegrees === 'number' && Number.isFinite(bearingDegrees) && Math.abs(bearingDegrees) > 0.01) {
            const theta = -bearingDegrees * Math.PI / 180;
            const cosTheta = Math.cos(theta);
            const sinTheta = Math.sin(theta);
            projectedOffset = L.point(
              (offsetFromCenter.x * cosTheta) - (offsetFromCenter.y * sinTheta),
              (offsetFromCenter.x * sinTheta) + (offsetFromCenter.y * cosTheta)
            );
          }
        }
        const markerProjected = map.project(targetLatLng, targetZoom);
        return map.unproject(markerProjected.subtract(projectedOffset), targetZoom);
      }
      if (typeof map.latLngToContainerPoint === 'function' &&
          typeof map.containerPointToLatLng === 'function') {
        const markerContainerPoint = map.latLngToContainerPoint(targetLatLng);
        return map.containerPointToLatLng(markerContainerPoint.subtract(offsetFromCenter));
      }
      return targetLatLng;
    }

    function syncNavigationMarkerPositionInstant(latLng) {
      if (!Array.isArray(latLng) || latLng.length < 2) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.setLatLng === 'function') {
        state.currentMarker.setLatLng([latLng[0], latLng[1]], { animate: false });
      }
      updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(getSelectedDeviceKey(), latLng[0], latLng[1]);
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker && typeof state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng === 'function') {
        state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng([latLng[0], latLng[1]], { animate: false });
      }
    }

    function applyNavigationDockMapView(markerLatLng, targetZoom) {
      if (!state.map || !markerLatLng) {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof state.map.invalidateSize === 'function') {
        state.map.invalidateSize(false);
      }
      const zoom = typeof targetZoom === 'number' && Number.isFinite(targetZoom) ? targetZoom : state.map.getZoom();
      const centerLatLng = resolveMapCenterForDockedLatLng(markerLatLng, zoom);
      state.map.setView(centerLatLng, zoom, { animate: false, pitch: MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG });
    }

    function resolveSmoothMarkerMoveDurationMs(pointTimestamp, fallbackDurationMs, motionState, updateTimeKey) {
      const holder = motionState || state;
      const key = updateTimeKey || 'markerMotionLastUpdateAtMs';
      const nowMs = Date.now();
      const previousUpdateMs = holder && typeof holder[key] === 'number'
        ? holder[key]
        : null;
      if (holder) {
        holder[key] = nowMs;
      }
      const updateIntervalMs = previousUpdateMs !== null ? nowMs - previousUpdateMs : null;
      let candidateDurationMs = updateIntervalMs !== null && Number.isFinite(updateIntervalMs) && updateIntervalMs > 120
        ? updateIntervalMs * 0.92
        : null;
      if (candidateDurationMs === null && typeof pointTimestamp === 'number' && Number.isFinite(pointTimestamp)) {
        candidateDurationMs = Math.max(0, nowMs - pointTimestamp);
      }
      if (candidateDurationMs === null || !Number.isFinite(candidateDurationMs) || candidateDurationMs <= 0) {
        candidateDurationMs = fallbackDurationMs;
      }
      return Math.max(
        MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS,
        Math.min(MARKER_MOVE_MAX_DURATION_MS, candidateDurationMs)
      );
    }

    function resolveNavigationDockFollowDurationMs(pointTimestamp) {
      return resolveSmoothMarkerMoveDurationMs(
        pointTimestamp,
        Math.round(NAV_MAP_DOCK_PAN_DURATION_SEC * 1000)
      );
    }

    function shouldAnimateNavigationDockFollow(lat, lon, forceFollow) {
      const previousCoords = state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords;
      const shouldFollow = forceFollow || !previousCoords ||
        haversineKilometers(previousCoords[0], previousCoords[1], lat, lon) * 1000 >= NAV_MAP_DOCK_MIN_MOVE_METERS;
      if (shouldFollow) {
        state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords = [lat, lon];
      }
      return shouldFollow;
    }

    function applyNavigationDockFollowFrame(interpLat, interpLng, frameZoom) {
      syncNavigationMarkerPositionInstant([interpLat, interpLng]);
      applyNavigationDockMapView(L.latLng(interpLat, interpLng), frameZoom);
      updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(interpLat, interpLng);
    }

    function snapNavigationDockView(lat, lon, zoom) {
      if (!state.map || !Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) {
        return;
      }
      clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      syncNavigationMarkerPositionInstant([lat, lon]);
      const markerLatLng = L.latLng(lat, lon);
      const targetZoom = typeof zoom === 'number' && Number.isFinite(zoom) ? zoom : state.map.getZoom();
      withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(function () {
        if (typeof state.map.invalidateSize === 'function') {
          state.map.invalidateSize(true);
        }
        if (typeof state.map.setZoom === 'function') {
          state.map.setZoom(targetZoom, { animate: false });
        }
        applyNavigationDockMapView(markerLatLng, targetZoom);
      }, 80);
    }

    function animateNavigationMapDockFollow(lat, lon, zoom, forceFollow, pointTimestamp, optionalDurationMs) {
      if (!state.map || !Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) {
        return;
      }
      if (!forceFollow && state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress) {
        syncNavigationMarkerPositionInstant([lat, lon]);
        state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords = [lat, lon];
        updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(lat, lon);
        return;
      }
      if (!forceFollow && !shouldAnimateNavigationDockFollow(lat, lon, false)) {
        return;
      }
      const startZoom = typeof state.map.getZoom === 'function' ? state.map.getZoom() : NAV_DRIVE_ZOOM_DEFAULT;
      const targetZoom = typeof zoom === 'number' && Number.isFinite(zoom) ? zoom : startZoom;
      let startLat = lat;
      let startLng = lon;
      if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.getLatLng === 'function') {
        const currentLatLng = state.currentMarker.getLatLng();
        if (currentLatLng && Number.isFinite(currentLatLng.lat) && Number.isFinite(currentLatLng.lng)) {
          startLat = currentLatLng.lat;
          startLng = currentLatLng.lng;
        }
      }
      const endLat = lat;
      const endLng = lon;
      if (!forceFollow && haversineKilometers(startLat, startLng, endLat, endLng) * 1000 < 0.05) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      const zoomDelta = Math.abs(targetZoom - startZoom);
      const durationMs = typeof optionalDurationMs === 'number' && optionalDurationMs > 0
        ? optionalDurationMs
        : zoomDelta > 0.05
        ? Math.round(NAV_ADAPTIVE_ZOOM_FLY_SEC * 1000)
        : resolveNavigationDockFollowDurationMs(pointTimestamp);
      if (zoomDelta > 0.05 && forceFollow) {
        syncNavigationMarkerPositionInstant([lat, lon]);
        state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords = [lat, lon];
        updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(lat, lon);
        cancelMapBearingAnimation();
        const markerLatLng = L.latLng(lat, lon);
        const startCenterLatLng = resolveMapCenterForDockedLatLng(markerLatLng, startZoom);
        const finalCenterLatLng = resolveMapCenterForDockedLatLng(markerLatLng, targetZoom);
        const armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd = markNavigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress(durationMs, function () {
          if (!navigationMapDockControlsMap() || !state.map || state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
            return;
          }
          let dockLat = lat;
          let dockLon = lon;
          if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.getLatLng === 'function') {
            const latestMarkerLatLng = state.currentMarker.getLatLng();
            if (latestMarkerLatLng &&
              Number.isFinite(latestMarkerLatLng.lat) &&
              Number.isFinite(latestMarkerLatLng.lng)) {
              dockLat = latestMarkerLatLng.lat;
              dockLon = latestMarkerLatLng.lng;
            }
          }
          syncNavigationMarkerPositionInstant([dockLat, dockLon]);
          state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords = [dockLat, dockLon];
          updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(dockLat, dockLon);
          applyNavigationDockMapView(L.latLng(dockLat, dockLon), targetZoom);
        });
        withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(function () {
          if (typeof state.map.stop === 'function') {
            state.map.stop();
          }
          if (startCenterLatLng && typeof state.map.setView === 'function') {
            const currentCenter = typeof state.map.getCenter === 'function' ? state.map.getCenter() : null;
            const centerOffsetMeters = currentCenter && typeof state.map.distance === 'function'
              ? state.map.distance(currentCenter, startCenterLatLng)
              : 0;
            if (!Number.isFinite(centerOffsetMeters) || centerOffsetMeters > 0.35) {
              state.map.setView(startCenterLatLng, startZoom, { animate: false });
            }
          }
          if (typeof state.map.flyTo === 'function') {
            state.map.flyTo(finalCenterLatLng, targetZoom, {
              duration: durationMs / 1000,
              easeLinearity: 0.04,
              noMoveStart: true,
              pitch: MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG
            });
            if (typeof armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd === 'function') {
              armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd();
            }
          } else {
            state.map.setView(finalCenterLatLng, targetZoom, { animate: true, pitch: MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG });
            if (typeof armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd === 'function') {
              armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd();
            }
          }
        }, durationMs + 180);
        return;
      }
      const animationStartMs = performance.now();
      withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(function () {
        function stepDockFollowAnimation(frameTimeMs) {
          if (!navigationMapDockControlsMap() || !state.map) {
            clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
            return;
          }
          const elapsedMs = frameTimeMs - animationStartMs;
          const linearProgress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, elapsedMs / durationMs));
          const easedProgress = linearProgress;
          const interpLat = startLat + ((endLat - startLat) * easedProgress);
          const interpLng = startLng + ((endLng - startLng) * easedProgress);
          const interpZoom = startZoom + ((targetZoom - startZoom) * easedProgress);
          applyNavigationDockFollowFrame(interpLat, interpLng, interpZoom);
          if (linearProgress < 1) {
            state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(stepDockFollowAnimation);
            return;
          }
          state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame = null;
          state.navigationDockLastFollowCoords = [endLat, endLng];
        }
        state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame = requestAnimationFrame(stepDockFollowAnimation);
      }, durationMs + 120);
    }

    function followCurrentPositionOnMap(latLng, forceFollow) {
      if (!state.map || !Array.isArray(latLng) || latLng.length < 2) {
        return;
      }
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [latLng[0], latLng[1]];
      if (!state.autoFollowEnabled && !forceFollow) {
        return;
      }
      if (navigationMapDockControlsMap()) {
        animateNavigationMapDockFollow(latLng[0], latLng[1], state.map.getZoom(), !!forceFollow);
        return;
      }
      const currentCenter = state.map.getCenter();
      if (!currentCenter || typeof state.map.distance !== 'function') {
        state.map.panTo(latLng);
        return;
      }
      const panDistanceMeters = state.map.distance(currentCenter, L.latLng(latLng[0], latLng[1]));
      if (!forceFollow && panDistanceMeters < AUTO_FOLLOW_MIN_PAN_DISTANCE_METERS) {
        return;
      }
      state.map.panTo(latLng, {
        animate: true,
        duration: AUTO_FOLLOW_PAN_DURATION_SECONDS,
        easeLinearity: 0.25
      });
    }

    function resetMapPitchFlat(animate) {
      // Kamera wieder von oben (keine Neigung). Mit animate=true kippt sie
      // sanft zurueck (Mitte bleibt unveraendert), sonst sofort.
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.setPitch !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof state.map.getPitch === 'function' && state.map.getPitch() < 0.5) {
        return;
      }
      if (animate && typeof state.map.getCenter === 'function' && typeof state.map.setView === 'function') {
        state.map.setView(state.map.getCenter(), undefined, { animate: true, duration: 0.6, pitch: 0 });
        return;
      }
      state.map.setPitch(0);
    }

    function scheduleAutoFollowResume() {
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      // Nur fortsetzen, wenn der Nutzer das Folgen aktiviert hat (Ortung/Tracking)
      // und wir nicht im "Alle Geraete"-Modus sind.
      if (!state.autoFollowResumeArmed || state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
        return;
      }
      state.autoFollowResumeTimer = setTimeout(function () {
        state.autoFollowResumeTimer = null;
        if (!state.autoFollowResumeArmed || state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
          return;
        }
        state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
        enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
        var latLng = state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng;
        if (latLng && latLng.length >= 2) {
          if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && !navigationMapDockControlsMap()) {
            // Andocken (inkl. automatische Drehung/Verschiebung) nach der Pause fortsetzen.
            startLocateFollowLoop();
          } else {
            followCurrentPositionOnMap(latLng, true);
            var eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees);
            if (eff !== null) syncMapBearingFromHeading(eff);
          }
        }
      }, getAutoFollowResumeDelayMs());
    }

    function rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused() {
      if (state.autoFollowResumeArmed && !state.showAllDevicesOnMap &&
        !state.autoFollowEnabled && !state.autoFollowResumeTimer) {
        scheduleAutoFollowResume();
      }
    }

    function disableAutoFollowTemporarilyByUserInteraction() {
      if (state.autoFollowEnabled) {
        state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      }
      // Mittiges Andocken sofort stoppen (Nutzer verschiebt die Karte selbst).
      cancelLocateFollowDock();
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
      // Nach kurzer Inaktivitaet wieder folgen, falls Ortung/Tracking aktiv ist.
      scheduleAutoFollowResume();
    }

    function connectionStatusKeyForDevice(deviceKey) {
      return deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '__none__';
    }

    function tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(deviceKey, positionEntry) {
      if (!deviceKey || !positionEntry || typeof positionEntry !== 'object') {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof positionEntry.key === 'string' && positionEntry.key && positionEntry.key !== deviceKey) {
        return;
      }
      const hasPosition =
        typeof positionEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof positionEntry.lon === 'number' &&
        !isNaN(positionEntry.lat) &&
        !isNaN(positionEntry.lon);
      if (!hasPosition) {
        return;
      }
      const nowUnixMillis = Date.now();
      const lastReceiveUnixMillis = Number(positionEntry.receivedAt || positionEntry.timestamp);
      if (!Number.isFinite(lastReceiveUnixMillis) || lastReceiveUnixMillis <= 0) {
        return;
      }
      const ageUnixMillis = nowUnixMillis - lastReceiveUnixMillis;
      if (ageUnixMillis > CONNECTION_CONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS) {
        return;
      }
      const key = String(deviceKey).trim();
      delete state.connectionFailureByKey[key];
      delete state.connectionFailureTitleByKey[key];
      delete state.connectionFailureByKey.__default__;
      delete state.connectionFailureTitleByKey.__default__;
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[connectionStatusKeyForDevice(key)] = true;
    }

    function evaluateConnectionStatus(lastPositionEntry, deviceKey) {
      const hysteresisKey = connectionStatusKeyForDevice(deviceKey);
      if (!state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey = {};
      }
      const localTransportStatus = state.localTransportStatusByDeviceKey
        ? state.localTransportStatusByDeviceKey[hysteresisKey]
        : null;
      if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey) && localTransportStatus) {
        if (localTransportStatus.serverUploadEnabled && localTransportStatus.serverConfigured === false) {
          state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
          return { text: 'Kein Server', level: 'gray' };
        }
        if (localTransportStatus.connected) {
          state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = true;
          return { text: 'Verbunden', level: 'green' };
        }
        if (localTransportStatus.connecting) {
          return { text: 'Verbinden', level: 'yellow' };
        }
        if (localTransportStatus.serverUploadEnabled === false) {
          state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
          return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
        }
      }
      if (!lastPositionEntry || typeof lastPositionEntry !== 'object') {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
        return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
      }
      const hasPosition =
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lon === 'number' &&
        !isNaN(lastPositionEntry.lat) &&
        !isNaN(lastPositionEntry.lon);
      if (!hasPosition) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
        return { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' };
      }
      const nowUnixMillis = Date.now();
      const lastReceiveUnixMillis = Number(
        isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey)
          ? lastPositionEntry.receivedAt
          : (lastPositionEntry.receivedAt || lastPositionEntry.timestamp)
      );
      const receiveTimestampIsUsable = Number.isFinite(lastReceiveUnixMillis) && lastReceiveUnixMillis > 0;
      const ageUnixMillis = receiveTimestampIsUsable ? nowUnixMillis - lastReceiveUnixMillis : Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY;
      if (!Number.isFinite(ageUnixMillis)) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
        return { text: 'Offline', level: 'gray' };
      }
      if (ageUnixMillis <= CONNECTION_CONNECTED_THRESHOLD_MS) {
        state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = true;
        return { text: 'Verbunden', level: 'green' };
      }
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
      return ageUnixMillis <= CONNECTION_OFFLINE_THRESHOLD_MS
        ? { text: 'Getrennt', level: 'red' }
        : { text: 'Offline', level: 'gray' };
    }

    function resetConnectionStatusUi() {
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey = {};
      state.connectionFailureByKey = {};
      state.connectionFailureTitleByKey = {};
      state.localTransportStatusByDeviceKey = {};
      setStatusChip('connStatus', 'Getrennt', 'red');
      const chipElement = byId('connStatus');
      if (chipElement) {
        chipElement.removeAttribute('title');
      }
    }

    function getHumanDeviceLabel(deviceKey, deviceTarget) {
      const normalizedKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim() ? String(deviceKey).trim() : '';
      const deviceEntry = normalizedKey && state.devicesByKey[normalizedKey]
        ? state.devicesByKey[normalizedKey]
        : null;
      if (normalizedKey.indexOf('/') > 0) {
        return normalizedKey;
      }
      if (deviceEntry && deviceEntry.user && deviceEntry.device) {
        return String(deviceEntry.user) + '/' + String(deviceEntry.device);
      }
      if (normalizedKey) {
        return normalizedKey;
      }
      if (deviceTarget && deviceTarget.user && deviceTarget.device) {
        return String(deviceTarget.user) + '/' + String(deviceTarget.device);
      }
      return 'Unbekannt';
    }

    function applyDeviceConnectionFailure(deviceKey, optionalTitle) {
      const failureKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim()
        ? String(deviceKey).trim()
        : '__default__';
      state.connectionFailureByKey[failureKey] = true;
      const hysteresisKey = failureKey === '__default__'
        ? connectionStatusKeyForDevice(getSelectedDeviceKey())
        : connectionStatusKeyForDevice(failureKey);
      state.connectionHysteresisConnectedByKey[hysteresisKey] = false;
      state.connectionFailureTitleByKey[failureKey] = typeof optionalTitle === 'string' ? optionalTitle : '';
      const selectedNow = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const shouldRefreshStatusChip = !selectedNow || selectedNow === failureKey || failureKey === '__default__';
      if (shouldRefreshStatusChip) {
        setStatusChip('connStatus', 'Getrennt', 'red');
        const chipElement = byId('connStatus');
        if (chipElement) {
          const titleText = state.connectionFailureTitleByKey[failureKey];
          if (titleText) {
            chipElement.setAttribute('title', titleText);
          } else {
            chipElement.removeAttribute('title');
          }
        }
      }
    }

    function clearDeviceConnectionFailure(deviceKey) {
      const failureKey = deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim()
        ? String(deviceKey).trim()
        : '__default__';
      delete state.connectionFailureByKey[failureKey];
      delete state.connectionFailureTitleByKey[failureKey];
      const selectedNow = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (selectedNow === failureKey || failureKey === '__default__') {
        const chipElement = byId('connStatus');
        if (chipElement) {
          chipElement.removeAttribute('title');
        }
      }
    }

    function fillOwntracksDetailPanel(lastPositionEntry) {
      const detailFieldIds = [
        'otUser',
        'otDevice',
        'otKey',
        'otLat',
        'otLon',
        'otAccuracy',
        'otSpeed',
        'otHeading',
        'otBattery',
        'otTimestamp',
        'otSource',
        'otRoutePoint',
        'otSegment',
        'otBreak'
      ];
      if (!lastPositionEntry) {
        detailFieldIds.forEach(function (fieldId) {
          const fieldElement = byId(fieldId);
          if (fieldElement) {
            fieldElement.textContent = '-';
          }
        });
        return;
      }

      const hasLatLon =
        typeof lastPositionEntry.lat === 'number' && typeof lastPositionEntry.lon === 'number';

      byId('otUser').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.user);
      byId('otDevice').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.device);
      byId('otKey').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.key);
      var displayLat = lastPositionEntry.lat;
      var displayLon = lastPositionEntry.lon;
      var displayHeading = lastPositionEntry.heading;
      if (hasLatLon) {
        var mapDisplayEntry = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(lastPositionEntry);
        displayLat = mapDisplayEntry.lat;
        displayLon = mapDisplayEntry.lon;
      }
      if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(lastPositionEntry.key)) {
        var effHeading = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(lastPositionEntry.key, state.latestHeadingDegrees);
        if (effHeading != null) displayHeading = effHeading;
      }
      byId('otLat').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(displayLat) : '-';
      byId('otLon').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(displayLon) : '-';
      byId('otAccuracy').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.accuracy, 'm') : '-';
      byId('otSpeed').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.speed, 'km/h') : '-';
      byId('otHeading').textContent = hasLatLon ? formatValue(displayHeading, '°') : '-';
      byId('otBattery').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.battery, '%');
      byId('otTimestamp').textContent = formatTime(lastPositionEntry.timestamp);
      byId('otSource').textContent = formatValue(lastPositionEntry.source);
      byId('otRoutePoint').textContent = lastPositionEntry.routePoint === true || lastPositionEntry.final === true ? 'ja' : 'nein';
      byId('otSegment').textContent = lastPositionEntry.segmentId != null ? formatValue(lastPositionEntry.segmentId) : '-';
      byId('otBreak').textContent = lastPositionEntry.breakBefore === true ? 'ja' : 'nein';
    }

    function isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey) {
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      var key = String(deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      return !!(nativeKey && key === nativeKey);
    }

    function shouldRunClientFailsafeUiForDevice(deviceKey) {
      if (isNativeAppContext()) {
        return false;
      }
      return !!(deviceKey && String(deviceKey).trim());
    }

    function applyColdStartAllDevicesMapView() {
      state.showAllDevicesOnMap = true;
      state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
      state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = false;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit = true;
      removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
      clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
    }

    function ensureNativePhoneRegisteredBeforeTracking() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) {
        return;
      }
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey) {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof window.__capacitorSelectDevice === 'function') {
        window.__capacitorSelectDevice(nativeKey, { registerOnly: true });
      } else {
        enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeKey);
      }
    }

    function tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart() {
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap || !state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit) {
        return false;
      }
      sanitizeLastKnownLatLngByDevice();
      const latLngs = allDeviceLatLngsForView();
      if (!latLngs.length) {
        return false;
      }
      state.pendingColdStartAllModeFit = false;
      fitAllDevicesOnMapAnimated(1.4);
      return true;
    }

    function nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(deviceKey) {
      return isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey);
    }

    function setNativeFilteredHeadingDegrees(deviceKey, headingDeg) {
      var dk = String(deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      var nh = normalizeHeadingDegrees(headingDeg);
      if (!dk || nh === null) return null;
      state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[dk] = nh;
      persistLastHeadingsToStorage();
      var selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!selectedKey || selectedKey === dk) {
        state.latestHeadingDegrees = nh;
        syncMapBearingFromHeading(nh);
      }
      return nh;
    }

    function applyNativeFilteredHeadingFromBridge(detail) {
      if (!isNativeAppContext() || !detail) return;
      var effective = detail.effective && typeof detail.effective === 'object' ? detail.effective : null;
      var effectiveHeading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(
        effective && effective.value != null ? effective.value : null
      );
      var compassHeading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(
        detail.filtered != null ? detail.filtered : detail.stable
      );
      var effectiveMode = effective && effective.mode
        ? String(effective.mode)
        : null;
      var prefersCompassForLiveMode = effectiveMode === 'walk' || effectiveMode === 'stationary';
      var effectiveSource = effective && effective.source
        ? String(effective.source)
        : (effectiveHeading !== null ? 'hold' : 'compass');
      var usesCompassForMap = prefersCompassForLiveMode && compassHeading !== null;
      var headingForMap = usesCompassForMap
        ? compassHeading
        : (effectiveHeading !== null ? effectiveHeading : compassHeading);
      var headingForMapSource = usesCompassForMap
        ? 'compass'
        : (effectiveHeading !== null ? effectiveSource : 'compass');
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey) return;
      if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && headingForMapSource === 'compass' && !prefersCompassForLiveMode) {
        var rememberedHeading = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(nativeKey, null);
        if (rememberedHeading !== null) {
          headingForMap = rememberedHeading;
          headingForMapSource = 'hold';
        }
      }
      if (headingForMap === null) return;
      var selectedKeyForHeading = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      var otEl = byId('otHeading');
      if (otEl && (!selectedKeyForHeading || selectedKeyForHeading === nativeKey)) {
        otEl.textContent = formatValue(headingForMap, '°') +
          (headingForMapSource ? ' (' + headingForMapSource + ')' : '');
      }
      setNativeFilteredHeadingDegrees(nativeKey, headingForMap);
      if (selectedKeyForHeading && selectedKeyForHeading !== nativeKey) return;
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && state.currentMarker) {
        updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.currentMarker, nativeKey, headingForMap);
      }
    }

    function bridgePointToPositionEntry(point) {
      var nativeKey = String((point && point.deviceKey) || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!point || !nativeKey) return null;
      var parts = nativeKey.split('/');
      return {
        user: parts[0] || 'mobile',
        device: parts.slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
        key: nativeKey,
        lat: point.lat,
        lon: point.lon,
        rawLat: point.rawLat,
        rawLon: point.rawLon,
        stationary: !!point.stationary,
        filters: point.filters || null,
        source: point.source || 'mobile_app',
        trackId: point.trackId || null,
        sequenceNumber: point.sequenceNumber != null ? point.sequenceNumber : null,
        routePoint: point.routePoint === true,
        final: point.final === true,
        liveSample: point.liveSample !== false,
        segmentId: point.segmentId != null ? point.segmentId : null,
        breakBefore: !!point.breakBefore,
        accuracy: point.accuracy,
        speed: point.speed,
        heading: point.heading,
        headingSource: point.headingSource || null,
        headingMode: point.headingMode || null,
        driveModeActive: point.driveModeActive === true,
        battery: point.battery,
        timestamp: point.timestamp || Date.now(),
        receivedAt: point.receivedAt || point.timestamp || Date.now()
      };
    }

    function getLastNativeBridgePositionEntry() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return null;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint !== 'function') return null;
      var point = bridge.getLastLocalPoint();
      return bridgePointToPositionEntry(point);
    }

    function bootstrapNativeLocalDevice() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      var nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (nativeKey) {
        if (state.userSelectedDeviceKey && typeof window.__capacitorSelectDevice === 'function') {
          window.__capacitorSelectDevice(nativeKey, { registerOnly: true });
        } else {
          enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeKey);
          state.selectedDeviceKey = nativeKey;
        }
      }
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (nativeKey && bridge && typeof bridge.getTrackingState === 'function') {
        var bridgeTrackingState = bridge.getTrackingState();
        if (bridgeTrackingState && bridgeTrackingState.active) {
          setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, true, false);
        } else if (bridgeTrackingState && bridgeTrackingState.stoppedAt) {
          setLocalTrackingState(nativeKey, false, false);
        }
      }
      var point = bridge && typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint === 'function'
        ? bridge.getLastLocalPoint()
        : null;
