      state.pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey[scopeKey] = sanitizedReceivedCount;

      if (receivedGrew) {
        receivedElement.textContent = String(sanitizedReceivedCount);
        receivedElement.classList.remove('count-pulse');
        void receivedElement.offsetWidth;
        receivedElement.classList.add('count-pulse');
        setTimeout(function () {
          receivedElement.classList.remove('count-pulse');
        }, 650);
      } else {
        receivedElement.textContent = String(sanitizedReceivedCount);
      }
    }

    function updateSyncPendingCounter(pendingCount) {
      const syncElement = byId('countSync');
      if (!syncElement) return;
      const pending = Number.isFinite(Number(pendingCount)) ? Number(pendingCount) : 0;
      syncElement.textContent = String(pending);
      syncElement.title = pending + ' Routepunkte bereit zum Synchronisieren';
    }

    const SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_SATURATION_PERCENT = 72;
    const SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_LIGHTNESS_PERCENT = 48;
    const SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX = '#6b7780';

    let savedRouteColorById = {};
    let savedPlaceColorById = {};
    let savedItemsPanelRefreshInFlight = false;

    function distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(paletteIndex) {
      const goldenRatioConjugate = 0.618033988749895;
      const hueDegrees = Math.round(((paletteIndex * goldenRatioConjugate) % 1) * 360);
      return 'hsl(' + hueDegrees + ',' + SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_SATURATION_PERCENT + '%,' + SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_LIGHTNESS_PERCENT + '%)';
    }

    function rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors() {
      const nextRouteColors = {};
      const nextPlaceColors = {};
      const orderedItems = [];
      state.savedRoutes.forEach(function (routeEntry) {
        if (routeEntry && routeEntry.id) {
          orderedItems.push({ kind: 'route', id: String(routeEntry.id) });
        }
      });
      state.savedPlaces.forEach(function (placeEntry) {
        if (placeEntry && placeEntry.id) {
          orderedItems.push({ kind: 'place', id: String(placeEntry.id) });
        }
      });
      orderedItems.sort(function (itemA, itemB) {
        if (itemA.id !== itemB.id) {
          return itemA.id < itemB.id ? -1 : itemA.id > itemB.id ? 1 : 0;
        }
        if (itemA.kind !== itemB.kind) {
          return itemA.kind === 'route' ? -1 : 1;
        }
        return 0;
      });
      orderedItems.forEach(function (item, paletteIndex) {
        const nextColor = distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(paletteIndex);
        if (item.kind === 'route') {
          nextRouteColors[item.id] = nextColor;
        } else {
          nextPlaceColors[item.id] = nextColor;
        }
      });
      savedRouteColorById = nextRouteColors;
      savedPlaceColorById = nextPlaceColors;
      refreshVisibleSavedLayerStyles();
    }

    function refreshVisibleSavedLayerStyles() {
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const layerBundle = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        const routeModel = state.savedRoutes.find(function (routeEntry) {
          return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
        });
        const nextRouteColor = routeModel ? getRouteColor(routeModel) : SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
        if (layerBundle && layerBundle.line && typeof layerBundle.line.setStyle === 'function') {
          layerBundle.line.setStyle({ color: nextRouteColor });
        }
        if (layerBundle && layerBundle.startMarker && typeof layerBundle.startMarker.setStyle === 'function') {
          layerBundle.startMarker.setStyle({ color: nextRouteColor, fillColor: nextRouteColor });
        }
        if (layerBundle && layerBundle.endMarker && typeof layerBundle.endMarker.setStyle === 'function') {
          layerBundle.endMarker.setStyle({ color: nextRouteColor, fillColor: '#ffffff' });
        }
      });
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers).forEach(function (placeId) {
        const placeMarker = state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
        const placeModel = state.savedPlaces.find(function (placeEntry) {
          return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === placeId;
        });
        if (!placeMarker || !placeModel || typeof placeMarker.setStyle !== 'function') {
          return;
        }
        const nextPlaceColor = getPlaceColor(placeModel);
        placeMarker.setStyle({
          color: nextPlaceColor,
          fillColor: nextPlaceColor
        });
      });
    }

    async function loadSavedPlaces() {
      if (state.map) {
        clearSavedPlaceMarkers();
      }
      const localPlaces = collectLocalSavedItemsForLoad(LOCAL_SAVED_PLACES_STORAGE_KEY);
      if (isNativeAppContext() && localPlaces.length) {
        state.savedPlaces = mergeServerAndLocalItems(state.savedPlaces, localPlaces);
        renderPlacesList();
        renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
      }
      if (isNativeAppContext() && !browserSeemsOnline()) {
        state.savedPlaces = localPlaces;
        renderPlacesList();
        renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
        return;
      }
      try {
        state.savedPlaces = mergeServerAndLocalItems(await fetchSavedItemsFromServer('/api/places'), localPlaces);
      } catch (error) {
        state.savedPlaces = localPlaces;
      }
      renderPlacesList();
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
    }

    // Sichtbare Routen ueber einen Refresh hinweg erhalten: nur Layer entfernen,
    // deren Route nicht mehr existiert, und gewuenschte (zuvor sichtbare) Routen
    // ohne erneutes Karten-Fit wiederherstellen. Verhindert "markiert dann entkoppelt".
    function reconcileVisibleSavedRouteLayers(desiredVisibleRouteIds) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      const routeStillExists = function (routeId) {
        return state.savedRoutes.some(function (routeEntry) {
          return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
        });
      };
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const keepVisible = desiredVisibleRouteIds.indexOf(routeId) >= 0 && routeStillExists(routeId);
        if (keepVisible) return;
        const layerBundle = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        if (layerBundle) {
          state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.line);
          if (layerBundle.startMarker) state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.startMarker);
          if (layerBundle.endMarker) state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.endMarker);
        }
        delete state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      });
      desiredVisibleRouteIds.forEach(function (routeId) {
        if (!state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId] && routeStillExists(routeId)) {
          setSavedRouteVisibility(routeId, true, { skipFit: true });
        }
      });
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
    }

    async function loadSavedRoutes() {
      const desiredVisibleRouteIds = state.map ? Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers) : [];
      const localRoutes = collectLocalSavedItemsForLoad(LOCAL_SAVED_ROUTES_STORAGE_KEY);
      if (isNativeAppContext() && localRoutes.length) {
        state.savedRoutes = mergeServerAndLocalItems(state.savedRoutes, localRoutes);
        renderRoutesList();
        renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
      }
      if (isNativeAppContext() && !browserSeemsOnline()) {
        state.savedRoutes = localRoutes;
        renderRoutesList();
        renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
        reconcileVisibleSavedRouteLayers(desiredVisibleRouteIds);
        return;
      }
      try {
        state.savedRoutes = mergeServerAndLocalItems(await fetchSavedItemsFromServer('/api/routes'), localRoutes);
      } catch (error) {
        state.savedRoutes = localRoutes;
      }
      renderRoutesList();
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
      reconcileVisibleSavedRouteLayers(desiredVisibleRouteIds);
    }

    function getRouteColor(savedRoute) {
      if (!savedRoute || !savedRoute.id) {
        return distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(0);
      }
      const cachedRouteColor = savedRouteColorById[savedRoute.id];
      if (cachedRouteColor) {
        return cachedRouteColor;
      }
      const routeStillInList = state.savedRoutes.some(function (routeEntry) {
        return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === savedRoute.id;
      });
      if (routeStillInList) {
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
        return savedRouteColorById[savedRoute.id] || SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
      }
      return SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
    }

    function setSavedRouteVisibility(routeId, shouldBeVisible, options) {
      if (!routeId) {
        return;
      }
      const skipFit = !!(options && options.skipFit);
      const savedRoute = state.savedRoutes.find(function (routeEntry) {
        return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
      });
      if (!savedRoute || !Array.isArray(savedRoute.points) || savedRoute.points.length < 2) {
        return;
      }

      const existingLayer = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      if (!shouldBeVisible) {
        if (existingLayer) {
          state.map.removeLayer(existingLayer.line);
          if (existingLayer.startMarker) state.map.removeLayer(existingLayer.startMarker);
          if (existingLayer.endMarker) state.map.removeLayer(existingLayer.endMarker);
          delete state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
          renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        }
        return;
      }
      if (existingLayer) {
        return;
      }

      const routeColor = getRouteColor(savedRoute);
      const routeCoords = savedRoute.points
        .map(function (point) {
          const lat = Number(point && point.lat);
          const lon = Number(point && (point.lon != null ? point.lon : point.lng));
          if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) return null;
          return [lat, lon];
        })
        .filter(function (coord) { return coord !== null; });
      if (routeCoords.length < 2) return;

      const routeLine = L.polyline(routeCoords, withVectorRenderer({
        color: routeColor,
        weight: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT,
        opacity: 0.9
      })).addTo(state.map);
      routeLine.bindPopup('Route: ' + savedRoute.name);
      const startMarker = L.circleMarker(routeCoords[0], withVectorRenderer({
        radius: 6,
        color: routeColor,
        fillColor: routeColor,
        fillOpacity: 0.95,
        weight: 2
      })).addTo(state.map);
      startMarker.bindPopup('Route "' + savedRoute.name + '" – Start');
      const endMarker = L.circleMarker(routeCoords[routeCoords.length - 1], withVectorRenderer({
        radius: 6,
        color: routeColor,
        fillColor: '#fff',
        fillOpacity: 1,
        weight: 3
      })).addTo(state.map);
      endMarker.bindPopup('Route "' + savedRoute.name + '" – Ende');

      state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId] = { line: routeLine, startMarker: startMarker, endMarker: endMarker };
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      // Beim Wiederherstellen nach einem Hintergrund-Refresh nicht erneut auf die
      // Route zoomen (sonst springt die Karte bei jedem Refresh).
      if (!skipFit) fitMapToVisibleSavedRoutesAndPlaces();
    }

    function toggleSavedRouteVisibility(routeId) {
      const isVisible = !!state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      setSavedRouteVisibility(routeId, !isVisible);
      renderRoutesList();
    }

    function clearSavedRouteLayers() {
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers).forEach(function (routeId) {
        const layerBundle = state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
        if (layerBundle) {
          state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.line);
          if (layerBundle.startMarker) state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.startMarker);
          if (layerBundle.endMarker) state.map.removeLayer(layerBundle.endMarker);
        }
        delete state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[routeId];
      });
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
    }

    function renderRoutesList() {
      const routesListElement = byId('routesList');
      if (!routesListElement) {
        return;
      }
      routesListElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (state.savedRoutes.length === 0) {
        const emptyElement = document.createElement('div');
        emptyElement.className = 'row';
        emptyElement.textContent = 'Keine gespeicherten Routen.';
        routesListElement.appendChild(emptyElement);
        return;
      }

      state.savedRoutes.forEach(function (savedRoute) {
        if (!savedRoute || !savedRoute.id) {
          return;
        }
        const rowElement = document.createElement('div');
        rowElement.className = 'place-row';

        const toggleButton = document.createElement('button');
        toggleButton.type = 'button';
        toggleButton.className = 'place-toggle' + (state.visibleSavedRouteLayers[savedRoute.id] ? ' active' : '');
        toggleButton.dataset.routeId = savedRoute.id;
        const pointsCount = Array.isArray(savedRoute.points) ? savedRoute.points.length : 0;
        const localRouteSuffix = savedRoute.localOnly ? ', lokal' : '';
        toggleButton.innerHTML =
          '<span class="route-color-bar" style="background:' + getRouteColor(savedRoute) + ';"></span> ' +
          savedRoute.name + ' (' + pointsCount + ' Pkt, ' + formatTime(savedRoute.timestamp) + localRouteSuffix + ')';
        toggleButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
          toggleSavedRouteVisibility(savedRoute.id);
        });

        const deleteCheckbox = document.createElement('input');
        deleteCheckbox.type = 'checkbox';
        deleteCheckbox.checked = !!state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[savedRoute.id];
        deleteCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function () {
          if (deleteCheckbox.checked) {
            state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[savedRoute.id] = true;
          } else {
            delete state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[savedRoute.id];
          }
        });

        rowElement.appendChild(toggleButton);
        rowElement.appendChild(deleteCheckbox);
        routesListElement.appendChild(rowElement);
      });
    }

    async function saveCurrentRoute() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSavedItemsDeviceKey();
      const localNativeRoute = isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey)
        ? getNativeLocalRoutePoints()
        : [];
      let historyJson = localNativeRoute.length >= 2 ? { data: localNativeRoute } : null;
      if (!historyJson) {
        if (isNativeAppContext() && !browserSeemsOnline()) {
          historyJson = { data: [] };
        } else {
          try {
            historyJson = await fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice();
          } catch (error) {
            historyJson = { data: [] };
          }
        }
      }
      const pointCount = Array.isArray(historyJson.data) ? historyJson.data.length : 0;
      if (pointCount < 2) {
        window.alert('Keine Trackingdaten für eine Route vorhanden (mindestens 2 Punkte nötig).');
        return false;
      }
      const routeName = window.prompt('Bitte Namen für die Route eingeben:');
      if (routeName === null) {
        return false;
      }
      const trimmedRouteName = routeName.trim();
      if (!trimmedRouteName) {
        window.alert('Bitte einen gültigen Namen eingeben.');
        return false;
      }
      const routePointsForSave = (historyJson.data || [])
        .map(function (p) {
          return {
            lat: Number(p.lat),
            lon: Number(p.lon),
            timestamp: p.timestamp != null ? p.timestamp : null,
            source: p.source || null,
            routePoint: p.routePoint === true,
            final: p.final === true,
            segmentId: p.segmentId != null ? p.segmentId : null,
            breakBefore: p.breakBefore === true
          };
        })
        .filter(function (p) {
          return Number.isFinite(p.lat) && Number.isFinite(p.lon);
        });
      if (routePointsForSave.length < 2) {
        window.alert('Keine gültigen Trackingpunkte für eine Route (mindestens 2 Punkte nötig).');
        return false;
      }
      let saveResult = null;
      try {
        // Handy speichert immer zuerst nur lokal; der Upload zum Server erfolgt
        // ausschliesslich ueber den Sync-Button. Im Web direkt zum Server.
        if (isNativeAppContext()) throw new Error('local-only');
        saveResult = await fetchJson('/api/routes', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            name: trimmedRouteName,
            deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey,
            points: routePointsForSave
          })
        });
      } catch (error) {
        saveResult = { data: appendLocalSavedItem(LOCAL_SAVED_ROUTES_STORAGE_KEY, selectedDeviceKey, {
          id: localSavedId('local-route'),
          name: trimmedRouteName,
          deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey,
          points: routePointsForSave,
          pointCount: routePointsForSave.length,
          timestamp: Date.now(),
          createdAt: Date.now(),
          localOnly: true
        }) };
      }
      // Nicht-blockierende Bestaetigung, damit der Dialog/Trackingstart sofort
      // weiterlaeuft, waehrend die Liste im Hintergrund aktualisiert wird.
      showLocateLoadingBadge('Route gespeichert');
      setTimeout(hideLocateLoadingBadge, 1500);
      const savedEntry = saveResult && saveResult.data ? saveResult.data : null;
      if (savedEntry && savedEntry.localOnly) {
        state.savedRoutes = mergeServerAndLocalItems(
          state.savedRoutes,
          readVisibleLocalSavedItems(LOCAL_SAVED_ROUTES_STORAGE_KEY, selectedDeviceKey)
        );
      } else if (savedEntry && savedEntry.id) {
        // Optimistisch sofort anzeigen; vollstaendiger Server-Abgleich folgt im Hintergrund.
        if (!Array.isArray(savedEntry.points) || savedEntry.points.length < 2) {
          savedEntry.points = routePointsForSave;
        }
        state.savedRoutes = mergeServerAndLocalItems(state.savedRoutes, [savedEntry]);
      }
      if (savedEntry && savedEntry.id) {
        setSavedRouteVisibility(savedEntry.id, true);
      }
      renderRoutesList();
      if (!(savedEntry && savedEntry.localOnly)) {
        loadSavedRoutes().catch(function () {});
      }
      return true;
    }

    function getPlaceColor(savedPlace) {
      if (!savedPlace || !savedPlace.id) {
        return distinctHslColorForPaletteIndex(0);
      }
      const cachedPlaceColor = savedPlaceColorById[savedPlace.id];
      if (cachedPlaceColor) {
        return cachedPlaceColor;
      }
      const placeStillInList = state.savedPlaces.some(function (placeEntry) {
        return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === savedPlace.id;
      });
      if (placeStillInList) {
        rebuildSavedRouteAndPlaceColors();
        return savedPlaceColorById[savedPlace.id] || SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
      }
      return SAVED_ITEM_COLOR_UNKNOWN_HEX;
    }

    function clearSavedPlaceMarkers() {
      Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers).forEach(function (placeId) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId]);
        delete state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
      });
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
    }

    function removeStartMarker() {
      if (state.startMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.startMarker);
        state.startMarker = null;
      }
      state.map.eachLayer(function (layer) {
        if (layer && typeof layer.getPopup === 'function') {
          const layerPopup = layer.getPopup();
          if (layerPopup && layerPopup.getContent && layerPopup.getContent() === 'Startpunkt') {
            state.map.removeLayer(layer);
          }
        }
      });
    }

    function setSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId, shouldBeVisible) {
      if (!placeId) {
        return;
      }

      const savedPlace = state.savedPlaces.find(function (placeEntry) {
        return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === placeId;
      });
      if (!savedPlace || typeof savedPlace.lat !== 'number' || typeof savedPlace.lon !== 'number') {
        return;
      }

      const existingMarker = state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
      if (!shouldBeVisible) {
        if (existingMarker) {
          state.map.removeLayer(existingMarker);
          delete state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
          renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
        }
        return;
      }

      if (existingMarker) {
        return;
      }

      const markerColor = getPlaceColor(savedPlace);
      const placeMarker = L.circleMarker([savedPlace.lat, savedPlace.lon], withVectorRenderer({
        radius: 8,
        color: markerColor,
        fillColor: markerColor,
        fillOpacity: 0.9,
        weight: 2
      })).addTo(state.map);
      placeMarker.bindPopup('Ort: ' + savedPlace.name);
      state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId] = placeMarker;
      renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
      fitMapToVisibleSavedRoutesAndPlaces();
    }

    function toggleSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId) {
      const markerIsVisible = !!state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[placeId];
      setSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId, !markerIsVisible);
      renderPlacesList();
    }

    function getSelectedDeletePlaceIds() {
      return Object.keys(state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet).filter(function (placeId) {
        return !!state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId];
      });
    }

    function toggleDeleteSelection(placeId, isSelected) {
      if (!placeId) {
        return;
      }
      if (isSelected) {
        state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId] = true;
      } else {
        delete state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId];
      }
    }

    function renderPlacesList() {
      const placesListElement = byId('placesList');
      if (!placesListElement) {
        return;
      }

      placesListElement.innerHTML = '';
      if (state.savedPlaces.length === 0) {
        const emptyElement = document.createElement('div');
        emptyElement.className = 'row';
        emptyElement.textContent = 'Keine gespeicherten Orte.';
        placesListElement.appendChild(emptyElement);
        return;
      }

      state.savedPlaces.forEach(function (savedPlace) {
        if (!savedPlace || !savedPlace.id) {
          return;
        }

        const placeRowElement = document.createElement('div');
        placeRowElement.className = 'place-row';

        const placeToggleButton = document.createElement('button');
        placeToggleButton.type = 'button';
        placeToggleButton.className = 'place-toggle' + (state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers[savedPlace.id] ? ' active' : '');
        placeToggleButton.dataset.placeId = savedPlace.id;
        placeToggleButton.innerHTML =
          '<span class="place-color-dot" style="background:' + getPlaceColor(savedPlace) + ';"></span>' +
          savedPlace.name + ' (' + formatTime(savedPlace.timestamp) + (savedPlace.localOnly ? ', lokal' : '') + ')';
        placeToggleButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
          toggleSavedPlaceVisibility(savedPlace.id);
        });

        const deleteCheckbox = document.createElement('input');
        deleteCheckbox.type = 'checkbox';
        deleteCheckbox.checked = !!state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[savedPlace.id];
        deleteCheckbox.addEventListener('change', function () {
          toggleDeleteSelection(savedPlace.id, deleteCheckbox.checked);
        });

        placeRowElement.appendChild(placeToggleButton);
        placeRowElement.appendChild(deleteCheckbox);
        placesListElement.appendChild(placeRowElement);
      });
    }

    function renderVisiblePlacesLegend() {
      const placesLegendElement = byId('placesLegend');
      const placesLegendItemsElement = byId('placesLegendItems');
      const routesLegendItemsElement = byId('routesLegendItems');
      const placesSectionElement = byId('placesLegendPlacesSection');
      const routesSectionElement = byId('placesLegendRoutesSection');
      if (!placesLegendElement || !placesLegendItemsElement || !routesLegendItemsElement) {
        return;
      }

      placesLegendItemsElement.innerHTML = '';
      routesLegendItemsElement.innerHTML = '';

      const visiblePlaceIds = Object.keys(state.visibleSavedPlaceMarkers);
      visiblePlaceIds.forEach(function (placeId) {
        const savedPlace = state.savedPlaces.find(function (placeEntry) {
          return placeEntry && placeEntry.id === placeId;
        });
        if (!savedPlace) {
          return;
        }
        const legendItemElement = document.createElement('div');
        legendItemElement.className = 'legend-item';
        legendItemElement.setAttribute('data-kind', 'place');
        const legendColorElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendColorElement.className = 'legend-color-dot';
        legendColorElement.style.background = getPlaceColor(savedPlace);
        const legendNameElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendNameElement.textContent = savedPlace.name;
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendColorElement);
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendNameElement);
        placesLegendItemsElement.appendChild(legendItemElement);
      });

      const visibleRouteIds = Object.keys(state.visibleSavedRouteLayers);
      visibleRouteIds.forEach(function (routeId) {
        const savedRoute = state.savedRoutes.find(function (routeEntry) {
          return routeEntry && routeEntry.id === routeId;
        });
        if (!savedRoute) {
          return;
        }
        const legendItemElement = document.createElement('div');
        legendItemElement.className = 'legend-item';
        legendItemElement.setAttribute('data-kind', 'route');
        const legendColorElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendColorElement.className = 'route-color-bar';
        legendColorElement.style.background = getRouteColor(savedRoute);
        legendColorElement.style.marginRight = '8px';
        const legendNameElement = document.createElement('span');
        legendNameElement.textContent = savedRoute.name;
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendColorElement);
        legendItemElement.appendChild(legendNameElement);
        routesLegendItemsElement.appendChild(legendItemElement);
      });

      if (placesSectionElement) {
        placesSectionElement.style.display = placesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0 ? '' : 'none';
      }
      if (routesSectionElement) {
        routesSectionElement.style.display = routesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0 ? '' : 'none';
      }

      if (placesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0 || routesLegendItemsElement.children.length > 0) {
        placesLegendElement.classList.add('open');
      } else {
        placesLegendElement.classList.remove('open');
      }
    }

    function refreshSavedItemsIfPanelOpen() {
      const panel = byId('settingsPanel');
      if (!panel || !panel.classList.contains('open') || savedItemsPanelRefreshInFlight) return;
      savedItemsPanelRefreshInFlight = true;
      Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes()]).catch(function () {}).finally(function () {
        savedItemsPanelRefreshInFlight = false;
      });
    }

    async function saveCurrentPlace() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSavedItemsDeviceKey();
      const placeName = window.prompt('Bitte Namen für den Ort eingeben:');
      if (placeName === null) {
        return;
      }

      const trimmedPlaceName = placeName.trim();
      if (!trimmedPlaceName) {
        window.alert('Bitte einen gültigen Namen eingeben.');
        return;
      }

      let saveResult = null;
      const localPosition = getSavedPlacePosition(selectedDeviceKey);
      const localLat = Number(localPosition && localPosition.lat);
      const localLon = Number(localPosition && localPosition.lon);
      const placePayload = {
        name: trimmedPlaceName,
        deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
      };
      if (Number.isFinite(localLat) && Number.isFinite(localLon)) {
        placePayload.lat = localLat;
        placePayload.lon = localLon;
      }
      try {
        if (isNativeAppContext()) throw new Error('local-only');
        saveResult = await fetchJson('/api/places', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify(placePayload)
        });
      } catch (error) {
        if (!Number.isFinite(localLat) || !Number.isFinite(localLon)) {
          throw error;
        }
        saveResult = { data: appendLocalSavedItem(LOCAL_SAVED_PLACES_STORAGE_KEY, selectedDeviceKey, {
          id: localSavedId('local-place'),
          name: trimmedPlaceName,
          deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey,
          lat: localLat,
          lon: localLon,
          timestamp: Date.now(),
          createdAt: Date.now(),
          localOnly: true
        }) };
      }

      window.alert('Der Ort wurde gespeichert.');
      if (saveResult && saveResult.data && saveResult.data.localOnly) {
        state.savedPlaces = mergeServerAndLocalItems(
          state.savedPlaces,
          readVisibleLocalSavedItems(LOCAL_SAVED_PLACES_STORAGE_KEY, selectedDeviceKey)
        );
        setSavedPlaceVisibility(saveResult.data.id, true);
        renderPlacesList();
        return;
      }
      await loadSavedPlaces();

      if (saveResult && saveResult.data && saveResult.data.id) {
        setSavedPlaceVisibility(saveResult.data.id, true);
        renderPlacesList();
      }
    }

    function getSelectedDeleteRouteIds() {
      return Object.keys(state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet).filter(function (routeId) {
        return !!state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[routeId];
      });
    }

    async function deleteSelectedItems() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const selectedPlaceIds = getSelectedDeletePlaceIds();
      const selectedRouteIds = getSelectedDeleteRouteIds();
      if (selectedPlaceIds.length === 0 && selectedRouteIds.length === 0) {
        window.alert('Bitte mindestens einen Eintrag auswählen.');
        return;
      }
      if (selectedPlaceIds.length > 0) {
        await fetchJson('/api/places', {
          method: 'DELETE',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            ids: selectedPlaceIds,
            deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
          })
        });
      }
      if (selectedRouteIds.length > 0) {
        await fetchJson('/api/routes', {
          method: 'DELETE',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            ids: selectedRouteIds,
            deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
          })
        });
      }
      window.alert('Die ausgewählten Einträge wurden gelöscht.');
      selectedPlaceIds.forEach(function (placeId) {
        delete state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId];
        setSavedPlaceVisibility(placeId, false);
      });
      selectedRouteIds.forEach(function (routeId) {
        delete state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[routeId];
        setSavedRouteVisibility(routeId, false);
      });
      await Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes()]);
      renderPlacesList();
      renderRoutesList();
    }

    async function deleteAllItems() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const confirmDeletion = window.confirm('Alle Orte und Routen endgültig löschen?');
      if (!confirmDeletion) {
        return;
      }
      await fetchJson('/api/places', {
        method: 'DELETE',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          all: true,
          deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
        })
      });
      await fetchJson('/api/routes', {
        method: 'DELETE',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({
          all: true,
          deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey
        })
      });
      window.alert('Alle gespeicherten Orte und Routen wurden gelöscht.');
      clearSavedPlaceMarkers();
      clearSavedRouteLayers();
      Object.keys(state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet).forEach(function (placeId) {
        delete state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet[placeId];
      });
      Object.keys(state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet).forEach(function (routeId) {
        delete state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet[routeId];
      });
      await Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes()]);
      renderPlacesList();
      renderRoutesList();
    }

    async function loadTracking() {
      try {
        syncNativeDeviceRegistry();
        const preferredKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        if (preferredKey && isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(preferredKey) && !browserSeemsOnline()) {
          await applyNativeOfflineTrackingFallback(preferredKey);
          await Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes()]);
          return;
        }
        if (preferredKey && isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(preferredKey)) {
          try {
            await applyNativeOfflineTrackingFallback(preferredKey);
            await flushPendingServerReset(preferredKey);
          } catch (pendingResetError) {
            console.warn('Server-Reset wird spaeter synchronisiert:', pendingResetError);
          }
        }
        const resultList = await Promise.all([
          fetchJson(buildLastPositionApiUrl(preferredKey)),
          fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice(),
          fetchDevicesSnapshot()
        ]);
        const lastJson = resultList[0];
        const historyJson = resultList[1];
        const devicesSnapshot = resultList[2];
        applyDeviceSnapshot(devicesSnapshot);
        reconcileDeviceSelectionAfterSnapshot(preferredKey);

        const last = lastJson.data;
        const history = historyJson.data || [];
        const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        applyNativePhoneServerLastForMap(selectedDeviceKey, last);
        var nativePhoneSelected = nativePhoneUsesLocalDisplayOnly(selectedDeviceKey);
        let activePosition = getSelectedOrFallbackPosition(last, selectedDeviceKey);
        if (nativePhoneSelected && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]) {
          activePosition = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
        }
        if (activePosition) {
          activePosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(activePosition);
        }
        if (selectedDeviceKey) {
          const selectedOnlyEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          if (selectedOnlyEntry) {
            tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(selectedDeviceKey, selectedOnlyEntry);
          } else if (activePosition && positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(activePosition, selectedDeviceKey)) {
            tryClearForcedDisconnectAfterFreshPoint(selectedDeviceKey, activePosition);
          }
        }
        const failureStateKey = selectedDeviceKey || '__default__';
        const statusPositionEntry = selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
          ? state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]
          : activePosition;
        let trackingStatusResponse = null;
        try {
          trackingStatusResponse = await fetchTrackingStatus(selectedDeviceKey);
        } catch (trackingStatusError) {
          trackingStatusResponse = null;
        }
        const trackingStatusData = trackingStatusResponse && trackingStatusResponse.data
          ? trackingStatusResponse.data
          : null;
        state.trackingEnabled = effectiveTrackingActiveFromStatus(selectedDeviceKey, trackingStatusData);
        updateTrackingButtonLabel();
        checkServerLocalTrackingMismatch(selectedDeviceKey, trackingStatusData);
        updateTrackingStatusChip();
        const cleanedCount = state.trackingEnabled
          ? (typeof historyJson.count === 'number' ? historyJson.count : history.length)
          : 0;
        const receivedCount = typeof historyJson.received === 'number' && Number.isFinite(historyJson.received)
          ? historyJson.received
          : 0;
        if (nativePhoneSelected && selectedDeviceKey) {
          const localReceivedByKey = readLocalJsonMap(LOCAL_RECEIVED_COUNT_STORAGE_KEY);
          const localRouteCount = getNativeLocalRoutePoints().filter(function (routePoint) {
            return routePoint && routePoint.routePoint !== false &&
              typeof routePoint.lat === 'number' && typeof routePoint.lon === 'number';
          }).length;
          updateDevicePointCounters(Number(localReceivedByKey[selectedDeviceKey] || 0), localRouteCount, selectedDeviceKey);
          updateSyncPendingCounter(getNativeQueueLength());
        } else {
          updateDevicePointCounters(receivedCount, cleanedCount, getSelectedDeviceKey());
          updateSyncPendingCounter(0);
        }
        updateSelectedDeviceConnectionChip(selectedDeviceKey);

        const validHistory = history.filter(function (point) {
          return typeof point.lat === 'number' && typeof point.lon === 'number';
        });

        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
          removeMainCurrentArrowMarkerFromMap();
        }

        if (activePosition && typeof activePosition.lat === 'number' && typeof activePosition.lon === 'number' &&
          (!selectedDeviceKey || positionEntryMatchesSelectedDevice(activePosition, selectedDeviceKey)) &&
          !(isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey))) {
          const activeDeviceKey = selectedDeviceKey || activePosition.key || '';
          const deviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(activeDeviceKey, activePosition);
          setTextIfPresent('device', deviceLabel);
          setTextIfPresent('lat', activePosition.lat);
          setTextIfPresent('lon', activePosition.lon);

          const currentLatLng = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
          const headingDeviceKey = selectedDeviceKey || activeDeviceKey || '';
          processNavigationRouteLiveUpdate(activePosition);
          updateHeadingVisualization(activePosition, currentLatLng);
          const effLive = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(headingDeviceKey, state.latestHeadingDegrees);

          if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
            if (!state.currentMarker) {
              state.currentMarker = L.marker(currentLatLng, {
                icon: createCurrentPositionIcon(
                  selectedDeviceKey || '',
                  effLive
                ),
                zIndexOffset: 2000,
                rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
                rotation: 0
              }).addTo(state.map);
              state.currentMarker.bindPopup('Aktuelle Position');
            } else {
              animateCurrentMarkerTo(currentLatLng, activePosition.timestamp, false, activePosition);
            }
          }
          updateHeadingVisualization(activePosition, currentLatLng);
          state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
          if (selectedDeviceKey && coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon)) {
            state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey] = [activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon];
            updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(selectedDeviceKey, activePosition.lat, activePosition.lon);
          }

          if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
            followSelectedDeviceOnMapIfArmed(currentLatLng);
          }

          fillOwntracksDetailPanel(activePosition);
        } else if (nativePhoneSelected) {
          const localNativeEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          if (localNativeEntry) {
            fillOwntracksDetailPanel(localNativeEntry);
          }
        } else {
          const fallbackLatLng = selectedDeviceKey && state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey]
            ? state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey]
            : null;
          if (fallbackLatLng && Array.isArray(fallbackLatLng) && fallbackLatLng.length >= 2 &&
            coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(fallbackLatLng[0], fallbackLatLng[1])) {
            if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
              const dkFb = selectedDeviceKey || '';
              const effFb = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(dkFb, null);
              if (!state.currentMarker) {
                state.currentMarker = L.marker(fallbackLatLng, {
                  icon: createCurrentPositionIcon(selectedDeviceKey || '', effFb),
                  zIndexOffset: 2000,
                  rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
                  rotation: 0
                }).addTo(state.map);
                state.currentMarker.bindPopup('Letzte bekannte Position');
              } else {
                animateCurrentMarkerTo(fallbackLatLng, activePosition && activePosition.timestamp, false, activePosition);
                state.currentMarker.setIcon(createCurrentPositionIcon(selectedDeviceKey || '', effFb));
              }
            }
            state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [fallbackLatLng[0], fallbackLatLng[1]];
            if (selectedDeviceKey) {
              setTextIfPresent('device', getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, null));
            } else if (activePosition) {
              setTextIfPresent('device', getHumanDeviceLabel(activePosition.key || '', activePosition));
            } else {
              setTextIfPresent('device', '-');
            }
            setTextIfPresent('lat', fallbackLatLng[0]);
            setTextIfPresent('lon', fallbackLatLng[1]);
          } else {
            const existingMarkerLatLng = !state.showAllDevicesOnMap && state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.getLatLng === 'function'
              ? state.currentMarker.getLatLng()
              : null;
            if (existingMarkerLatLng && Number.isFinite(existingMarkerLatLng.lat) && Number.isFinite(existingMarkerLatLng.lng)) {
              if (selectedDeviceKey) {
                state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey] = [existingMarkerLatLng.lat, existingMarkerLatLng.lng];
              }
              setTextIfPresent('device', getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, null));
              setTextIfPresent('lat', existingMarkerLatLng.lat);
              setTextIfPresent('lon', existingMarkerLatLng.lng);
            } else {
              if (selectedDeviceKey) {
                setTextIfPresent('device', getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, null));
              } else if (activePosition) {
                setTextIfPresent('device', getHumanDeviceLabel(activePosition.key || '', activePosition));
              } else {
                setTextIfPresent('device', '-');
              }
              setTextIfPresent('lat', '-');
              setTextIfPresent('lon', '-');
            }
          }
          fillOwntracksDetailPanel(
            (selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey]) ? state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey] : (activePosition || null)
          );
        }

        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();

        await syncLatestTrackingRouteLayers(selectedDeviceKey, validHistory, trackingStatusData);
        updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();

        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
          removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          await updateFailsafeOverlaysForAllDevices();
        } else if (shouldRunClientFailsafeUiForDevice(selectedDeviceKey)) {
          updateFailsafeStateFromTrackingStatus(trackingStatusData);
          clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        } else {
          removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        }
        const connChipElement = byId('connStatus');
        if (connChipElement) {
          let connectionStatusTitle = '';
          const chipStatusEntry = state.devicesByKey[selectedDeviceKey] || statusPositionEntry;
          const chipConnectionStatus = evaluateConnectionStatus(chipStatusEntry, selectedDeviceKey);
          if (chipConnectionStatus.text === 'Getrennt' &&
            state.connectionFailureByKey[failureStateKey] &&
            state.connectionFailureTitleByKey[failureStateKey]) {
            connectionStatusTitle = state.connectionFailureTitleByKey[failureStateKey];
          } else if (trackingStatusData && trackingStatusData.active && trackingStatusData.failsafe &&
            shouldRunClientFailsafeUiForDevice(selectedDeviceKey)) {
            const failsafeInfo = trackingStatusData.failsafe;
            const statusDeviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, null);
            if (failsafeInfo.linkLostForLongTime) {
              connectionStatusTitle = 'Gerät «' + statusDeviceLabel + '»: Failsafe – seit 1 Minute keine frischen Daten. Letzter bekannter Standort und Rückkehrpunkt bleiben gespeichert; Rückkehrroute wird berechnet.';
            } else if (failsafeInfo.linkStale) {
              connectionStatusTitle = 'Gerät «' + statusDeviceLabel + '»: Getrennt (≥10 s ohne frische Daten). Letzter Standort bleibt gespeichert. Rückkehr-Failsafe erst nach 1 Minute ohne Daten.';
            }
          }
          if (connectionStatusTitle) {
            connChipElement.setAttribute('title', connectionStatusTitle);
          } else {
            connChipElement.removeAttribute('title');
          }
        }
        state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt = Math.max(
          state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt,
          lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(last)
        );
        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) {
          tryFitAllDevicesAfterColdStart();
        }
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Laden der Tracking-Daten:', error);
        const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        if (!(await applyNativeOfflineTrackingFallback(selectedKey))) {
          applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(selectedKey);
        }
      }
    }

    async function handlePlaceSearch() {
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      const routeQuery = routeQueryElement ? routeQueryElement.value : '';
      const destination = state.selectedRouteSuggestion && routeQuery && state.selectedRouteSuggestion.label === routeQuery
        ? state.selectedRouteSuggestion
        : await searchDestinationCoordinates(routeQuery);
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = destination;
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      clearRouteVisualization(true);
      setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
      addToRecentRouteSuggestions(destination);
      displayDestination(destination);
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
    }

    async function handleRouteRequest() {
      const startPosition = await resolveRouteStartPosition();
      if (!startPosition) {
        throw new Error('Bitte einen Startpunkt eingeben, aus der Liste wählen oder «Mein Standort» (◎) aktivieren.');
      }
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      const routeQuery = routeQueryElement ? routeQueryElement.value : '';
      const destination = state.selectedRouteSuggestion && routeQuery && state.selectedRouteSuggestion.label === routeQuery
        ? state.selectedRouteSuggestion
        : await searchDestinationCoordinates(routeQuery);
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = destination;
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      await applyRouteWithKnownStartPosition(startPosition, destination);
      hideRouteSuggestions();
    }

    function isSearchPanelOpen() {
      const searchPanelElement = byId('searchPanel');
      return !!(searchPanelElement && searchPanelElement.classList.contains('open'));
    }

    function getAutoFollowResumeDelayMs() {
      return isSearchPanelOpen()
        ? AUTO_FOLLOW_RESUME_AFTER_IDLE_MS_SEARCH_OPEN
        : AUTO_FOLLOW_RESUME_AFTER_IDLE_MS_CLOSED;
    }

    function hasActiveSearchTarget() {
      return !!(state.activeSearchTarget && state.activeSearchTarget.kind);
    }

    async function applyClickedPlaceToActiveSearchField(clickEvent) {
      if (!clickEvent || !clickEvent.latlng) {
        return;
      }
      const clickLatitude = Number(clickEvent.latlng.lat);
      const clickLongitude = Number(clickEvent.latlng.lng);
      if (!Number.isFinite(clickLatitude) || !Number.isFinite(clickLongitude)) {
        return;
      }
      const clickLabel = await resolveMapClickLabel(clickLatitude, clickLongitude);
      const targetKind = state.activeSearchTarget && state.activeSearchTarget.kind;

      if (targetKind === 'waypoint') {
        const targetRowId = state.activeSearchTarget.rowId || state.activeWaypointRowId;
        let targetRowIndex = findWaypointRowIndexById(targetRowId);
        if (targetRowIndex < 0) {
          if (!Array.isArray(state.waypointEditorRows) || state.waypointEditorRows.length === 0) {
            return;
          }
          targetRowIndex = state.waypointEditorRows.length - 1;
        }
        const rowEntry = state.waypointEditorRows[targetRowIndex];
        rowEntry.suggestion = {
          lat: clickLatitude,
          lon: clickLongitude,
          label: clickLabel
        };
        state.selectedWaypointSuggestion = null;
        state.awaitingWaypointPick = false;
        hideWaypointSuggestions();
        syncSelectedWaypointsFromEditorRows();
        renderWaypointDynamicRows();
        renderWaypointMarkers();
        updateWaypointButtonState();
        fitMapToRoutePoints();
        return;
      }

      if (targetKind === 'start') {
        pauseMapFollowForRoutePlanning();
        const startEntry = {
          lat: clickLatitude,
          lon: clickLongitude,
          label: clickLabel,
          kind: 'place'
        };
        state.selectedRouteStart = startEntry;
        const routeStartQueryElement = byId('routeStartQuery');
        if (routeStartQueryElement) {
          routeStartQueryElement.value = clickLabel;
        }
        addToRecentRouteSuggestions({ lat: clickLatitude, lon: clickLongitude, label: clickLabel });
        hideRouteSuggestions();
        renderRouteStartMarker();
        updateStartInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        if (state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
          clearRouteVisualization(true);
          setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
          await updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints();
        }
        return;
      }

      const destination = {
        lat: clickLatitude,
        lon: clickLongitude,
        label: clickLabel
      };
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = destination;

      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      if (routeQueryElement) {
        routeQueryElement.value = destination.label;
      }
      updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      clearRouteVisualization(true);
      setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
      addToRecentRouteSuggestions(destination);
      displayDestination(destination, { skipMapViewUpdate: true });
      updateWaypointButtonState();
      updateRouteLetterBadgesVisibility();
      await updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints();
    }

    function attachMapClickGestures(mapInstance) {
      const containerElement = mapInstance.getContainer();
      if (!containerElement) {
        return;
      }
      let pressStartedAt = 0;
      let pressStartLayerPoint = null;
      let pressStartScreenPoint = null;
      let pressTimerId = null;
      let pressFiredAsLong = false;
      let pressActivePointerId = null;

      const cancelPendingTimer = function () {
        if (pressTimerId) {
          clearTimeout(pressTimerId);
          pressTimerId = null;
        }
      };

      const cleanupGestureState = function () {
        cancelPendingTimer();
        pressStartedAt = 0;
        pressStartLayerPoint = null;
        pressStartScreenPoint = null;
        pressActivePointerId = null;
      };

      const isPointerOnMapInteractive = function (target) {
        if (!target || target === containerElement) {
          return true;
        }
        let cursor = target;
        while (cursor && cursor !== containerElement) {
          if (cursor.classList && (
            cursor.classList.contains('leaflet-marker-icon') ||
            cursor.classList.contains('leaflet-popup') ||
            cursor.classList.contains('maplibregl-popup') ||
            cursor.classList.contains('leaflet-control')
          )) {
            return false;
          }
          cursor = cursor.parentElement;
        }
        return true;
      };

      containerElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (pointerEvent.pointerType === 'mouse' && pointerEvent.button !== 0) {
          return;
        }
        if (!isPointerOnMapInteractive(pointerEvent.target)) {
          return;
        }
        cleanupGestureState();
        pressFiredAsLong = false;
        pressActivePointerId = pointerEvent.pointerId;
        pressStartedAt = Date.now();
        pressStartScreenPoint = { x: pointerEvent.clientX, y: pointerEvent.clientY };
        const containerPoint = mapInstance.mouseEventToContainerPoint(pointerEvent);
        pressStartLayerPoint = containerPoint;
        pressTimerId = setTimeout(function () {
          pressTimerId = null;
          if (pressActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
            return;
          }
          pressFiredAsLong = true;
          state.placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick = true;
          const latlng = mapInstance.containerPointToLatLng(containerPoint);
          handleMapLongPress({ latlng: latlng }).catch(function (longPressError) {
            console.error('Fehler beim Ortsdetail-Aufruf:', longPressError);
          });
        }, MAP_LONG_PRESS_DURATION_MS);
      }, { passive: true });

      containerElement.addEventListener('pointermove', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (pressActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId || !pressStartScreenPoint) {
          return;
        }
        const movementX = pointerEvent.clientX - pressStartScreenPoint.x;
        const movementY = pointerEvent.clientY - pressStartScreenPoint.y;
        const movementDistance = Math.sqrt(movementX * movementX + movementY * movementY);
        if (movementDistance > MAP_LONG_PRESS_MAX_MOVEMENT_PIXELS) {
          cleanupGestureState();
        }
      }, { passive: true });

      const cancelPress = function (pointerEvent) {
        if (pointerEvent && pressActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
          return;
        }
        cleanupGestureState();
      };
      containerElement.addEventListener('pointerup', cancelPress, { passive: true });
      containerElement.addEventListener('pointercancel', cancelPress, { passive: true });
      containerElement.addEventListener('pointerleave', cancelPress, { passive: true });

      mapInstance.on('click', function (clickEvent) {
        if (state.placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick || pressFiredAsLong) {
          state.placeSheetSuppressNextMapClick = false;
          pressFiredAsLong = false;
          return;
        }
        if (!isSearchPanelOpen() || !hasActiveSearchTarget()) {
          return;
        }
        applyClickedPlaceToActiveSearchField(clickEvent).catch(function (clickError) {
          console.error('Fehler bei Karten-Tap-Übernahme:', clickError);
          window.alert(getErrorMessageOrFallback(clickError, 'Karten-Auswahl konnte nicht übernommen werden.'));
        });
      });
    }

    function clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension() {
      state.navigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension = null;
    }

    function captureNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspensionIfActive() {
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind !== 'navigation' || !state.activeNavigationRouteObject) {
        clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension();
        return;
      }
      state.navigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension = {
        routeObject: state.activeNavigationRouteObject,
        destinationLabel: state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel || 'Ziel',
        compactActive: state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive,
        stepIndex: state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex,
        snapState: state.placeSheetSnapState
      };
    }

    function restoreNavigationGuidancePlaceSheetFromSuspension(suspensionBlock) {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const titleElement = byId('placeSheetTitle');
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      if (!sheetElement || !titleElement || !bodyElement || !suspensionBlock || !suspensionBlock.routeObject) {
        return;
      }
      state.placeSheetContentKind = 'navigation';
      state.activeNavigationRouteObject = suspensionBlock.routeObject;
      state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel = suspensionBlock.destinationLabel || 'Ziel';
      state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive = !!suspensionBlock.compactActive;
      state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = typeof suspensionBlock.stepIndex === 'number'
        ? suspensionBlock.stepIndex
        : 0;
      if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        sheetElement.classList.add('navigation-compact-active');
      } else {
        sheetElement.classList.remove('navigation-compact-active');
      }
      sheetElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      sheetElement.classList.add('navigation-guidance-sheet');
      titleElement.textContent = 'Route · ' + (state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel || 'Ziel');
      bodyElement.innerHTML = '';
      renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(suspensionBlock.routeObject);
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationRemainingIndicator(collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(suspensionBlock.routeObject));
      const snapName = suspensionBlock.snapState;
      const allowedSnap = snapName === 'half' || snapName === 'expanded' ? snapName : 'collapsed';
      setPlaceSheetSnapState(allowedSnap);
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
      syncNavigationPeekCollapsedClass();
      if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        beginNavigationGuidanceCompactPolling(0);
      }
    }

    async function handleMapLongPress(longPressEvent) {
      if (!longPressEvent || !longPressEvent.latlng) {
        return;
      }
      const pressLatitude = Number(longPressEvent.latlng.lat);
      const pressLongitude = Number(longPressEvent.latlng.lng);
      if (!Number.isFinite(pressLatitude) || !Number.isFinite(pressLongitude)) {
        return;
      }
      captureNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspensionIfActive();
      placeLongPressMarker(pressLatitude, pressLongitude);
      const pressLabelPreview = 'Kartenpunkt: ' + pressLatitude.toFixed(5) + ', ' + pressLongitude.toFixed(5);
      openPlaceSheet({
        lat: pressLatitude,
        lon: pressLongitude,
        label: pressLabelPreview,
        loading: true
      });
      try {
        const placeDetails = await fetchPlaceDetails(pressLatitude, pressLongitude);
        const resolvedLabel = composePlaceLabelFromDetails(placeDetails) ||
          (await resolveMapClickLabel(pressLatitude, pressLongitude));
        const placePoint = {
          lat: pressLatitude,
          lon: pressLongitude,
          label: resolvedLabel || pressLabelPreview,
          details: placeDetails
        };
        state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = placePoint;
        renderPlaceSheet(placePoint);
      } catch (detailsError) {
        console.error('Ortsdetails konnten nicht geladen werden:', detailsError);
        const fallbackLabel = await resolveMapClickLabel(pressLatitude, pressLongitude);
        const fallbackPoint = {
          lat: pressLatitude,
          lon: pressLongitude,
          label: fallbackLabel || pressLabelPreview,
          details: null,
          detailsError: detailsError && detailsError.message ? detailsError.message : 'Details nicht verfügbar.'
        };
        state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = fallbackPoint;
        renderPlaceSheet(fallbackPoint);
      }
    }

    function placeLongPressMarker(latitude, longitude) {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.longPressMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.longPressMarker);
        state.longPressMarker = null;
      }
      const longPressIcon = L.divIcon({
        className: 'longpress-marker-icon',
        html: '<div class="longpress-marker-pin" aria-hidden="true"></div>',
        iconSize: [22, 22],
        iconAnchor: [11, 11]
      });
      state.longPressMarker = L.marker([latitude, longitude], { icon: longPressIcon }).addTo(state.map);
    }

    function removeLongPressMarker() {
      if (state.longPressMarker && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.longPressMarker);
      }
      state.longPressMarker = null;
    }

    function refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton() {
      const toggleExpandButton = byId('placeSheetToggleExpandBtn');
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (!toggleExpandButton) {
        return;
      }
      const sheetHidden = sheetElement ? sheetElement.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'true' : true;
      if (sheetHidden) {
        toggleExpandButton.classList.remove('place-sheet-toggle-open');
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', 'false');
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Dialog ausklappen');
        toggleExpandButton.title = 'Ausklappen';
        return;
      }
      const isPeekOnly = state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed';
      toggleExpandButton.classList.toggle('place-sheet-toggle-open', !isPeekOnly);
      toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-expanded', isPeekOnly ? 'false' : 'true');
      if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        if (isPeekOnly) {
          toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Navigation: Schritte nach oben ausklappen');
          toggleExpandButton.title = 'Schritte nach oben anzeigen';
        } else {
          toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Navigation: Statusleiste nach unten');
          toggleExpandButton.title = 'Auf Statusleiste reduzieren';
        }
        return;
      }
      if (isPeekOnly) {
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Dialog ausklappen');
        toggleExpandButton.title = 'Ausklappen';
      } else {
        toggleExpandButton.setAttribute('aria-label', 'Dialog zuklappen');
        toggleExpandButton.title = 'Zuklappen';
      }
    }

    function syncNavigationPeekCollapsedClass() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (!sheetElement) {
        return;
      }
      const isNavigationSheet = state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation';
      const shouldPeekCollapsed = isNavigationSheet &&
        !state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive &&
        state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed';
      sheetElement.classList.toggle('navigation-peek-collapsed', shouldPeekCollapsed);
    }

    function setPlaceSheetSnapState(nextSnapState) {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (!sheetElement) {
        return;
      }
      const allowedStates = ['collapsed', 'half', 'expanded'];
      const targetState = allowedStates.indexOf(nextSnapState) >= 0 ? nextSnapState : 'collapsed';
      sheetElement.classList.remove('collapsed', 'half', 'expanded');
      sheetElement.classList.add(targetState);
      sheetElement.style.transform = '';
      state.placeSheetSnapState = targetState;
      syncNavigationPeekCollapsedClass();
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
    }

    function openPlaceSheet(initialPoint) {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const titleElement = byId('placeSheetTitle');
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      if (!sheetElement || !titleElement || !bodyElement) {
        return;
      }
      state.placeSheetContentKind = 'place';
      state.activeNavigationRouteObject = null;
      state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel = null;
      resetNavigationGuidanceCompactState();
      sheetElement.classList.remove('navigation-guidance-sheet');
      sheetElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      titleElement.textContent = initialPoint && initialPoint.label
        ? initialPoint.label
        : 'Ort';
      bodyElement.innerHTML = initialPoint && initialPoint.loading
        ? '<div class="place-sheet-loading">Lade Details…</div>'
        : '';
      state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = initialPoint && !initialPoint.loading
        ? initialPoint
        : { lat: initialPoint && initialPoint.lat, lon: initialPoint && initialPoint.lon, label: initialPoint && initialPoint.label, details: null };
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
      syncNavigationPeekCollapsedClass();
    }

    function closePlaceSheet() {
      const overlaySuspension = state.navigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension;
      if (overlaySuspension && overlaySuspension.routeObject) {
        state.navigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension = null;
        removeLongPressMarker();
        restoreNavigationGuidancePlaceSheetFromSuspension(overlaySuspension);
        return;
      }
      clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension();
      resetNavigationGuidanceCompactState();
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (sheetElement) {
        sheetElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
        sheetElement.classList.remove('collapsed', 'half', 'expanded');
        sheetElement.classList.remove('navigation-guidance-sheet');
        sheetElement.classList.remove('navigation-peek-collapsed');
        sheetElement.style.transform = '';
      }
      state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = null;
      state.placeSheetSnapState = 'collapsed';
      state.placeSheetContentKind = 'place';
      state.activeNavigationRouteObject = null;
      state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel = null;
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
      removeLongPressMarker();
    }

    function handlePlaceSheetBodyClickForNavigationCompactPeek() {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive ||
        state.placeSheetSnapState !== 'collapsed' ||
        !isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
        return;
      }
      setPlaceSheetSnapState('half');
    }

    function togglePlaceSheetFromHeaderChevron() {
      if (!isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed') {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('half');
        } else {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
        }
        return;
      }
      if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed') {
        setPlaceSheetSnapState('expanded');
      } else {
        setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      }
    }

    function isPlaceSheetOpen() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      return !!(sheetElement && sheetElement.getAttribute('aria-hidden') === 'false');
    }

    function attachPlaceSheetDragGestures() {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const handleElement = byId('placeSheetHandle');
      if (!sheetElement || !handleElement) {
        return;
      }
      let dragActivePointerId = null;
      let dragStartClientY = 0;
      let dragStartTransform = 0;
      let dragCurrentDelta = 0;
      let pendingFrameId = 0;

      const sheetHeight = function () {
        return sheetElement.offsetHeight || 1;
      };

      const startTransformForState = function (snapStateName) {
        const heightPx = sheetHeight();
        if (snapStateName === 'expanded') {
          if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
            return Math.round(window.innerHeight * 0.38);
          }
          return 0;
        }
        if (snapStateName === 'half') {
          if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
            return Math.round(window.innerHeight * 0.52);
          }
          return Math.round(window.innerHeight * 0.45);
        }
        if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
          return Math.max(heightPx - getPlaceSheetNavCompactPeekOffsetPx(), 0);
        }
        return Math.max(heightPx - getPlaceSheetCollapsedTopOffsetPx(), 0);
      };

      const applyTransform = function (translateY) {
        sheetElement.style.transform = 'translate3d(0, ' + translateY + 'px, 0)';
      };

      const scheduleApply = function (translateY) {
        if (pendingFrameId) {
          return;
        }
        pendingFrameId = window.requestAnimationFrame(function () {
          pendingFrameId = 0;
          applyTransform(translateY);
        });
      };

      handleElement.addEventListener('pointerdown', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (!isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
          return;
        }
        if (pointerEvent.pointerType === 'mouse' && pointerEvent.button !== 0) {
          return;
        }
        dragActivePointerId = pointerEvent.pointerId;
        dragStartClientY = pointerEvent.clientY;
        dragStartTransform = startTransformForState(state.placeSheetSnapState);
        dragCurrentDelta = 0;
        sheetElement.classList.add('dragging');
        state.placeSheetDragging = true;
        try {
          handleElement.setPointerCapture(pointerEvent.pointerId);
        } catch (capturePointerError) {
          /* pointer capture optional */
        }
      });

      handleElement.addEventListener('pointermove', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (dragActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
          return;
        }
        const deltaY = pointerEvent.clientY - dragStartClientY;
        const heightPx = sheetHeight();
        const minTranslate = 0;
        const maxTranslate = Math.max(heightPx - 60, 100);
        const nextTranslate = Math.max(minTranslate, Math.min(maxTranslate, dragStartTransform + deltaY));
        dragCurrentDelta = nextTranslate;
        scheduleApply(nextTranslate);
      });

      const finishDrag = function (pointerEvent) {
        if (dragActivePointerId !== pointerEvent.pointerId) {
          return;
        }
        sheetElement.classList.remove('dragging');
        state.placeSheetDragging = false;
        const heightPx = sheetHeight();
        const expandedThreshold = heightPx * 0.18;
        const halfThreshold = heightPx * 0.55;
        let snapTarget = 'collapsed';
        if (dragCurrentDelta < expandedThreshold) {
          snapTarget = 'expanded';
        } else if (dragCurrentDelta < halfThreshold) {
          snapTarget = 'half';
        } else {
          snapTarget = 'collapsed';
        }
        try {
          handleElement.releasePointerCapture(pointerEvent.pointerId);
        } catch (releasePointerError) {
          /* not critical */
        }
        dragActivePointerId = null;
        setPlaceSheetSnapState(snapTarget);
      };

      handleElement.addEventListener('pointerup', finishDrag);
      handleElement.addEventListener('pointercancel', finishDrag);
      handleElement.addEventListener('pointerleave', function (pointerEvent) {
        if (dragActivePointerId === pointerEvent.pointerId && !state.placeSheetDragging) {
          dragActivePointerId = null;
        }
      });
      handleElement.addEventListener('click', function () {
        if (!isPlaceSheetOpen()) {
          return;
        }
        if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'collapsed') {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('half');
        } else if (state.placeSheetSnapState === 'half') {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('expanded');
        } else {
          setPlaceSheetSnapState('half');
        }
      });
    }

    async function fetchPlaceDetails(latitude, longitude) {
      const reverseUrl = 'https://nominatim.openstreetmap.org/reverse?format=jsonv2' +
        '&lat=' + encodeURIComponent(String(latitude)) +
        '&lon=' + encodeURIComponent(String(longitude)) +
        '&zoom=18&addressdetails=1&extratags=1&namedetails=1';
      const reverseResult = await fetchJson(reverseUrl, {
        headers: { 'Accept': 'application/json' }
      });
      if (!reverseResult || typeof reverseResult !== 'object') {
        return null;
      }
      return reverseResult;
    }

    function composePlaceLabelFromDetails(details) {
      if (!details || typeof details !== 'object') {
        return '';
      }
      const addressBlock = details.address || {};
      const primaryName = details.name || addressBlock.shop || addressBlock.amenity ||
        addressBlock.tourism || addressBlock.building || addressBlock.road || '';
      const displayName = details.display_name || '';
      if (primaryName && displayName) {
        if (displayName.toLowerCase().indexOf(String(primaryName).toLowerCase()) >= 0) {
          return displayName;
        }
        return String(primaryName) + ', ' + displayName;
      }
      return displayName || String(primaryName || '');
    }

    function buildPlaceSheetRowElement(label, valueHtml, iconCharacter) {
      const rowElement = document.createElement('div');
      rowElement.className = 'place-sheet-row';
      const iconElement = document.createElement('div');
      iconElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-icon';
      if (String(iconCharacter || '').indexOf('<svg') === 0) {
        iconElement.innerHTML = iconCharacter;
      } else {
        iconElement.textContent = iconCharacter || '';
      }
      const contentElement = document.createElement('div');
      contentElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-content';
      const labelElement = document.createElement('div');
      labelElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-label';
      labelElement.textContent = label;
      const valueElement = document.createElement('div');
      valueElement.className = 'place-sheet-row-value';
      valueElement.innerHTML = valueHtml;
      contentElement.appendChild(labelElement);
      contentElement.appendChild(valueElement);
      rowElement.appendChild(iconElement);
      rowElement.appendChild(contentElement);
      return rowElement;
    }

    function normalizeNavigationSpeedKmh(rawSpeedValue) {
      const numericSpeed = Number(rawSpeedValue);
      if (!Number.isFinite(numericSpeed) || numericSpeed < 0) {
        return null;
      }
      return numericSpeed;
    }

    function navigationSpeedKmhFromPositionRecord(positionRecord) {
      if (!positionRecord || typeof positionRecord !== 'object') {
        return null;
      }
      return normalizeNavigationSpeedKmh(positionRecord.speed);
    }

    function formatNavigationSpeedSignValue(speedKmh) {
      const normalizedSpeed = normalizeNavigationSpeedKmh(speedKmh);
      if (normalizedSpeed === null) {
        return '--';
      }
      return String(Math.max(0, Math.round(normalizedSpeed)));
    }

    function buildNavigationSpeedSignElement(speedKmh) {
      const signElement = document.createElement('div');
      signElement.className = 'place-sheet-nav-speed-sign';
      const speedLabel = formatNavigationSpeedSignValue(speedKmh);
      signElement.setAttribute(
        'aria-label',
        speedLabel === '--' ? 'Geschwindigkeit nicht verfuegbar' : 'Geschwindigkeit ' + speedLabel + ' km/h'
      );
      signElement.title = speedLabel === '--' ? 'Geschwindigkeit nicht verfuegbar' : speedLabel + ' km/h';
      const valueElement = document.createElement('span');
      valueElement.className = 'place-sheet-nav-speed-value';
      valueElement.textContent = speedLabel;
      signElement.appendChild(valueElement);
      return signElement;
    }

    const NAV_GUIDANCE_SHEET_MAX_ROWS = 18;

    function clearNavigationGuidanceCompactPoll() {
      if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactPollTimerId !== null) {
        clearInterval(state.navigationGuidanceCompactPollTimerId);
        state.navigationGuidanceCompactPollTimerId = null;
      }
    }

    function clearNavigationPostCloseZoomTimer() {
      if (state.navigationPostCloseZoomTimerId !== null) {
        clearTimeout(state.navigationPostCloseZoomTimerId);
        state.navigationPostCloseZoomTimerId = null;
      }
    }

    function clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer() {
      if (state.navigationManualViewResumeTimerId !== null) {
        clearTimeout(state.navigationManualViewResumeTimerId);
        state.navigationManualViewResumeTimerId = null;
      }
    }

    function getCachedNavigationCurrentLatLon() {
      if (state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng &&
        state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng.length >= 2 &&
        Number.isFinite(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0]) &&
        Number.isFinite(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1])) {
        return { lat: state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0], lon: state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1] };
      }
      return null;
    }

    function restoreNavigationAutoViewAfterManualIdle(latLon) {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.map || !latLon ||
        !Number.isFinite(latLon.lat) || !Number.isFinite(latLon.lon) ||
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
        return;
      }
      state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = true;
      state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = true;
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [latLon.lat, latLon.lon];
      applyNavigationAdaptiveZoom(
        latLon.lat,
        latLon.lon,
        state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode || 'drive'
      );
    }

    function scheduleNavigationManualViewResume() {
      clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer();
      state.navigationManualViewResumeTimerId = window.setTimeout(function () {
        state.navigationManualViewResumeTimerId = null;
        if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.map) {
          return;
        }
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
        const cachedLatLon = getCachedNavigationCurrentLatLon();
        if (cachedLatLon) {
          restoreNavigationAutoViewAfterManualIdle(cachedLatLon);
          return;
        }
        fetchLastPositionRecord().then(function (positionRecord) {
          if (!positionRecord ||
            typeof positionRecord.lat !== 'number' ||
            typeof positionRecord.lon !== 'number' ||
            !Number.isFinite(positionRecord.lat) ||
            !Number.isFinite(positionRecord.lon)) {
            return;
          }
          restoreNavigationAutoViewAfterManualIdle({
            lat: positionRecord.lat,
            lon: positionRecord.lon
          });
        }).catch(function () { /* ignore */ });
      }, NAV_MANUAL_VIEW_IDLE_RESUME_MS);
    }

    function pauseNavigationAutoViewForManualInteraction() {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.map) {
        return false;
      }
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer();
      clearNavigationPostCloseZoomTimer();
      const shouldStopAutomaticMapAnimation = !!(
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress ||
        state.navigationDockFollowAnimationFrame
      );
      clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer();
      clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      if (shouldStopAutomaticMapAnimation && typeof state.map.stop === 'function') {
        state.map.stop();
      }
      state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = true;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = false;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = false;
      disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
      state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      return true;
    }

    function resetNavigationGuidanceCompactState() {
      clearNavigationGuidanceCompactPoll();
      clearNavigationPostCloseZoomTimer();
      clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer();
      state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive = false;
      state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = 0;
      state.navigationDriveZoom = null;
      state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = 'drive';
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = null;
      state.navigationNextEventDistanceMeters = null;
      state.navigationLatestSpeedKmh = null;
