      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = false;
      clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer();
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = false;
      state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = false;
      setNavigationMapDockActive(false);
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (sheetElement) {
        sheetElement.classList.remove('navigation-compact-active');
      }
      syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationRemainingIndicator();
      clearNavigationRouteLivePolling();
    }

    function closeSearchPanelKeepInputs() {
      const searchPanelElement = byId('searchPanel');
      if (!searchPanelElement || !searchPanelElement.classList.contains('open')) {
        return;
      }
      searchPanelElement.classList.remove('open');
      updateDialogLayout();
      rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused();
    }

    function reopenSearchPanelAfterNavigationInterrupt() {
      const searchPanelElement = byId('searchPanel');
      if (searchPanelElement) {
        searchPanelElement.classList.add('open');
      }
      updateDialogLayout();
      rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused();
    }

    function syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility() {
      const startButtonElement = byId('placeSheetNavStartBtn');
      if (!startButtonElement) {
        return;
      }
      const isNavigationSheet = state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation';
      const stepCount = isNavigationSheet && state.activeNavigationRouteObject
        ? collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(state.activeNavigationRouteObject).length
        : 0;
      const shouldShowStart = isNavigationSheet &&
        !state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive &&
        stepCount > 0;
      startButtonElement.style.display = shouldShowStart ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
    }

    function navigationAdvanceGuidanceStepIndexIfNeeded(userLat, userLon) {
      const routeObject = state.activeNavigationRouteObject;
      const steps = collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(routeObject);
      if (steps.length === 0) {
        return;
      }
      let currentIdx = Math.min(Math.max(0, state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex), steps.length - 1);
      if (currentIdx >= steps.length - 1) {
        state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = currentIdx;
        return;
      }
      const nextStep = steps[currentIdx + 1];
      const nextManeuver = nextStep.maneuver && typeof nextStep.maneuver === 'object' ? nextStep.maneuver : {};
      const locationArray = Array.isArray(nextManeuver.location) ? nextManeuver.location : null;
      if (!locationArray || locationArray.length < 2) {
        state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = currentIdx;
        return;
      }
      const maneuverLon = Number(locationArray[0]);
      const maneuverLat = Number(locationArray[1]);
      if (!Number.isFinite(maneuverLat) || !Number.isFinite(maneuverLon)) {
        state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = currentIdx;
        return;
      }
      const distanceKm = haversineKilometers(userLat, userLon, maneuverLat, maneuverLon);
      if (distanceKm < NAV_GUIDANCE_COMPACT_STEP_ADVANCE_KM) {
        const userProjection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(userLat, userLon);
        const maneuverProjection = projectLatLngOntoNavigationBaseline(maneuverLat, maneuverLon);
        const routePassedManeuver = !userProjection || !maneuverProjection ||
          userProjection.arcMeters + NAV_ROUTE_LIVE_SNAP_MIN_PROGRESS_M >= maneuverProjection.arcMeters;
        if (routePassedManeuver) {
          currentIdx += 1;
        }
      }
      state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = Math.min(currentIdx, steps.length - 1);
    }

    function isTurnManeuverStep(stepItem) {
      if (!stepItem || !stepItem.maneuver) return false;
      const maneuverType = String(stepItem.maneuver.type || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      const modifier = String(stepItem.maneuver.modifier || '').trim().toLowerCase();
      if (modifier.indexOf('uturn') >= 0) return true;
      if (maneuverType === 'depart' || maneuverType === 'arrive') return false;
      if (maneuverType === 'continue' || maneuverType === 'new name') return false;
      if (modifier.indexOf('straight') >= 0) return false;
      if (maneuverType === 'roundabout' || maneuverType === 'rotary' || maneuverType === 'fork' ||
          maneuverType === 'end of road' ||
          maneuverType === 'off ramp' || maneuverType === 'on ramp' || maneuverType === 'merge') {
        return true;
      }
      return modifier.indexOf('left') >= 0 || modifier.indexOf('right') >= 0 || maneuverType === 'turn';
    }

    function getManeuverLatLngFromGuidanceStep(stepItem) {
      if (!stepItem || !stepItem.maneuver) return null;
      const location = Array.isArray(stepItem.maneuver.location) ? stepItem.maneuver.location : null;
      if (!location || location.length < 2) return null;
      const maneuverLat = Number(location[1]);
      const maneuverLon = Number(location[0]);
      if (!Number.isFinite(maneuverLat) || !Number.isFinite(maneuverLon)) return null;
      return { lat: maneuverLat, lon: maneuverLon };
    }

    function findNextTurnGuidanceStep(fromStepIndex, steps) {
      if (!Array.isArray(steps) || steps.length === 0) return null;
      const startIndex = Math.max(0, Number(fromStepIndex) || 0);
      for (let stepIndex = startIndex + 1; stepIndex < steps.length; stepIndex += 1) {
        if (isTurnManeuverStep(steps[stepIndex])) {
          return { step: steps[stepIndex], stepIndex: stepIndex };
        }
      }
      return null;
    }

    function cacheNavigationNextEventDistanceMeters(distanceMeters) {
      const numericDistance = Number(distanceMeters);
      if (Number.isFinite(numericDistance) && numericDistance >= 0) {
        state.navigationNextEventDistanceMeters = numericDistance;
        return numericDistance;
      }
      return Number.isFinite(state.navigationNextEventDistanceMeters)
        ? state.navigationNextEventDistanceMeters
        : null;
    }

    function resolveNavigationGuidanceDisplayContext(stepList, currentStepIndex, userLat, userLon) {
      const steps = Array.isArray(stepList) ? stepList : [];
      if (steps.length === 0) {
        return null;
      }
      if (!Number.isFinite(userLat) || !Number.isFinite(userLon)) {
        if (state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng && state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng.length >= 2) {
          userLat = state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0];
          userLon = state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1];
        }
      }
      const routeStepIndex = Math.min(Math.max(0, Number(currentStepIndex) || 0), steps.length - 1);
      let displayStepIndex = routeStepIndex < steps.length - 1 ? routeStepIndex + 1 : routeStepIndex;
      const nextTurn = findNextTurnGuidanceStep(routeStepIndex, steps);
      if (nextTurn && Number.isFinite(userLat) && Number.isFinite(userLon)) {
        const turnDistanceMeters = computeDistanceToManeuverMeters(userLat, userLon, nextTurn.step);
        if (turnDistanceMeters !== null &&
            turnDistanceMeters <= NAV_EVENT_ZOOM_PREVIEW_M + NAV_GUIDANCE_PREVIEW_TURN_EXTRA_M) {
          displayStepIndex = nextTurn.stepIndex;
        }
      }
      const displayStep = steps[displayStepIndex];
      let distanceToManeuverMeters = computeDistanceToManeuverMeters(userLat, userLon, displayStep);
      if (distanceToManeuverMeters === null && displayStep && typeof displayStep.distance === 'number') {
        distanceToManeuverMeters = displayStep.distance;
      }
      distanceToManeuverMeters = cacheNavigationNextEventDistanceMeters(distanceToManeuverMeters);
      return {
        step: displayStep,
        displayStepIndex: displayStepIndex,
        routeStepIndex: routeStepIndex,
        distanceToManeuverMeters: distanceToManeuverMeters
      };
    }

    function withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(callback, holdMs) {
      const durationMs = typeof holdMs === 'number' && holdMs > 0
        ? holdMs
        : Math.round(NAV_ADAPTIVE_ZOOM_FLY_SEC * 1000) + 250;
      state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = true;
      try {
        callback();
      } catch (programmaticMapError) {
        state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
        throw programmaticMapError;
      }
      window.setTimeout(function () {
        state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
      }, durationMs);
    }

    function clampNavigationZoomLevel(zoomLevel) {
      const numericZoom = Number(zoomLevel);
      if (!Number.isFinite(numericZoom)) {
        return NAV_DRIVE_ZOOM_DEFAULT;
      }
      const mapMaxZoom = state.map && typeof state.map.getMaxZoom === 'function'
        ? state.map.getMaxZoom()
        : 20;
      return Math.max(NAV_MIN_NAVIGATION_ZOOM, Math.min(numericZoom, mapMaxZoom));
    }

    function resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel() {
      let closeZoom = NAV_NAVIGATION_CLOSE_ZOOM;
      if (state.map && typeof state.map.getMaxZoom === 'function') {
        closeZoom = Math.min(closeZoom, state.map.getMaxZoom());
      }
      return Math.max(NAV_MIN_NAVIGATION_ZOOM, closeZoom);
    }

    function resolveNavigationDriveZoomLevel() {
      const driveZoom = Number.isFinite(state.navigationDriveZoom)
        ? state.navigationDriveZoom
        : resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel();
      return clampNavigationZoomLevel(driveZoom);
    }

    function normalizeNavigationZoomStage(stageValue) {
      const numericStage = typeof stageValue === 'string'
        ? Number(stageValue.replace(/\D+/g, ''))
        : Number(stageValue);
      return Math.max(0, Math.min(NAV_EVENT_ZOOM_MAX_STAGE,
        Number.isFinite(numericStage) ? Math.round(numericStage) : 0));
    }

    function resolveNavigationEventZoomStage(distanceMeters) {
      const distance = cacheNavigationNextEventDistanceMeters(distanceMeters);
      if (distance === null) {
        return NAV_EVENT_ZOOM_MAX_STAGE;
      }
      for (let thresholdIndex = 0; thresholdIndex < NAV_EVENT_ZOOM_STAGE_THRESHOLDS.length; thresholdIndex += 1) {
        const threshold = NAV_EVENT_ZOOM_STAGE_THRESHOLDS[thresholdIndex];
        if (distance <= threshold[0]) {
          return threshold[1];
        }
      }
      return NAV_EVENT_ZOOM_MAX_STAGE;
    }

    function resolveNavigationAutoZoomEventDistanceMeters(stepList, userLat, userLon) {
      const nextTurn = findNextTurnGuidanceStep(state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex, stepList);
      if (!nextTurn) return null;
      const distanceMeters = computeDistanceToManeuverMeters(userLat, userLon, nextTurn.step);
      if (distanceMeters !== null && distanceMeters > 0) return distanceMeters;
      return nextTurn.step && Number.isFinite(nextTurn.step.distance) ? nextTurn.step.distance : null;
    }

    function resolveNavigationStageZoomLevel(stageValue) {
      return clampNavigationZoomLevel(resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel() - normalizeNavigationZoomStage(stageValue));
    }

    function enableNavigationRouteAutoView() {
      state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = true;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = false;
      window.setTimeout(function () {
        if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.navigationAutoViewEnabled) {
          return;
        }
        state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = true;
        state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      }, NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_LAYOUT_DELAY_MS + NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_CONFIRM_DELAY_MS + 80);
    }

    function applyNavigationAdaptiveZoom(userLat, userLon, zoomMode) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      clearNavigationPostCloseZoomTimer();
      const zoomStage = normalizeNavigationZoomStage(zoomMode);
      const targetZoom = resolveNavigationStageZoomLevel(zoomStage);
      const zoomAnimationDurationMs = Math.round(NAV_ADAPTIVE_ZOOM_FLY_SEC * 1000);
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = zoomStage;
      state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = zoomStage > 0 ? 'event-' + zoomStage : 'drive';
      cancelMapBearingAnimation();
      if (navigationMapDockControlsMap()) {
        animateNavigationMapDockFollow(userLat, userLon, targetZoom, true, null, zoomAnimationDurationMs);
        return;
      }
      const startLatLng = getNavigationStartLatLng(userLat, userLon);
      const flyOptions = { duration: NAV_ADAPTIVE_ZOOM_FLY_SEC, easeLinearity: 0.2 };
      const armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd = markNavigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress(zoomAnimationDurationMs);
      withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(function () {
        if (typeof state.map.flyTo === 'function') {
          state.map.flyTo([startLatLng[0], startLatLng[1]], targetZoom, flyOptions);
        } else {
          state.map.setView([startLatLng[0], startLatLng[1]], targetZoom, { animate: true });
        }
        if (typeof armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd === 'function') {
          armAdaptiveZoomMoveEnd();
        }
      }, Math.round(NAV_ADAPTIVE_ZOOM_FLY_SEC * 1000) + 300);
    }

    function syncNavigationGuidanceAdaptiveZoom(userLat, userLon, forceRefresh) {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive ||
        !state.map ||
        !state.navigationAutoViewEnabled ||
        !state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed ||
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
        return;
      }
      const steps = collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(state.activeNavigationRouteObject);
      const distanceMeters = resolveNavigationAutoZoomEventDistanceMeters(steps, userLat, userLon);
      if (distanceMeters === null) return;
      const nextStage = resolveNavigationEventZoomStage(distanceMeters);
      if (forceRefresh || state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage !== nextStage || state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage === null) {
        applyNavigationAdaptiveZoom(userLat, userLon, nextStage);
      }
    }

    function computeRemainingRouteMetricsFromSteps(stepList, currentStepIndex) {
      const safeStepList = Array.isArray(stepList) ? stepList : [];
      if (safeStepList.length === 0) {
        return { remainingDistanceMeters: 0, remainingDurationSeconds: 0 };
      }
      const startIndex = Math.min(Math.max(0, Number(currentStepIndex) || 0), safeStepList.length - 1);
      let remainingDistanceMeters = 0;
      let remainingDurationSeconds = 0;
      for (let stepIndex = startIndex; stepIndex < safeStepList.length; stepIndex += 1) {
        const stepItem = safeStepList[stepIndex] && typeof safeStepList[stepIndex] === 'object'
          ? safeStepList[stepIndex]
          : null;
        const stepDistance = stepItem && typeof stepItem.distance === 'number' && Number.isFinite(stepItem.distance)
          ? stepItem.distance
          : 0;
        const stepDuration = stepItem && typeof stepItem.duration === 'number' && Number.isFinite(stepItem.duration)
          ? stepItem.duration
          : 0;
        remainingDistanceMeters += stepDistance;
        remainingDurationSeconds += stepDuration;
      }
      return { remainingDistanceMeters: remainingDistanceMeters, remainingDurationSeconds: remainingDurationSeconds };
    }

    function syncNavigationRemainingIndicator(optionalStepList) {
      const remainingElement = byId('placeSheetNavRemaining');
      if (!remainingElement) {
        return;
      }
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.activeNavigationRouteObject) {
        remainingElement.textContent = '—';
        remainingElement.removeAttribute('title');
        return;
      }
      const steps = Array.isArray(optionalStepList)
        ? optionalStepList
        : collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(state.activeNavigationRouteObject);
      const metrics = computeRemainingRouteMetricsFromSteps(steps, state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex);
      const distanceLabel = formatDistanceMeters(metrics.remainingDistanceMeters);
      const durationLabel = formatDurationSeconds(metrics.remainingDurationSeconds);
      const speedLabel = formatNavigationSpeedSignValue(state.navigationLatestSpeedKmh);
      remainingElement.innerHTML = '';
      const textElement = document.createElement('span');
      textElement.className = 'place-sheet-nav-remaining-text';
      textElement.textContent = distanceLabel + ' · ' + durationLabel;
      remainingElement.appendChild(textElement);
      remainingElement.appendChild(buildNavigationSpeedSignElement(state.navigationLatestSpeedKmh));
      remainingElement.setAttribute(
        'title',
        'Rest: ' + distanceLabel + ' · ' + durationLabel +
          (speedLabel === '--' ? '' : ' · ' + speedLabel + ' km/h')
      );
    }

    function navigationGuidanceCompactPollTick() {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.activeNavigationRouteObject) {
        return;
      }
      fetchLastPositionRecord().then(function (positionRecord) {
        if (!positionRecord ||
          typeof positionRecord.lat !== 'number' ||
          typeof positionRecord.lon !== 'number' ||
          !Number.isFinite(positionRecord.lat) ||
          !Number.isFinite(positionRecord.lon)) {
          return;
        }
        const previousIndex = state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex;
        navigationAdvanceGuidanceStepIndexIfNeeded(positionRecord.lat, positionRecord.lon);
        const stepIndexChanged = state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex !== previousIndex;
        renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(
          state.activeNavigationRouteObject,
          positionRecord.lat,
          positionRecord.lon,
          positionRecord
        );
        syncNavigationRemainingIndicator();
        syncNavigationGuidanceAdaptiveZoom(
          positionRecord.lat,
          positionRecord.lon,
          stepIndexChanged,
          previousIndex
        );
        processNavigationRouteLiveUpdate(positionRecord);
        if (state.navigationAutoViewEnabled && !state.userHasInteractedWithMap && !state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress) {
          followCurrentPositionOnMap([positionRecord.lat, positionRecord.lon], true);
        }
      }).catch(function () {
        /* ignore */
      });
    }

    function beginNavigationGuidanceCompactPolling(optionalInitialDelayMs) {
      clearNavigationGuidanceCompactPoll();
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        return;
      }
      const startPollingLoop = function () {
        if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
          return;
        }
        navigationGuidanceCompactPollTick();
        state.navigationGuidanceCompactPollTimerId = window.setInterval(
          navigationGuidanceCompactPollTick,
          NAV_GUIDANCE_COMPACT_POLL_MS
        );
      };
      const initialDelayMs = typeof optionalInitialDelayMs === 'number' && optionalInitialDelayMs > 0
        ? optionalInitialDelayMs
        : 0;
      if (initialDelayMs > 0) {
        window.setTimeout(startPollingLoop, initialDelayMs);
      } else {
        startPollingLoop();
      }
    }

    function snapMapToNavigationCloseView(targetLat, targetLon) {
      if (!state.map || !Number.isFinite(targetLat) || !Number.isFinite(targetLon)) {
        return;
      }
      const closeZoomLevel = resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel();
      state.navigationDriveZoom = closeZoomLevel;
      state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = 'drive';
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = 0;
      const snapToken = (state.navigationCloseViewSnapToken || 0) + 1;
      state.navigationCloseViewSnapToken = snapToken;
      const targetLatLng = L.latLng(targetLat, targetLon);

      function applyCloseViewSnap() {
        if (!state.map || state.navigationCloseViewSnapToken !== snapToken ||
          state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
          return;
        }
        if (navigationMapDockControlsMap()) {
          snapNavigationDockView(targetLat, targetLon, closeZoomLevel);
          return;
        }
        withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(function () {
          if (typeof state.map.stop === 'function') {
            state.map.stop();
          }
          if (typeof state.map.invalidateSize === 'function') {
            state.map.invalidateSize(true);
          }
          state.map.setView(targetLatLng, closeZoomLevel, { animate: false });
        }, 80);
      }

      applyCloseViewSnap();
      window.setTimeout(applyCloseViewSnap, NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_CONFIRM_DELAY_MS);
      window.setTimeout(applyCloseViewSnap, NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_LAYOUT_DELAY_MS);
      scheduleNavigationDriveZoomStepOutAfterCloseView(targetLat, targetLon, snapToken);
    }

    function applyNavigationDriveZoomStepOut(targetLat, targetLon) {
      if (!state.map ||
        !state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive ||
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
        return;
      }
      const steps = collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(state.activeNavigationRouteObject);
      const distanceMeters = resolveNavigationAutoZoomEventDistanceMeters(steps, targetLat, targetLon);
      if (distanceMeters !== null) {
        applyNavigationAdaptiveZoom(targetLat, targetLon, resolveNavigationEventZoomStage(distanceMeters));
      }
    }

    function scheduleNavigationDriveZoomStepOutAfterCloseView(targetLat, targetLon, snapToken, delayMs) {
      clearNavigationPostCloseZoomTimer();
      state.navigationPostCloseZoomTimerId = window.setTimeout(function () {
        state.navigationPostCloseZoomTimerId = null;
        if (!state.map || state.navigationCloseViewSnapToken !== snapToken) {
          return;
        }
        applyNavigationDriveZoomStepOut(targetLat, targetLon);
      }, delayMs || NAV_POST_CLOSE_ZOOM_STEP_DELAY_MS);
    }

    function scheduleNavigationCloseViewSnap(targetLat, targetLon) {
      window.setTimeout(function () {
        if (!state.map || !Number.isFinite(targetLat) || !Number.isFinite(targetLon)) {
          return;
        }
        if (typeof updateDialogLayout === 'function') {
          updateDialogLayout();
        }
        snapMapToNavigationCloseView(targetLat, targetLon);
      }, NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_LAYOUT_DELAY_MS);
    }

    function navigationFlyBearingOption() {
      const h = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees);
      return isHeadingUpBearingControlActive() && Number.isFinite(h) ? -h : undefined;
    }

    function waitForMapMoveEnd(timeoutMs) {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.on !== 'function' || typeof state.map.off !== 'function') return Promise.resolve();
      return new Promise(function (resolve) {
        let done = false;
        const finish = function () { if (done) return; done = true; state.map.off('moveend', finish); resolve(); };
        state.map.on('moveend', finish);
        setTimeout(finish, timeoutMs || 1800);
      });
    }

    function resolveLocateFlyBearing(headingDegrees) {
      // Richtung fuer den Zentrier-Flug: Heading-up-Peilung des Geraets, sonst
      // (falls Auto-Drehung aktiv) das uebergebene Heading - sonst keine Drehung.
      let flyBearing = navigationFlyBearingOption();
      const h = normalizeHeadingDegrees(headingDegrees);
      if (flyBearing === undefined && h !== null) {
        flyBearing = -h;
      }
      return flyBearing;
    }

    function flyMapToDeviceLocationAnimated(targetLat, targetLon, headingDegrees, userInitiated) {
      if (!state.map || !Number.isFinite(targetLat) || !Number.isFinite(targetLon)) {
        return;
      }
      if (!userInitiated && isDeviceSwitchAnimating()) {
        return;
      }
      if (headingDegrees !== undefined && headingDegrees !== null) {
        state.latestHeadingDegrees = normalizeHeadingDegrees(headingDegrees);
      }
      // Richtung des Standorts bereits beim Zoom sanft uebernehmen: das flyTo
      // dreht die Karte ueber die gesamte Flugdauer langsam auf die Fahrtrichtung
      // (kein separater Dreh-Schritt). Die automatische Drehung bleibt waehrend
      // des Zooms gesperrt (state.locateZoomInProgress) -> keine Konflikte.
      const flyBearing = resolveLocateFlyBearing(headingDegrees);
      // 2D beim ersten Klick (pitch 0), 3D beim zweiten/Doppelklick (geneigt).
      const targetPitch = Number.isFinite(state.locatePitchDeg) ? state.locatePitchDeg : 0;
      // Flugdauer mit Entfernung skalieren: aus der Ferne wird der Zoom-Bogen
      // sichtbar und weich (nah ~0.9 s, weit bis ~2.2 s). Richtung wird ueber die
      // gesamte Flugdauer im selben flyTo uebernommen (eine kombinierte Bewegung).
      const center = typeof state.map.getCenter === 'function' ? state.map.getCenter() : null;
      const distMeters = center && typeof state.map.distance === 'function'
        ? state.map.distance(center, L.latLng(targetLat, targetLon))
        : 0;
      const span = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, distMeters / LOCATE_FLY_FULL_SPAN_METERS));
      const flyDurationSec = LOCATE_FLY_MIN_DURATION_SEC +
        (LOCATE_FLY_MAX_DURATION_SEC - LOCATE_FLY_MIN_DURATION_SEC) * span;
      state.map.flyTo(
        [targetLat, targetLon],
        16,
        { duration: flyDurationSec, easeLinearity: 0.12, bearing: flyBearing, pitch: targetPitch }
      );
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [targetLat, targetLon];
      state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = true;
    }

    function flyMapToLatLonMaxZoomAnimated(targetLat, targetLon) {
      if (!state.map || !Number.isFinite(targetLat) || !Number.isFinite(targetLon)) return;
      const closeZoomLevel = resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel();
      const snapToken = (state.navigationCloseViewSnapToken || 0) + 1;
      state.navigationCloseViewSnapToken = snapToken;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = 0;
      state.navigationDriveZoom = closeZoomLevel;
      state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = 'drive';
      if (navigationMapDockControlsMap()) {
        animateNavigationMapDockFollow(targetLat, targetLon, closeZoomLevel, true, null, Math.round(NAV_START_FLY_TO_DURATION_SEC * 1000));
      } else {
        withSuppressedProgrammaticMapInteraction(function () { state.map.flyTo([targetLat, targetLon], closeZoomLevel, { duration: NAV_START_FLY_TO_DURATION_SEC, easeLinearity: 0.12, bearing: navigationFlyBearingOption(), pitch: MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG }); }, Math.round(NAV_START_FLY_TO_DURATION_SEC * 1000) + 250);
      }
      scheduleNavigationDriveZoomStepOutAfterCloseView(targetLat, targetLon, snapToken, Math.round(NAV_START_FLY_TO_DURATION_SEC * 1000) + 250);
    }

    function getNavigationRouteStartLatLon() {
      const start = state.navigationRouteStart;
      const firstCoord = Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords) ? state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords[0] : null;
      return start && Number.isFinite(Number(start.lat)) && Number.isFinite(Number(start.lon))
        ? { lat: Number(start.lat), lon: Number(start.lon), kind: start.kind || 'place' }
        : firstCoord && Number.isFinite(firstCoord[0]) && Number.isFinite(firstCoord[1])
        ? { lat: firstCoord[0], lon: firstCoord[1], kind: 'place' }
        : null;
    }

    async function resolveCurrentLatLonForNavigationCenter() {
      const currentPosition = await fetchCurrentPosition();
      if (currentPosition &&
        typeof currentPosition.lat === 'number' &&
        typeof currentPosition.lon === 'number' &&
        Number.isFinite(currentPosition.lat) &&
        Number.isFinite(currentPosition.lon)) {
        return { lat: currentPosition.lat, lon: currentPosition.lon };
      }
      if (state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng &&
        state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng.length >= 2 &&
        Number.isFinite(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0]) &&
        Number.isFinite(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1])) {
        return { lat: state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0], lon: state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1] };
      }
      return null;
    }

    function syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility() {
      const centerButtonElement = byId('placeSheetNavCenterBtn');
      if (!centerButtonElement) {
        return;
      }
      const shouldShow = state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive;
      centerButtonElement.style.display = shouldShow ? 'inline-flex' : 'none';
    }

    async function handleNavigationGuidanceCenterClick() {
      if (!state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive || !state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const centerLatLon = await resolveCurrentLatLonForNavigationCenter();
      if (!centerLatLon) {
        window.alert('Kein Standort verfügbar. Bitte zuerst den Standort laden (Ortungs-Button) oder ein Gerät mit Position wählen.');
        return;
      }
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer();
      state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = 0;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = true;
      state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = true;
      state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = 'drive';
      state.navigationDriveZoom = resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel();
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [centerLatLon.lat, centerLatLon.lon];
      setNavigationMapDockActive(true);
      flyMapToLatLonMaxZoomAnimated(centerLatLon.lat, centerLatLon.lon);
    }

    async function handleNavigationGuidanceStartClick() {
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind !== 'navigation' || !state.activeNavigationRouteObject) {
        return;
      }
      const stepList = collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(state.activeNavigationRouteObject);
      if (stepList.length === 0) {
        window.alert('Für diese Route liegen keine Einzelschritte vor.');
        return;
      }
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      if (!sheetElement || !state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const useLiveCurrentPosition = !state.navigationRouteStart || state.navigationRouteStart.kind === 'currentLocation';
      const startLatLon = useLiveCurrentPosition
        ? await resolveCurrentLatLonForNavigationCenter()
        : getNavigationRouteStartLatLon();
      if (!startLatLon) {
        window.alert('Kein Standort verfügbar. Bitte zuerst den Standort laden (Ortungs-Button) oder ein Gerät mit Position wählen.');
        return;
      }
      state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive = true;
      // Mittiges Andocken der Ortung stoppen (Navigation uebernimmt die Kamera).
      cancelLocateFollowDock();
      state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex = 0;
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = !useLiveCurrentPosition;
      if (useLiveCurrentPosition) enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
      else disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomStage = 0;
      state.navigationNextEventDistanceMeters = null;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = false;
      state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = useLiveCurrentPosition;
      state.navigationDriveZoom = resolveNavigationMaxDriveZoomLevel();
      state.navigationGuidanceZoomMode = 'drive';
      setNavigationMapDockActive(useLiveCurrentPosition);
      sheetElement.classList.add('navigation-compact-active');
      closeAuxiliaryDialogsForNavigationStart();
      setMapToolbarCollapsed(true);
      setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(
        state.activeNavigationRouteObject,
        startLatLon.lat,
        startLatLon.lon
      );
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationRemainingIndicator(stepList);
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      clearNavigationManualViewResumeTimer();
      state.autoFollowEnabled = useLiveCurrentPosition;
      if (useLiveCurrentPosition) state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [startLatLon.lat, startLatLon.lon];
      flyMapToLatLonMaxZoomAnimated(startLatLon.lat, startLatLon.lon);
      if (useLiveCurrentPosition) {
        enableNavigationRouteAutoView();
        const navigationPollStartDelayMs = NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_LAYOUT_DELAY_MS + NAV_CLOSE_VIEW_CONFIRM_DELAY_MS + 180;
        beginNavigationGuidanceCompactPolling(navigationPollStartDelayMs);
        beginNavigationRouteLivePolling();
      } else {
        clearNavigationGuidanceCompactPoll();
        clearNavigationRouteLivePolling();
      }
    }

    function fitMapToDisplayedRouteLineForOverview() {
      const baseline = Array.isArray(state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords) && state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords.length > 1
        ? state.navigationRouteBaselineCoords
        : null;
      if (baseline) {
        ['navigationRouteCasingLine', 'navigationRouteCoreLine'].forEach(function (lineKey) {
          if (state[lineKey] && typeof state[lineKey].setLatLngs === 'function') state[lineKey].setLatLngs(baseline);
        });
        state.navigationRouteCoords = baseline.slice();
        state.navigationRouteCumulativeMeters = state.navigationRouteBaselineCumulative.slice();
        if (state.navigationRouteStart) updateNavigationRouteAccessConnector(state.navigationRouteStart.lat, state.navigationRouteStart.lon, baseline[0]);
      }
      const line = state.navigationRouteCoreLine || state.routeLine;
      if (!state.map || (!baseline && (!line || typeof line.getBounds !== 'function'))) {
        return;
      }
      let routeBounds;
      try {
        routeBounds = baseline ? L.latLngBounds(baseline) : line.getBounds();
        if (state.navigationRouteAccessLine && typeof state.navigationRouteAccessLine.getBounds === 'function') {
          routeBounds.extend(state.navigationRouteAccessLine.getBounds());
        }
        if (state.navigationRouteDestinationAccessLine && typeof state.navigationRouteDestinationAccessLine.getBounds === 'function') {
          routeBounds.extend(state.navigationRouteDestinationAccessLine.getBounds());
        }
      } catch (boundsReadError) {
        return;
      }
      if (!routeBounds || typeof routeBounds.isValid !== 'function' || !routeBounds.isValid()) {
        return;
      }
      if (typeof state.map.invalidateSize === 'function') {
        state.map.invalidateSize(false);
      }
      if (typeof state.map.stop === 'function') state.map.stop();
      disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
      setProgrammaticMapBearingImmediate(0);
      resetMapPitchFlat();
      if (typeof state.map.flyToBounds === 'function') {
        state.map.flyToBounds(routeBounds, {
          padding: { top: 150, bottom: 260, left: 150, right: 150 },
          maxZoom: 12,
          duration: NAV_ROUTE_OVERVIEW_FLY_DURATION_SEC + 0.35,
          easeLinearity: 0.2
        });
      } else {
        state.map.fitBounds(routeBounds, { padding: [150, 260], maxZoom: 12, animate: true, duration: NAV_ROUTE_OVERVIEW_FLY_DURATION_SEC + 0.35 });
      }
    }

    function stopNavigationInterruptCloseSheetAndOpenSearch() {
      clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension();
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      const routeObject = state.activeNavigationRouteObject;
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind !== 'navigation' || !routeObject) {
        closePlaceSheet();
        return;
      }
      resetNavigationGuidanceCompactState();
      setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(routeObject);
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationPeekCollapsedClass();
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
      reopenSearchPanelAfterNavigationInterrupt();
      setTimeout(fitMapToDisplayedRouteLineForOverview, 260);
    }

    function handlePlaceSheetCloseButtonClick() {
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation' && state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        stopNavigationInterruptCloseSheetAndOpenSearch();
        return;
      }
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation') {
        clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension();
        const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
        if (routeQueryElement) routeQueryElement.value = '';
        state.selectedRouteSuggestion = null;
        updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
        clearRouteVisualization(false, { keepStartInput: true, keepNavigationSheet: true });
        closePlaceSheet();
        reopenSearchPanelAfterNavigationInterrupt();
        return;
      }
      closePlaceSheet();
    }

    function collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(routeObject) {
      const collectedSteps = [];
      if (!routeObject || !Array.isArray(routeObject.legs)) {
        return collectedSteps;
      }
      routeObject.legs.forEach(function (legItem) {
        if (legItem && Array.isArray(legItem.steps)) {
          legItem.steps.forEach(function (stepItem) {
            collectedSteps.push(stepItem);
          });
        }
      });
      return collectedSteps;
    }

    function iconCharacterForOsrmManeuver(maneuverObject) {
      const modifier = maneuverObject && maneuverObject.modifier ? String(maneuverObject.modifier) : '';
      const icon = function (body) {
        return '<svg class="nav-maneuver-icon" viewBox="0 0 32 32" aria-hidden="true"><g fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="3.4" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">' + body + '</g></svg>';
      };
      if (modifier === 'uturn' || modifier === 'sharp uturn') {
        return icon('<path d="M20 28V13q0-6-6-6H8q-4 0-4 4v8"/><path d="M0 15l4 4 4-4"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'sharp left') {
        return icon('<path d="M18 28V18q0-7-8-7"/><path d="M14 7l-4 4 4 4"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'slight left') {
        return icon('<path d="M18 28V19q0-7-6-11"/><path d="M17 7h-6v6"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'left') {
        return icon('<path d="M18 28V18q0-8-8-8H7"/><path d="M11 6l-4 4 4 4"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'sharp right') {
        return icon('<path d="M14 28V18q0-7 8-7"/><path d="M18 7l4 4-4 4"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'slight right') {
        return icon('<path d="M14 28V19q0-7 6-11"/><path d="M15 7h6v6"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'right') {
        return icon('<path d="M14 28V18q0-8 8-8h3"/><path d="M21 6l4 4-4 4"/>');
      }
      if (modifier === 'straight') {
        return icon('<path d="M16 28V7"/><path d="M10 13l6-6 6 6"/>');
      }
      const maneuverType = maneuverObject && maneuverObject.type ? String(maneuverObject.type) : '';
      if (maneuverType === 'roundabout' || maneuverType === 'rotary') {
        return icon('<path d="M22 9a8 8 0 1 0 2 8"/><path d="M24 5v7h-7"/>');
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'arrive') {
        return icon('<path d="M9 28V6"/><path d="M9 7h13l-3 5 3 5H9"/>');
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'depart') {
        return icon('<path d="M9 26V7"/><path d="M9 7l14 9-14 9"/>');
      }
      return icon('<circle cx="16" cy="16" r="3" fill="currentColor" stroke="none"/>');
    }

    function germanInstructionTextForOsrmStep(stepItem) {
      if (!stepItem || typeof stepItem !== 'object') {
        return '';
      }
      const maneuverBlock = stepItem.maneuver && typeof stepItem.maneuver === 'object' ? stepItem.maneuver : {};
      const maneuverType = maneuverBlock.type ? String(maneuverBlock.type) : '';
      const modifierRaw = maneuverBlock.modifier ? String(maneuverBlock.modifier) : '';
      const streetName = stepItem.name ? String(stepItem.name) : '';
      const exitNumber = typeof maneuverBlock.exit === 'number' && Number.isFinite(maneuverBlock.exit)
        ? maneuverBlock.exit
        : null;

      if (maneuverType === 'depart') {
        return streetName ? 'Start auf „' + streetName + '“' : 'Route starten';
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'arrive') {
        return streetName ? 'Ziel: „' + streetName + '“' : 'Ziel erreichen';
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'roundabout' || maneuverType === 'rotary') {
        const exitPart = exitNumber !== null ? ' – ' + exitNumber + '. Ausfahrt' : '';
        const namePart = streetName ? ' Richtung „' + streetName + '“' : '';
        return 'Kreisverkehr' + exitPart + namePart;
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'exit roundabout' || maneuverType === 'exit rotary') {
        return streetName ? 'Ausfahrt Richtung „' + streetName + '“' : 'Kreisverkehr verlassen';
      }

      let directionPhrase = 'Weiter';
      if (modifierRaw === 'uturn' || modifierRaw === 'sharp uturn') {
        directionPhrase = 'Wenden';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'sharp left') {
        directionPhrase = 'Scharf links';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'slight left') {
        directionPhrase = 'Leicht links';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'left') {
        directionPhrase = 'Links abbiegen';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'sharp right') {
        directionPhrase = 'Scharf rechts';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'slight right') {
        directionPhrase = 'Leicht rechts';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'right') {
        directionPhrase = 'Rechts abbiegen';
      } else if (modifierRaw === 'straight') {
        directionPhrase = 'Geradeaus';
      }

      if (maneuverType === 'merge') {
        return streetName ? 'Einordnen auf „' + streetName + '“' : 'Einordnen';
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'fork' || maneuverType === 'off ramp' || maneuverType === 'on ramp') {
        return streetName ? directionPhrase + ' auf „' + streetName + '“' : directionPhrase;
      }
      if (modifierRaw.indexOf('uturn') >= 0) {
        return streetName ? directionPhrase + ' auf „' + streetName + '“' : directionPhrase;
      }
      if (maneuverType === 'new name' || maneuverType === 'continue') {
        return streetName ? 'Weiter auf „' + streetName + '“' : directionPhrase;
      }
      if (streetName) {
        return directionPhrase + ' in „' + streetName + '“';
      }
      return directionPhrase;
    }

    function applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind() {
      const markButtonElement = byId('placeSheetMarkBtn');
      const routeButtonElement = byId('placeSheetRouteBtn');
      if (!markButtonElement || !routeButtonElement) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation') {
        markButtonElement.style.display = 'none';
        routeButtonElement.style.display = 'none';
        routeButtonElement.textContent = 'Route hierhin';
        routeButtonElement.title = '';
      } else {
        markButtonElement.style.display = '';
        routeButtonElement.style.display = '';
        routeButtonElement.textContent = 'Route hierhin';
        routeButtonElement.title = '';
      }
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
    }

    function dismissNavigationGuidanceSheetKeepRoute() {
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind !== 'navigation') {
        return;
      }
      const routeObject = state.activeNavigationRouteObject;
      const destinationLabel = state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel ||
        (state.navigationRouteDestination && state.navigationRouteDestination.label) ||
        'Ziel';
      clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension();
      if (routeObject) {
        openNavigationGuidancePlaceSheet(routeObject, { label: destinationLabel });
      } else {
        closePlaceSheet();
      }
    }

    function renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(routeObject, optionalUserLat, optionalUserLon, optionalPositionRecord) {
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      if (!bodyElement) {
        return;
      }
      bodyElement.innerHTML = '';
      const stepList = collectOsrmStepsFromRouteObject(routeObject);
      if (stepList.length === 0) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Hinweis',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet('Für diese Route liefert der Dienst keine Einzelschritte.'),
          '\u2139\uFE0F'
        ));
        return;
      }
      if (state.navigationGuidanceCompactActive) {
        const displayContext = resolveNavigationGuidanceDisplayContext(
          stepList,
          state.navigationGuidanceStepIndex,
          optionalUserLat,
          optionalUserLon
        );
        if (!displayContext || !displayContext.step) {
          return;
        }
        const stepItem = displayContext.step;
        const maneuverBlock = stepItem.maneuver && typeof stepItem.maneuver === 'object' ? stepItem.maneuver : {};
        const distanceLabel = displayContext.distanceToManeuverMeters !== null &&
          Number.isFinite(displayContext.distanceToManeuverMeters) &&
          displayContext.distanceToManeuverMeters >= 0
          ? formatDistanceMeters(displayContext.distanceToManeuverMeters)
          : '—';
        const instructionHtml = escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(germanInstructionTextForOsrmStep(stepItem));
        const previewTurnAhead = displayContext.displayStepIndex > displayContext.routeStepIndex + 1;
        const rowPrefix = previewTurnAhead ? 'Voraus · ' : '';
        const rowLabel = rowPrefix + 'Schritt ' + String(displayContext.displayStepIndex + 1) +
          ' / ' + String(stepList.length) + ' · ' + distanceLabel;
        const recordSpeedKmh = navigationSpeedKmhFromPositionRecord(optionalPositionRecord);
        if (recordSpeedKmh !== null) {
          state.navigationLatestSpeedKmh = recordSpeedKmh;
        }
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          rowLabel,
          instructionHtml,
          iconCharacterForOsrmManeuver(maneuverBlock)
        ));
        return;
      }
      const sliceEnd = Math.min(stepList.length, NAV_GUIDANCE_SHEET_MAX_ROWS);
      for (let stepIndex = 0; stepIndex < sliceEnd; stepIndex += 1) {
        const stepItem = stepList[stepIndex];
        const maneuverBlock = stepItem.maneuver && typeof stepItem.maneuver === 'object' ? stepItem.maneuver : {};
        const segmentDistanceMeters = typeof stepItem.distance === 'number' && Number.isFinite(stepItem.distance)
          ? stepItem.distance
          : 0;
        const distanceLabel = segmentDistanceMeters > 0
          ? formatDistanceMeters(segmentDistanceMeters)
          : '—';
        const instructionHtml = escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(germanInstructionTextForOsrmStep(stepItem));
        const rowLabel = 'Schritt ' + String(stepIndex + 1) + ' · ' + distanceLabel;
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          rowLabel,
          instructionHtml,
          iconCharacterForOsrmManeuver(maneuverBlock)
        ));
      }
      if (stepList.length > NAV_GUIDANCE_SHEET_MAX_ROWS) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          '…',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet('Weitere ' + String(stepList.length - NAV_GUIDANCE_SHEET_MAX_ROWS) + ' Schritte ausgeblendet.'),
          '…'
        ));
      }
    }

    function openNavigationGuidancePlaceSheet(routeObject, destination) {
      const sheetElement = byId('placeBottomSheet');
      const titleElement = byId('placeSheetTitle');
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      if (!sheetElement || !titleElement || !bodyElement || !routeObject) {
        return;
      }
      clearNavigationGuidanceOverlaySuspension();
      resetNavigationGuidanceCompactState();
      state.placeSheetContentKind = 'navigation';
      state.activeNavigationRouteObject = routeObject;
      state.placeSheetCurrentPoint = null;
      sheetElement.classList.add('navigation-guidance-sheet');
      sheetElement.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
      setPlaceSheetSnapState('collapsed');
      const destinationLabel = destination && destination.label ? String(destination.label) : 'Ziel';
      state.navigationGuidanceDestinationLabel = destinationLabel;
      titleElement.textContent = 'Route · ' + destinationLabel;
      bodyElement.innerHTML = '';
      renderNavigationGuidanceIntoPlaceSheetBody(routeObject);
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
      syncNavigationGuidanceStartButtonVisibility();
      syncNavigationCenterButtonVisibility();
      refreshPlaceSheetToggleButton();
      syncNavigationPeekCollapsedClass();
      fitMapToDisplayedRouteLineForOverview();
    }

    function escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(rawValue) {
      return String(rawValue == null ? '' : rawValue)
        .replace(/&/g, '&')
        .replace(/</g, '<')
        .replace(/>/g, '>')
        .replace(/"/g, '"')
        .replace(/'/g, ''');
    }

    function isUrlLikeString(rawValue) {
      if (typeof rawValue !== 'string') {
        return false;
      }
      return /^https?:\/\//i.test(rawValue) || /^www\./i.test(rawValue);
    }

    function buildExternalUrlString(rawValue) {
      if (typeof rawValue !== 'string') {
        return '';
      }
      if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(rawValue)) {
        return rawValue;
      }
      if (/^www\./i.test(rawValue)) {
        return 'https://' + rawValue;
      }
      return '';
    }

    function renderPlaceSheet(placePoint) {
      const bodyElement = byId('placeSheetBody');
      const titleElement = byId('placeSheetTitle');
      if (!bodyElement || !titleElement) {
        return;
      }
      bodyElement.innerHTML = '';
      const placeDetails = placePoint && placePoint.details ? placePoint.details : null;
      const detailsError = placePoint && placePoint.detailsError ? placePoint.detailsError : null;
      const safeLabel = placePoint && placePoint.label ? placePoint.label : 'Ort';
      titleElement.textContent = safeLabel;

      const addressDisplay = (placeDetails && placeDetails.display_name) || safeLabel;
      bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
        'Adresse',
        escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(addressDisplay),
        '\uD83D\uDCCD'
      ));

      const lat = Number(placePoint && placePoint.lat);
      const lon = Number(placePoint && placePoint.lon);
      if (Number.isFinite(lat) && Number.isFinite(lon)) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Koordinaten',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(lat.toFixed(6) + ', ' + lon.toFixed(6)),
          '\uD83E\uDDED'
        ));
      }

      const extratags = placeDetails && placeDetails.extratags && typeof placeDetails.extratags === 'object'
        ? placeDetails.extratags
        : {};

      const phoneRaw = extratags['phone'] || extratags['contact:phone'] || extratags['contact:mobile'];
      if (phoneRaw) {
        const phoneSafe = escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(phoneRaw);
        const phoneHrefSafe = encodeURI(String(phoneRaw).replace(/\s+/g, ''));
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Telefon',
          '<a href="tel:' + phoneHrefSafe + '">' + phoneSafe + '</a>',
          '\u260E\uFE0F'
        ));
      }

      const emailRaw = extratags['email'] || extratags['contact:email'];
      if (emailRaw) {
        const emailSafe = escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(emailRaw);
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'E-Mail',
          '<a href="mailto:' + emailSafe + '">' + emailSafe + '</a>',
          '\u2709\uFE0F'
        ));
      }

      const websiteRaw = extratags['website'] || extratags['url'] || extratags['contact:website'];
      const websiteHrefValue = buildExternalUrlString(websiteRaw);
      if (websiteHrefValue) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Webseite',
          '<a href="' + escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(websiteHrefValue) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' +
            escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(websiteRaw) + '</a>',
          '\uD83C\uDF10'
        ));
      }

      const openingHoursRaw = extratags['opening_hours'];
      if (openingHoursRaw) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          '\u00d6ffnungszeiten',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(openingHoursRaw),
          '\uD83D\uDD52'
        ));
      }

      const descriptionRaw = extratags['description'] || extratags['note'];
      if (descriptionRaw) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Beschreibung',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(descriptionRaw),
          '\uD83D\uDCDD'
        ));
      }

      const wikipediaRaw = extratags['wikipedia'];
      if (wikipediaRaw && typeof wikipediaRaw === 'string') {
        const splitIndex = wikipediaRaw.indexOf(':');
        const wikiLanguage = splitIndex > 0 ? wikipediaRaw.slice(0, splitIndex) : 'de';
        const wikiTitle = splitIndex > 0 ? wikipediaRaw.slice(splitIndex + 1) : wikipediaRaw;
        const wikipediaUrl = 'https://' + encodeURIComponent(wikiLanguage) + '.wikipedia.org/wiki/' + encodeURIComponent(wikiTitle.replace(/ /g, '_'));
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'Wikipedia',
          '<a href="' + escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(wikipediaUrl) + '" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">' +
            escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(wikipediaRaw) + '</a>',
          '\uD83D\uDCD6'
        ));
      }

      const poiCategory = placeDetails && (placeDetails.category || placeDetails.class);
      const poiType = placeDetails && placeDetails.type;
      const poiAddressType = placeDetails && placeDetails.addresstype;
      const poiPartsList = [];
      if (poiCategory) poiPartsList.push(String(poiCategory));
      if (poiType) poiPartsList.push(String(poiType));
      if (poiAddressType && poiAddressType !== poiType) poiPartsList.push(String(poiAddressType));
      if (poiPartsList.length > 0) {
        bodyElement.appendChild(buildPlaceSheetRowElement(
          'POI-Typ',
          escapeHtmlForPlaceSheet(poiPartsList.join(' / ')),
          '\uD83C\uDFF7\uFE0F'
        ));
      }

      const namedetails = placeDetails && placeDetails.namedetails && typeof placeDetails.namedetails === 'object'
        ? placeDetails.namedetails
        : {};
      const consumedExtraTagKeys = {
        phone: true,
        'contact:phone': true,
        'contact:mobile': true,
        email: true,
        'contact:email': true,
        website: true,
        url: true,
        'contact:website': true,
        opening_hours: true,
        description: true,
        note: true,
        wikipedia: true
      };
      const remainingExtraTagPairs = [];
      Object.keys(extratags).forEach(function (extraKey) {
        if (consumedExtraTagKeys[extraKey]) {
          return;
        }
        const extraValue = extratags[extraKey];
        if (extraValue == null || extraValue === '') {
          return;
        }
        remainingExtraTagPairs.push({ key: extraKey, value: extraValue });
      });
      Object.keys(namedetails).forEach(function (nameKey) {
        const nameValue = namedetails[nameKey];
        if (nameValue == null || nameValue === '') {
          return;
        }
        remainingExtraTagPairs.push({ key: 'name:' + nameKey, value: nameValue });
      });

      if (remainingExtraTagPairs.length > 0) {
        const extrasToggleButton = document.createElement('button');
        extrasToggleButton.type = 'button';
        extrasToggleButton.className = 'place-sheet-extras-toggle';
        extrasToggleButton.textContent = 'Mehr Details (' + remainingExtraTagPairs.length + ')';
        const extrasListElement = document.createElement('div');
        extrasListElement.className = 'place-sheet-extras-list';
        remainingExtraTagPairs.forEach(function (pairEntry) {
          const pairRowElement = document.createElement('div');
          pairRowElement.className = 'extras-row';
          const pairKeyElement = document.createElement('div');
          pairKeyElement.className = 'extras-key';
          pairKeyElement.textContent = pairEntry.key;
          const pairValueElement = document.createElement('div');
          pairValueElement.className = 'extras-value';
          if (isUrlLikeString(pairEntry.value)) {
            const externalUrl = buildExternalUrlString(pairEntry.value);
            if (externalUrl) {
              const linkElement = document.createElement('a');
              linkElement.href = externalUrl;
              linkElement.target = '_blank';
              linkElement.rel = 'noopener noreferrer';
              linkElement.textContent = String(pairEntry.value);
              pairValueElement.appendChild(linkElement);
            } else {
              pairValueElement.textContent = String(pairEntry.value);
            }
          } else {
            pairValueElement.textContent = String(pairEntry.value);
          }
          pairRowElement.appendChild(pairKeyElement);
          pairRowElement.appendChild(pairValueElement);
          extrasListElement.appendChild(pairRowElement);
        });
        extrasToggleButton.addEventListener('click', function () {
          extrasListElement.classList.toggle('open');
        });
        bodyElement.appendChild(extrasToggleButton);
        bodyElement.appendChild(extrasListElement);
      }

      if (detailsError) {
        const errorRow = document.createElement('div');
        errorRow.className = 'place-sheet-loading';
        errorRow.textContent = 'Hinweis: ' + detailsError;
        bodyElement.appendChild(errorRow);
      }
      state.placeSheetContentKind = 'place';
      state.activeNavigationRouteObject = null;
      resetNavigationGuidanceCompactState();
      applyPlaceSheetFooterForContentKind();
    }

    async function handlePlaceSheetRouteButtonClick() {
      if (state.placeSheetContentKind === 'navigation') {
        dismissNavigationGuidanceSheetKeepRoute();
        return;
      }
      await routeToPlaceSheetPoint();
    }

    async function savePlaceSheetPointAsPlace() {
      const point = state.placeSheetCurrentPoint;
      if (!point || typeof point.lat !== 'number' || typeof point.lon !== 'number') {
        window.alert('Kein Ort ausgewählt.');
        return;
      }
      const suggestedName = (point.label && point.label.split(',')[0]) || 'Ort';
      const placeName = window.prompt('Bitte Namen für den Ort eingeben:', suggestedName);
      if (placeName === null) {
        return;
      }
      const trimmedPlaceName = placeName.trim();
      if (!trimmedPlaceName) {
        window.alert('Bitte einen gültigen Namen eingeben.');
        return;
      }
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSavedItemsDeviceKey();
      let saveResult = null;
      try {
        if (isNativeAppContext()) throw new Error('local-only');
        saveResult = await fetchJson('/api/places', {
          method: 'POST',
          headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
          body: JSON.stringify({
            name: trimmedPlaceName,
            deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey,
            lat: point.lat,
            lon: point.lon
          })
        });
      } catch (error) {
        saveResult = { data: appendLocalSavedItem(LOCAL_SAVED_PLACES_STORAGE_KEY, selectedDeviceKey, {
          id: localSavedId('local-place'),
          name: trimmedPlaceName,
          deviceKey: selectedDeviceKey,
          lat: point.lat,
          lon: point.lon,
          timestamp: Date.now(),
          createdAt: Date.now(),
          localOnly: true
        }) };
      }
      window.alert('Der Ort wurde gespeichert.');
      if (saveResult && saveResult.data && saveResult.data.id) {
        if (saveResult.data.localOnly) {
          state.savedPlaces = mergeServerAndLocalItems(
            state.savedPlaces,
            readVisibleLocalSavedItems(LOCAL_SAVED_PLACES_STORAGE_KEY, selectedDeviceKey)
          );
        } else {
          await loadSavedPlaces();
        }
        setSavedPlaceVisibility(saveResult.data.id, true);
        renderPlacesList();
      } else {
        await loadSavedPlaces();
      }
    }

    async function routeToPlaceSheetPoint() {
      const point = state.placeSheetCurrentPoint;
      if (!point || typeof point.lat !== 'number' || typeof point.lon !== 'number') {
        window.alert('Kein Ort ausgewählt.');
        return;
      }
      const destination = {
        lat: point.lat,
        lon: point.lon,
        label: point.label || 'Kartenpunkt'
      };
      state.selectedRouteSuggestion = destination;
      addToRecentRouteSuggestions(destination);
      const routeQueryElement = byId('routeQuery');
      if (routeQueryElement) {
        routeQueryElement.value = destination.label;
      }
      updateInlineClearButtonVisibility();
      const searchPanelElement = byId('searchPanel');
      if (searchPanelElement) {
        searchPanelElement.classList.add('open');
      }
      updateDialogLayout();
      rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused();
      clearRouteVisualization(true);
      setRouteInlineInfo('-', '-');
      displayDestination(destination, { skipMapViewUpdate: true });
      try {
        await updateMapViewForRouteSearchEndpoints();
      } catch (endpointViewError) {
        window.alert('Startposition konnte nicht ermittelt werden. Bitte Standort wählen oder OwnTracks-Position abwarten.');
        throw endpointViewError;
      }
      closePlaceSheet();
    }

    function toggleWaypointPickMode() {
      if (!state.selectedRouteSuggestion) {
        window.alert('Bitte zuerst ein Ziel auswählen.');
        return;
      }
      if (state.waypointEditorRows.length >= MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS) {
        window.alert('Maximal ' + MAX_WAYPOINT_STOPS + ' Zwischenstopps sind möglich.');
        return;
      }
      appendWaypointEditorRowAfterDestinationSearch();
    }

    async function handleResetClick() {
      const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const confirmMessage = selectedDeviceKey
        ? 'Dieses Gerät zurücksetzen (Tracking-Verlauf, Zähler, Tracking-Status)? Gespeicherte Orte und Routen bleiben erhalten und werden nur über „Meine Orte & Routen“ gelöscht.'
        : 'ALLE Geräte: Tracking-Daten zurücksetzen (Positionen/Verlauf/Zähler)? Gespeicherte Orte und Routen bleiben erhalten.';
      if (!window.confirm(confirmMessage)) {
        return;
      }
      try {
        await resetTrackingData(selectedDeviceKey || undefined);

        // Handy: rein lokaler Reset ohne jegliche Server-Anfrage (kein POST/GET).
        // Die Tracking-Route NICHT serverseitig neu laden, sonst kaeme die gerade
        // geleerte Route sofort wieder. Live-Punkte laufen unveraendert weiter.
        if (selectedDeviceKey && isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey)) {
          await syncNativeTrackingBridge(false, selectedDeviceKey);
          state.pointsCounterDeviceKey = '';
          state.pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey = {};
          updateDevicePointCounters(0, 0, selectedDeviceKey);
          updateSyncPendingCounter(0);
          delete state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(selectedDeviceKey);
          updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
          state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
          if (state.trackLine) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.trackLine);
            state.trackLine = null;
          }
          removeStartMarker();
          clearRouteVisualization();
          removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(selectedDeviceKey);
          delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          state.trackingEnabled = false;
          updateTrackingButtonLabel();
          updateTrackingStatusChip();
          return;
        }
        if (selectedDeviceKey && !isNativeAppContext()) {
          // Web/Server: das Handy zusaetzlich per Command lokal zuruecksetzen.
          sendTrackingCommandToDevice(selectedDeviceKey, 'tracking_reset');
        }

        state.pointsCounterDeviceKey = '';
        state.pointsCounterPrevReceivedByKey = {};

        if (selectedDeviceKey) {
          updateDevicePointCounters(0, 0, selectedDeviceKey);
          updateSyncPendingCounter(0);
          delete state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(selectedDeviceKey);
          updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
          state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
          removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
          removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
          removeFailsafeOverlayForDevice(selectedDeviceKey);
          delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[selectedDeviceKey];
          clearSavedPlaceMarkers();
          clearSavedRouteLayers();
          state.selectedDeletePlaceIdSet = {};
          state.selectedDeleteRouteIdSet = {};
          await syncTrackingStateFromServer();
          await Promise.all([loadSavedPlaces(), loadSavedRoutes(), loadTracking()]);
          renderPlacesList();
          renderRoutesList();
          renderVisiblePlacesLegend();
          return;
        }

        if (isNativeAppContext() && getNativePhoneDeviceKey()) {
          await syncNativeTrackingBridge(false, getNativePhoneDeviceKey());
        }

        if (state.trackLine) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.trackLine);
          state.trackLine = null;
        }
        removeCurrentPositionMarkers();
        removeStartMarker();
        clearRouteVisualization();

        setTextIfPresent('device', '-');
        setTextIfPresent('lat', '-');
        setTextIfPresent('lon', '-');
        setTextIfPresent('countReceived', '0');
        setTextIfPresent('countRoute', '0');
        setTextIfPresent('countSync', '0');
        state.trackingEnabled = false;
        updateTrackingButtonLabel();
        state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey = {};
        updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
        removeLatestTrackingRouteLine();
        updateTrackingStatusChip();
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
        state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey = {};
        fillOwntracksDetailPanel(null);
        resetConnectionStatusUi();
        state.lastQuickPollSeenReceivedAt = 0;
      } catch (error) {
        console.error('Fehler beim Reset:', error);
        window.alert('Reset fehlgeschlagen: ' + (error && error.message ? error.message : String(error)));
      }
    }

    function updateTrackingButtonLabel() {
      const trackingButton = byId('trackingBtn');
      if (!trackingButton) {
        return;
      }
      trackingButton.textContent = state.trackingEnabled ? 'Tracking stoppen' : 'Tracking starten';
    }

    function updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel() {
      const trackingRouteButton = byId('trackingRouteBtn');
      if (!trackingRouteButton) return;
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const routeVisible = !!(selectedKey && state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[selectedKey]);
      trackingRouteButton.textContent = routeVisible ? 'Tracking-Route ausblenden' : 'Tracking-Route anzeigen';
      trackingRouteButton.classList.toggle('active', routeVisible);
    }

    function removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(deviceKey) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      if (!deviceKey) {
        const keys = {};
        [
          state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey,
          state.latestTrackingRouteConnectorByKey,
          state.latestTrackingPauseConnectorByKey,
          state.latestTrackingStartMarkerByKey,
          state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey
        ].forEach(function (mapByKey) {
          Object.keys(mapByKey || {}).forEach(function (key) { keys[key] = true; });
        });
        Object.keys(keys).forEach(removeLatestTrackingRouteLine);
        state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey = {};
        return;
      }
      const routeLine = state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey];
      if (routeLine) {
        state.map.removeLayer(routeLine);
        delete state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey];
      }
      removeTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey);
      removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(deviceKey);
      delete state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey[deviceKey];
      const startMarker = state.latestTrackingStartMarkerByKey[deviceKey];
      if (startMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(startMarker);
        delete state.latestTrackingStartMarkerByKey[deviceKey];
      }
    }

    function removeTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey) {
      const connectors = state.latestTrackingRouteConnectorByKey[deviceKey];
      if (Array.isArray(connectors)) {
        connectors.forEach(function (connectorLine) {
          if (connectorLine && state.map) state.map.removeLayer(connectorLine);
        });
      }
      delete state.latestTrackingRouteConnectorByKey[deviceKey];
    }

    function removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(deviceKey) {
      if (!deviceKey) {
        Object.keys(state.latestTrackingPauseConnectorByKey).slice().forEach(removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector);
        return;
      }
      const connector = state.latestTrackingPauseConnectorByKey[deviceKey];
      if (connector && state.map) {
        state.map.removeLayer(connector);
      }
      delete state.latestTrackingPauseConnectorByKey[deviceKey];
    }

    function latLngValueToArray(latLngValue) {
      if (!latLngValue) return null;
      const lat = Number(latLngValue.lat !== undefined ? latLngValue.lat : latLngValue[0]);
      const lng = Number(latLngValue.lng !== undefined ? latLngValue.lng : (latLngValue.lon !== undefined ? latLngValue.lon : latLngValue[1]));
      return coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(lat, lng) ? [lat, lng] : null;
    }

    function tailLatLngFromLatLngList(latLngList) {
      if (!Array.isArray(latLngList) || latLngList.length === 0) return null;
      for (let i = latLngList.length - 1; i >= 0; i -= 1) {
        const tail = latLngValueToArray(latLngList[i]);
        if (tail) return tail;
      }
      return null;
    }

    function latestTrackingRouteTailLatLng(deviceKey) {
      const routeLine = deviceKey ? state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey] : null;
      if (!routeLine || typeof routeLine.getLatLngs !== 'function') return null;
      const routeLatLngs = routeLine.getLatLngs();
      if (!Array.isArray(routeLatLngs) || routeLatLngs.length === 0) return null;
      const lastEntry = routeLatLngs[routeLatLngs.length - 1];
      if (Array.isArray(lastEntry)) {
        if (state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey[deviceKey] && lastEntry.length < 2 && routeLatLngs.length > 1) {
          return tailLatLngFromLatLngList(routeLatLngs[routeLatLngs.length - 2]);
        }
        return tailLatLngFromLatLngList(lastEntry) ||
          (routeLatLngs.length > 1 ? tailLatLngFromLatLngList(routeLatLngs[routeLatLngs.length - 2]) : null);
      }
      return tailLatLngFromLatLngList(routeLatLngs);
    }

    function latestTrackingRouteHasDockableTail(deviceKey) {
      const routeLine = deviceKey ? state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey] : null;
      if (!routeLine || typeof routeLine.getLatLngs !== 'function') return false;
      const routeLatLngs = routeLine.getLatLngs();
      if (!Array.isArray(routeLatLngs) || routeLatLngs.length < 2) return false;
      const lastEntry = routeLatLngs[routeLatLngs.length - 1];
      if (Array.isArray(lastEntry)) {
        return lastEntry.length >= 2;
      }
      return !state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey[deviceKey];
    }

    function updateLatestTrackingPauseConnectorToLatLng(deviceKey, lat, lon) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      const targetLat = Number(lat);
      const targetLon = Number(lon);
      if (!key || !state.map || !state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[key] ||
        !Number.isFinite(targetLat) || !Number.isFinite(targetLon)) {
        removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(key);
        return;
      }
      const tailLatLng = latestTrackingRouteTailLatLng(key);
      if (!tailLatLng) {
        removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(key);
        return;
      }
      const distanceMeters = haversineKilometers(tailLatLng[0], tailLatLng[1], targetLat, targetLon) * 1000;
      if (distanceMeters < 0.6) {
        removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(key);
        return;
      }
      const connectorCoords = [tailLatLng, [targetLat, targetLon]];
      let connector = state.latestTrackingPauseConnectorByKey[key];
      if (connector && typeof connector.setLatLngs === 'function') {
        connector.setLatLngs(connectorCoords);
        return;
      }
      connector = L.polyline(connectorCoords, withVectorRenderer({
        color: state.showAllDevicesOnMap ? getDeviceAccentColor(key) : '#111111',
        weight: Math.max(2, NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT - 3),
        opacity: 0.78,
        dashArray: '2 10',
        lineCap: 'round'
      })).addTo(state.map);
      connector.bindPopup('Tracking-Unterbrechung: Route bis aktueller Standort');
      state.latestTrackingPauseConnectorByKey[key] = connector;
    }

    function updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(deviceKey, lat, lon) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!key) return;
      if (state.trackingEnabled && latestTrackingRouteHasDockableTail(key)) {
        removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(key);
        dockLatestTrackingRouteEndToLatLng(lat, lon, key);
        return;
      }
      updateLatestTrackingPauseConnectorToLatLng(key, lat, lon);
    }

    function markTrackingRouteGapActive(deviceKey) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (!key) return;
      state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey[key] = true;
      if (Array.isArray(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng)) {
        updateLatestTrackingPauseConnectorToLatLng(key, state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0], state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1]);
      }
    }

    function renderTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey, routeSegments) {
      // Verbindet aufeinanderfolgende Routenteile (Tracking gestoppt/unterbrochen
      // dann fortgesetzt) mit einer gepunkteten Linie.
      if (!state.map || !Array.isArray(routeSegments) || routeSegments.length < 2) {
        removeTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey);
        return;
      }
      const connectorColor = state.showAllDevicesOnMap ? getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey) : '#111111';
      const connectorCoordsList = [];
      for (let segmentIndex = 0; segmentIndex < routeSegments.length - 1; segmentIndex += 1) {
        const currentSegment = routeSegments[segmentIndex];
        const nextSegment = routeSegments[segmentIndex + 1];
        if (!currentSegment || !currentSegment.length || !nextSegment || !nextSegment.length) continue;
        const breakStart = currentSegment[currentSegment.length - 1];
        const breakEnd = nextSegment[0];
        if (!breakStart || !breakEnd) continue;
        connectorCoordsList.push([breakStart, breakEnd]);
      }
      if (!connectorCoordsList.length) {
        removeTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey);
        return;
      }
      const existingConnectors = Array.isArray(state.latestTrackingRouteConnectorByKey[deviceKey])
        ? state.latestTrackingRouteConnectorByKey[deviceKey]
        : [];
      if (existingConnectors.length === connectorCoordsList.length) {
        existingConnectors.forEach(function (connectorLine, connectorIndex) {
          if (connectorLine && typeof connectorLine.setLatLngs === 'function') {
            connectorLine.setLatLngs(connectorCoordsList[connectorIndex]);
          }
        });
        return;
      }
      removeTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey);
      const connectors = connectorCoordsList.map(function (connectorCoords) {
        return L.polyline(connectorCoords, withVectorRenderer({
          color: connectorColor,
          weight: Math.max(2, NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT - 3),
          opacity: 0.85,
          dashArray: '2 10',
          lineCap: 'round'
        })).addTo(state.map);
      });
      state.latestTrackingRouteConnectorByKey[deviceKey] = connectors;
    }

    function dockLatestTrackingRouteEndToLatLng(lat, lon, deviceKey) {
      deviceKey = deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey();
      const routeLine = deviceKey ? state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey] : null;
      if (!deviceKey || !state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[deviceKey] || !state.trackingEnabled ||
          !routeLine || !Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lon)) return;
      if (!latestTrackingRouteHasDockableTail(deviceKey)) return;
      const routeLatLngs = routeLine.getLatLngs();
      if (!Array.isArray(routeLatLngs) || routeLatLngs.length === 0) return;
      const lastEntry = routeLatLngs[routeLatLngs.length - 1];
      const isSegmented = Array.isArray(lastEntry);
      const tail = isSegmented
        ? (lastEntry.length ? lastEntry[lastEntry.length - 1] : null)
        : lastEntry;
      if (isSegmented && !lastEntry.length) return;
      // Mikro-Bewegungen ignorieren (kein O(N) setLatLngs + GPU-Re-Upload, wenn
      // sich das Linien-Ende optisch nicht aendert).
      if (tail && Number.isFinite(tail.lat) && Number.isFinite(tail.lng) &&
        Math.abs(tail.lat - lat) < LOCATE_FOLLOW_ROUTE_DOCK_MIN_DEG &&
        Math.abs(tail.lng - lon) < LOCATE_FOLLOW_ROUTE_DOCK_MIN_DEG) {
        return;
      }
      if (isSegmented) {
        lastEntry[lastEntry.length - 1] = L.latLng(lat, lon);
      } else {
        routeLatLngs[routeLatLngs.length - 1] = L.latLng(lat, lon);
      }
      routeLine.setLatLngs(routeLatLngs);
    }

    function isRouteSpeedJumpOutlier(estimatedSpeedMps, recentRouteSpeedsMps) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(estimatedSpeedMps) || estimatedSpeedMps < 0) return false;
      if (estimatedSpeedMps > ROUTE_MAX_INSTANT_SPEED_MPS) return true;
      if (!Array.isArray(recentRouteSpeedsMps) || recentRouteSpeedsMps.length < 2) return false;
      const sortedRecentSpeeds = recentRouteSpeedsMps.slice().sort(function (leftSpeed, rightSpeed) {
        return leftSpeed - rightSpeed;
      });
      const middleIndex = Math.floor(sortedRecentSpeeds.length / 2);
      const recentMedianMps = sortedRecentSpeeds.length % 2 === 1
        ? sortedRecentSpeeds[middleIndex]
        : (sortedRecentSpeeds[middleIndex - 1] + sortedRecentSpeeds[middleIndex]) / 2;
      if (recentMedianMps < ROUTE_STATIONARY_SPEED_BASELINE_MPS) {
        return estimatedSpeedMps > recentMedianMps + ROUTE_MAX_SPEED_JUMP_MPS;
      }
      const allowedSpeedMps = (ROUTE_STATIONARY_HIGH_SPEED_FACTOR * recentMedianMps) + ROUTE_MAX_SPEED_JUMP_MPS;
      return estimatedSpeedMps > allowedSpeedMps;
    }

    function pushRecentRouteSpeedSample(recentRouteSpeedsMps, sampleSpeedMps) {
      if (!Number.isFinite(sampleSpeedMps) || sampleSpeedMps < 0) return recentRouteSpeedsMps;
      recentRouteSpeedsMps.push(sampleSpeedMps);
      if (recentRouteSpeedsMps.length > ROUTE_RECENT_SPEED_WINDOW_SIZE) {
        recentRouteSpeedsMps.splice(0, recentRouteSpeedsMps.length - ROUTE_RECENT_SPEED_WINDOW_SIZE);
      }
      return recentRouteSpeedsMps;
    }

    function buildCleanRouteCoordinates(pointEntries) {
      const validPointEntries = Array.isArray(pointEntries) ? pointEntries.map(mapTrackingPointEntryForDisplay).filter(function (pointEntry) {
        return pointEntry && typeof pointEntry.lat === 'number' && typeof pointEntry.lon === 'number';
      }) : [];
      validPointEntries.sort(function (leftPoint, rightPoint) {
        const leftTimestamp = Number(leftPoint.timestamp || leftPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        const rightTimestamp = Number(rightPoint.timestamp || rightPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        return leftTimestamp - rightTimestamp;
      });
      if (validPointEntries.length === 0) {
        return [];
      }
      const preselectedMobileRoute = validPointEntries.every(function (pointEntry) {
        return pointEntry && pointEntry.source === 'mobile_app' &&
          (pointEntry.routePoint === true || pointEntry.final === true);
      });
      if (preselectedMobileRoute) {
        return validPointEntries.map(function (pointEntry) { return [pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon]; });
      }
      const filteredPoints = [];
      const recentRouteSpeedsMps = [];
      let previousPoint = null;
      validPointEntries.forEach(function (pointEntry) {
        if (!previousPoint) {
          filteredPoints.push(pointEntry);
          previousPoint = pointEntry;
          return;
        }
        const previousTimestamp = Number(previousPoint.timestamp || previousPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        const currentTimestamp = Number(pointEntry.timestamp || pointEntry.receivedAt || 0);
        const hasUsableTimestamps = Number.isFinite(previousTimestamp) && previousTimestamp > 0 &&
          Number.isFinite(currentTimestamp) && currentTimestamp > 0;
        const distanceGapMeters = haversineKilometers(
