          previousPoint.lat, previousPoint.lon,
          pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon
        ) * 1000;
        const pointSpeedKmh = navigationSpeedKmhFromPositionRecord(pointEntry);
        const pointAccuracyMeters = Number(pointEntry.accuracy);
        const stillRadiusMeters = Math.max(POSITION_FUSION_STATIONARY_RADIUS_M, Math.min(22, Number.isFinite(pointAccuracyMeters) ? pointAccuracyMeters * 1.2 : POSITION_FUSION_STATIONARY_RADIUS_M));
        if (distanceGapMeters < ROUTE_MIN_POINT_DISTANCE_METERS ||
          (pointSpeedKmh !== null && pointSpeedKmh <= POSITION_FUSION_STATIONARY_SPEED_KMH && distanceGapMeters < stillRadiusMeters)) {
          return;
        }
        const timeGapSeconds = hasUsableTimestamps ? Math.max(0.001, (currentTimestamp - previousTimestamp) / 1000) : null;
        const movementSpeedMps = timeGapSeconds ? (distanceGapMeters / timeGapSeconds) : null;
        if (movementSpeedMps !== null && isRouteSpeedJumpOutlier(movementSpeedMps, recentRouteSpeedsMps)) {
          return;
        }
        if (movementSpeedMps !== null) {
          pushRecentRouteSpeedSample(recentRouteSpeedsMps, movementSpeedMps);
        }
        filteredPoints.push(pointEntry);
        previousPoint = pointEntry;
      });
      if (filteredPoints.length === 0) {
        return [];
      }
      if (filteredPoints.length < 3) {
        return filteredPoints.map(function (pointEntry) { return [pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon]; });
      }
      const smoothedCoordinates = filteredPoints.map(function (pointEntry, pointIndex, allPoints) {
        if (pointIndex === 0 || pointIndex === allPoints.length - 1) {
          return [pointEntry.lat, pointEntry.lon];
        }
        const previousEntry = allPoints[pointIndex - 1];
        const nextEntry = allPoints[pointIndex + 1];
        const smoothedLat = (previousEntry.lat + (2 * pointEntry.lat) + nextEntry.lat) / 4;
        const smoothedLon = (previousEntry.lon + (2 * pointEntry.lon) + nextEntry.lon) / 4;
        return [smoothedLat, smoothedLon];
      });
      return smoothedCoordinates;
    }

    function buildCleanRouteCoordinateSegments(pointEntries) {
      const validPointEntries = Array.isArray(pointEntries) ? pointEntries.map(mapTrackingPointEntryForDisplay).filter(function (pointEntry) {
        return pointEntry && typeof pointEntry.lat === 'number' && typeof pointEntry.lon === 'number';
      }) : [];
      validPointEntries.sort(function (leftPoint, rightPoint) {
        const leftTimestamp = Number(leftPoint.timestamp || leftPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        const rightTimestamp = Number(rightPoint.timestamp || rightPoint.receivedAt || 0);
        return leftTimestamp - rightTimestamp;
      });
      const grouped = [];
      let current = [];
      let currentSegmentId = null;
      validPointEntries.forEach(function (pointEntry) {
        const nextSegmentId = pointEntry.segmentId != null ? String(pointEntry.segmentId) : null;
        const startsNewSegment = current.length > 0 &&
          (pointEntry.breakBefore === true ||
          (nextSegmentId !== null && currentSegmentId !== null && nextSegmentId !== currentSegmentId));
        if (startsNewSegment) {
          grouped.push(current);
          current = [];
        }
        if (nextSegmentId !== null) currentSegmentId = nextSegmentId;
        current.push(pointEntry);
      });
      if (current.length) grouped.push(current);
      return grouped
        .map(function (segmentPoints) { return buildCleanRouteCoordinates(segmentPoints); })
        .filter(function (segmentCoords) { return segmentCoords.length > 0; });
    }

    const pendingLatestTrackingRouteRenderTimers = {};
    function scheduleLatestTrackingRouteRender(deviceKey) {
      // Trailing-edge Throttle: ein einziger voller Re-Render pro Geraet im Takt
      // von LIVE_TRACKING_ROUTE_RENDER_MIN_MS. Verhindert O(N log N) + GPU-Re-Upload
      // pro GPS-Tick bei langer Route -> Smoothing/Drehung bleiben flüssig.
      if (!deviceKey || pendingLatestTrackingRouteRenderTimers[deviceKey]) return;
      pendingLatestTrackingRouteRenderTimers[deviceKey] = setTimeout(function () {
        delete pendingLatestTrackingRouteRenderTimers[deviceKey];
        if (!state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[deviceKey]) return;
        const isLocal = isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey);
        const points = isLocal ? getNativeLocalRoutePoints() : null;
        if (!Array.isArray(points)) return;
        renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(points, null, deviceKey);
      }, LIVE_TRACKING_ROUTE_RENDER_MIN_MS);
    }

    function renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(pointEntries, trackingStartPosition, deviceKey) {
      deviceKey = deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey() || '';
      if (!deviceKey || !state.map) return;
      const routeSegments = buildCleanRouteCoordinateSegments(pointEntries);
      const routeCoordinates = routeSegments.length === 1 ? routeSegments[0] : routeSegments;
      const firstSegment = routeSegments[0] || [];
      const firstCoordinate = firstSegment[0];
      const hasStart = trackingStartPosition && typeof trackingStartPosition.lat === 'number';
      const flatCount = routeSegments.reduce(function (sum, segment) { return sum + segment.length; }, 0);
      if ((!hasStart && flatCount === 0) || flatCount < 2) {
        removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(deviceKey);
        return;
      }
      const startCoordinate = hasStart
        ? [trackingStartPosition.lat, trackingStartPosition.lon]
        : firstCoordinate;
      const coords = hasStart && routeSegments.length <= 1 ? [startCoordinate].concat(firstSegment) : routeCoordinates;
      let routeLine = state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey];
      if (routeLine && routeLine.setLatLngs) {
        routeLine.setLatLngs(coords);
        const startMarker = state.latestTrackingStartMarkerByKey[deviceKey];
        if (startMarker && startMarker.setLatLng) startMarker.setLatLng(startCoordinate);
      } else {
        removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(deviceKey);
        state.latestTrackingStartMarkerByKey[deviceKey] = L.marker(startCoordinate, { icon: greenIcon }).addTo(state.map);
        routeLine = L.polyline(coords, withVectorRenderer({
          color: state.showAllDevicesOnMap ? getDeviceAccentColor(deviceKey) : '#111111',
          weight: NAV_ROUTE_CASING_WEIGHT,
          opacity: 0.9
        })).addTo(state.map);
        state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[deviceKey] = routeLine;
      }
      renderTrackingRouteBreakConnectors(deviceKey, routeSegments);
      const latestSegment = routeSegments.length ? routeSegments[routeSegments.length - 1] : [];
      if (state.trackingEnabled && routeSegments.length > 1 && latestSegment.length >= 2) {
        delete state.trackingRouteGapActiveByKey[deviceKey];
        removeLatestTrackingPauseConnector(deviceKey);
      }
      if (state.trackingEnabled && deviceKey === getSelectedDeviceKey() && state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng) {
        updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(deviceKey, state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0], state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1]);
      } else if (!state.trackingEnabled && deviceKey === getSelectedDeviceKey() && state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng) {
        updateLatestTrackingPauseConnectorToLatLng(deviceKey, state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0], state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1]);
      }
    }

    async function syncLatestTrackingRouteLayers(selectedDeviceKey, selectedHistory, trackingStatusData) {
      if (!state.map) return;
      const show = Object.keys(state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey).filter(function (k) {
        return state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[k];
      });
      const keysToShow = state.showAllDevicesOnMap
        ? show
        : (selectedDeviceKey && state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[selectedDeviceKey] ? [selectedDeviceKey] : []);
      Object.keys(state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey).forEach(function (k) {
        if (keysToShow.indexOf(k) < 0) removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(k);
      });
      for (let i = 0; i < keysToShow.length; i += 1) {
        const deviceKey = keysToShow[i];
        const statusData = deviceKey === selectedDeviceKey ? trackingStatusData
          : ((await fetchTrackingStatus(deviceKey)) || {}).data;
        const start = statusData && statusData.missionStartPosition;
        const localNativeRoute = isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey)
          ? getNativeLocalRoutePoints()
          : null;
        if ((!start || typeof start.lat !== 'number') && (!localNativeRoute || localNativeRoute.length < 2)) {
          removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(deviceKey);
          continue;
        }
        const history = localNativeRoute && localNativeRoute.length >= 2 ? localNativeRoute : (
          deviceKey === selectedDeviceKey ? selectedHistory : ((await fetchHistoryForDeviceKey(deviceKey)).data || [])
        );
        const renderStart = localNativeRoute && localNativeRoute.length >= 2 ? null : start;
        renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(history, renderStart, deviceKey);
      }
      if (state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine && !state.userHasInteractedWithMap && !isDeviceSwitchAnimating()) {
        let bounds = null;
        keysToShow.forEach(function (k) {
          const line = state.latestTrackingRouteLineByKey[k];
          if (!line || !line.getBounds) return;
          try {
            const b = line.getBounds();
            if (b && b.isValid && b.isValid()) bounds = bounds ? bounds.extend(b) : b;
          } catch (e) { /* ignore */ }
        });
        if (bounds) state.map.fitBounds(bounds, { padding: [20, 20] });
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      }
    }

    async function toggleLatestTrackingRouteVisibility() {
      const deviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!deviceKey) {
        window.alert('Bitte zuerst ein Gerät auswählen.');
        return;
      }
      state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[deviceKey] = !state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[deviceKey];
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      if (!state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[deviceKey]) {
        removeLatestTrackingRouteLine(deviceKey);
        return;
      }
      if (isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey)) {
        const localRoute = getNativeLocalRoutePoints();
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = true;
        if (localRoute.length >= 2) {
          renderLatestTrackingRouteLineFromHistory(localRoute, null, deviceKey);
        }
        return;
      }
      const status = await fetchTrackingStatus(deviceKey);
      const start = status && status.data && status.data.missionStartPosition;
      if (!start || typeof start.lat !== 'number') {
        delete state.showLatestTrackingRouteByKey[deviceKey];
        updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
        window.alert('Keine Startposition verfügbar.');
        return;
      }
      state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = true;
      await loadTracking();
    }

    async function syncTrackingStateFromServer() {
      const selectedKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      let trackingStatusResponse = null;
      try {
        trackingStatusResponse = await fetchTrackingStatus(selectedKey);
      } catch (error) {
        if (applyLocalTrackingStateToUi(selectedKey)) {
          syncNativeTrackingBridge(state.trackingEnabled, selectedKey);
          return;
        }
        throw error;
      }
      const trackingStatusData = trackingStatusResponse && trackingStatusResponse.data
        ? trackingStatusResponse.data
        : null;
      state.trackingEnabled = effectiveTrackingActiveFromStatus(selectedKey, trackingStatusData);
      updateTrackingButtonLabel();
      checkServerLocalTrackingMismatch(selectedKey, trackingStatusData);
      updateTrackingStatusChip();
      if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && shouldRunClientFailsafeUiForDevice(getSelectedDeviceKey())) {
        updateFailsafeStateFromTrackingStatus(trackingStatusData);
      } else {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
      }
      syncNativeTrackingBridge(state.trackingEnabled, getSelectedDeviceKey());
    }

    function showChoiceDialog(options) {
      options = options || {};
      return new Promise(function (resolve) {
        if (state.choiceDialogOpen) {
          resolve(null);
          return;
        }
        state.choiceDialogOpen = true;
        const overlay = document.createElement('div');
        overlay.className = 'choice-dialog-overlay';
        overlay.setAttribute('role', 'dialog');
        overlay.setAttribute('aria-modal', 'true');
        overlay.style.cssText = 'position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:100000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;background:rgba(8,16,24,.55);padding:18px;';
        const card = document.createElement('div');
        card.style.cssText = 'background:#fff;color:#101820;border-radius:14px;max-width:420px;width:100%;box-shadow:0 22px 60px rgba(0,0,0,.4);padding:18px 18px 14px;';
        const titleEl = document.createElement('div');
        titleEl.style.cssText = 'font-size:18px;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;';
        titleEl.textContent = options.title || '';
        const messageEl = document.createElement('div');
        messageEl.style.cssText = 'font-size:14px;line-height:1.5;color:#33424f;margin-bottom:16px;';
        messageEl.textContent = options.message || '';
        const actions = document.createElement('div');
        actions.style.cssText = 'display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;';
        card.appendChild(titleEl);
        card.appendChild(messageEl);
        function finish(value) {
          if (!state.choiceDialogOpen) return;
          state.choiceDialogOpen = false;
          if (overlay.parentNode) overlay.parentNode.removeChild(overlay);
          resolve(value);
        }
        (options.buttons || []).forEach(function (buttonSpec) {
          const buttonElement = document.createElement('button');
          buttonElement.type = 'button';
          const isDanger = buttonSpec.kind === 'danger';
          const isPrimary = buttonSpec.kind === 'primary';
          const background = isDanger ? '#d9534f' : (isPrimary ? '#0275d8' : '#e6edf3');
          const foreground = (isDanger || isPrimary) ? '#fff' : '#1b2a36';
          buttonElement.style.cssText = 'border:0;border-radius:9px;padding:10px 14px;font-size:14px;font-weight:700;cursor:pointer;background:' + background + ';color:' + foreground + ';';
          buttonElement.textContent = buttonSpec.label || buttonSpec.id;
          buttonElement.addEventListener('click', function () { finish(buttonSpec.id); });
          actions.appendChild(buttonElement);
        });
        card.appendChild(actions);
        overlay.appendChild(card);
        overlay.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
          if (clickEvent.target === overlay && options.dismissible !== false) finish(null);
        });
        document.body.appendChild(overlay);
      });
    }

    function sendTrackingCommandToDevice(deviceKey, action) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (action === 'tracking_start' && key) {
        state.mismatchSuppressUntilByKey = state.mismatchSuppressUntilByKey || {};
        state.mismatchSuppressUntilByKey[key] = Date.now() + MISMATCH_SUPPRESS_AFTER_START_MS;
      }
      if (!key || !browserSeemsOnline()) return Promise.resolve(false);
      return fetchJson('/mobile/api/request-location', {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ deviceKey: key, action: action })
      }).then(function () { return true; }).catch(function () { return false; });
    }

    function applyLocalTrackingStop(deviceKey) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!key) return Promise.resolve(false);
      if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === key) {
        state.trackingEnabled = false;
        updateTrackingButtonLabel();
        updateTrackingStatusChip();
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[key];
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      }
      state.autoFollowResumeArmed = false;
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      setLocalTrackingState(key, false, false);
      markTrackingRouteGapActive(key);
      return syncNativeTrackingBridge(false, key);
    }

    function disableNativeServerLiveHeadingUi() {
      var liveHeadingEl = byId('nativeProfileServerLiveHeading');
      if (liveHeadingEl) liveHeadingEl.checked = false;
      if (nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload) nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload.serverLiveHeadingEnabled = false;
      syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi();
    }

    function applyLocalTrackingStart(deviceKey) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!key) return Promise.resolve(false);
      disableNativeServerLiveHeadingUi();
      if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === key) {
        state.trackingEnabled = true;
        updateTrackingButtonLabel();
        updateTrackingStatusChip();
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = true;
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
        state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
        state.autoFollowResumeArmed = true;
      }
      setLocalTrackingState(key, true, false);
      return syncNativeTrackingBridge(true, key).then(function () {
        setLocalTrackingState(key, true, false);
        if (getSelectedDeviceKey() === key) updateTrackingStatusChip();
        return true;
      });
    }

    function discardLocalRoute(deviceKey) {
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && typeof bridge.resetLocalRoute === 'function') bridge.resetLocalRoute();
    }

    // Der Speichern/Uebertragen/Verwerfen-Dialog laeuft nur noch auf der Webseite
    // (siehe decideWebLeftoverRoute in toggleTracking). Das Handy startet lokal
    // ohne Dialog; eine vorhandene lokale Route wird per Segment-Bruch fortgesetzt.
    async function startLocalTrackingWithStateMachine(deviceKey) {
      const key = String(deviceKey || getNativePhoneDeviceKey() || '').trim();
      if (!key) return;
      await applyLocalTrackingStart(key);
    }

    function handleRemoteTrackingCommand(detail) {
      const action = String(detail && detail.action || '').trim();
      const nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey) return;
      if (action === 'tracking_start') {
        startLocalTrackingWithStateMachine(nativeKey).catch(function (commandError) {
          console.warn('Tracking-Start-Kommando fehlgeschlagen:', commandError);
        });
      } else if (action === 'tracking_stop') {
        applyLocalTrackingStop(nativeKey);
      } else if (action === 'tracking_reset') {
        discardLocalRoute(nativeKey);
        applyLocalTrackingStop(nativeKey);
      }
    }

    function checkServerLocalTrackingMismatch(deviceKey, trackingStatusData) {
      if (isNativeAppContext()) return;
      const key = String(deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (!key || !trackingStatusData) return;
      state.serverActiveLocalStoppedByKey = state.serverActiveLocalStoppedByKey || {};
      state.serverLocalMismatchPromptByKey = state.serverLocalMismatchPromptByKey || {};
      const serverActive = trackingStatusData.active === true;
      const mismatch = serverActive && trackingStatusData.localActive === false;
      state.serverActiveLocalStoppedByKey[key] = mismatch;
      if (!mismatch) {
        state.serverLocalMismatchPromptByKey[key] = false;
        return;
      }
      if (state.serverLocalMismatchPromptByKey[key]) return;
      state.mismatchSuppressUntilByKey = state.mismatchSuppressUntilByKey || {};
      if (Date.now() < (state.mismatchSuppressUntilByKey[key] || 0)) return;
      state.serverLocalMismatchPromptByKey[key] = true;
      showChoiceDialog({
        title: 'Tracking auf dem Handy gestoppt',
        message: 'Der Server zeichnet die Route weiter auf, aber das Handy hat das lokale Tracking gestoppt. Tracking auf dem Handy erneut starten?',
        buttons: [
          { id: 'restart', label: 'Erneut starten', kind: 'primary' },
          { id: 'cancel', label: 'Abbrechen' }
        ]
      }).then(function (choice) {
        if (choice === 'restart') {
          sendTrackingCommandToDevice(key, 'tracking_start');
        }
      });
    }

    // Web/Server: vor einem Tracking-Start pruefen, ob fuer das Geraet bereits eine
    // (noch nicht gespeicherte) Route auf dem Server vorliegt. Falls ja, den Dialog
    // auf der Webseite zeigen. Rueckgabe: 'none' (normal starten), 'save' | 'transfer'
    // | 'discard' oder 'cancel' (Abbruch).
    async function decideWebLeftoverRoute(deviceKey) {
      if (isNativeAppContext()) return 'none';
      if (!browserSeemsOnline()) return 'none';
      let pointCount = 0;
      try {
        const historyJson = await fetchHistoryForSelectedDevice();
        pointCount = historyJson && Array.isArray(historyJson.data) ? historyJson.data.length : 0;
      } catch (historyError) {
        return 'none';
      }
      if (pointCount < 2) return 'none';
      const choice = await showChoiceDialog({
        title: 'Vorhandene Route',
        message: 'Für dieses Gerät liegt bereits eine Route vor. Was soll damit geschehen, bevor das Tracking neu startet?',
        buttons: [
          { id: 'save', label: 'Speichern', kind: 'primary' },
          { id: 'transfer', label: 'Übertragen' },
          { id: 'discard', label: 'Verwerfen', kind: 'danger' }
        ]
      });
      return choice || 'cancel';
    }

    async function toggleTracking() {
      const deviceKeyForTracking = getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!deviceKeyForTracking) {
        window.alert('Bitte zuerst ein Gerät auswählen (aktives Gerät im Panel).');
        return;
      }
      const shouldStartTracking = !state.trackingEnabled;
      const trackingControlEndpoint = shouldStartTracking ? '/api/tracking/start' : '/api/tracking/stop';
      // Handy: rein lokal steuern (keine HTTPS-Tracking-Calls), Server erfaehrt den
      // Zustand ueber die winzige MQTT-Statusmeldung der Bridge.
      if (isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKeyForTracking)) {
        if (shouldStartTracking) {
          await startLocalTrackingWithStateMachine(deviceKeyForTracking);
        } else {
          await applyLocalTrackingStop(deviceKeyForTracking);
        }
        return;
      }
      // Web/Server: vor dem Start auf der Webseite ueber eine vorhandene Route
      // entscheiden. Die Entscheidung wird serverseitig ausgefuehrt (Speichern bzw.
      // Reset) und das Handy nur per Reset-Command nachgezogen.
      if (shouldStartTracking) {
        const routeDecision = await decideWebLeftoverRoute(deviceKeyForTracking);
        if (routeDecision === 'cancel') return;
        if (routeDecision === 'save') {
          const savedOk = await saveCurrentRoute();
          if (!savedOk) return;
        }
        if (routeDecision === 'save' || routeDecision === 'discard') {
          try {
            await resetTrackingData(deviceKeyForTracking);
          } catch (resetError) {
            // Server-Reset ist best effort; der Trackingstart laeuft trotzdem weiter.
          }
          sendTrackingCommandToDevice(deviceKeyForTracking, 'tracking_reset');
        }
        // 'transfer'/'none': bestehende Route behalten und weiter tracken.
      }
      // Web/Server: Server-Status setzen UND das Handy per MQTT-Command fernsteuern.
      const trackingControlResponse = await fetchJson(trackingControlEndpoint, {
        method: 'POST',
        headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
        body: JSON.stringify({ deviceKey: deviceKeyForTracking })
      });
      const trackingControlData = trackingControlResponse && trackingControlResponse.data
        ? trackingControlResponse.data
        : null;
      state.trackingEnabled = !!(trackingControlData && trackingControlData.active);
      updateTrackingButtonLabel();
      updateTrackingStatusChip();
      sendTrackingCommandToDevice(deviceKeyForTracking, shouldStartTracking ? 'tracking_start' : 'tracking_stop');
      if (!state.trackingEnabled) {
        removeFailsafeReturnMarker();
        removeFailsafeReturnRouteLine();
        delete state.failsafeBreakNoticeShownByKey[deviceKeyForTracking];
        markTrackingRouteGapActive(deviceKeyForTracking);
      }
      if (state.trackingEnabled) {
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = true;
        state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      } else {
        state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
        if (state.trackLine) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.trackLine);
          state.trackLine = null;
        }
        removeStartMarker();
      }
      syncNativeTrackingBridge(state.trackingEnabled, deviceKeyForTracking);
      await loadTracking();
    }

    function toggleSettingsPanel() {
      const settingsPanelElement = byId('settingsPanel');
      settingsPanelElement.classList.toggle('open');
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function toggleOwntracksPanel() {
      const owntracksPanelElement = byId('owntracksPanel');
      owntracksPanelElement.classList.toggle('open');
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function measureMapUiToolbarBottomPx() {
      const toolbarButtonIds = [
        'mapToolbarCollapseBtn',
        'panelToggleBtn',
        'searchToggleBtn',
        'locateToggleBtn',
        'mapStyleToggleBtn',
        'cameraToggleBtn',
        'nativeProfileBtn',
        'mobileAppToggleBtn'
      ];
      let maxBottom = 0;
      toolbarButtonIds.forEach(function (buttonId) {
        const buttonElement = byId(buttonId);
        if (!buttonElement) {
          return;
        }
        const computedStyle = window.getComputedStyle(buttonElement);
        if (computedStyle.display === 'none' || computedStyle.visibility === 'hidden') {
          return;
        }
        const buttonRect = buttonElement.getBoundingClientRect();
        if (buttonRect.width < 1 || buttonRect.height < 1) {
          return;
        }
        if (buttonRect.bottom > maxBottom) {
          maxBottom = buttonRect.bottom;
        }
      });
      if (maxBottom > 0) {
        return maxBottom;
      }
      const rootStyle = window.getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
      const panelTopValue = rootStyle.getPropertyValue('--map-ui-panel-top').trim();
      if (panelTopValue) {
        const probeElement = document.createElement('div');
        probeElement.style.cssText = 'position:absolute;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;top:' + panelTopValue;
        document.body.appendChild(probeElement);
        maxBottom = probeElement.offsetTop;
        document.body.removeChild(probeElement);
      }
      return maxBottom > 0 ? maxBottom : 56;
    }

    function syncCameraFloatingPanelLayout(anchorTopPx) {
      const cameraPanel = document.getElementById('cameraFloatingPanel');
      if (!cameraPanel || !cameraPanel.classList.contains('open') || isCameraDialogWindow()) {
        return;
      }
      const stackGap = 8;
      const topPx = typeof anchorTopPx === 'number' && Number.isFinite(anchorTopPx)
        ? anchorTopPx
        : (measureMapUiToolbarBottomPx() + stackGap);
      if (cameraPanel.dataset.userMoved !== '1') {
        cameraPanel.style.top = Math.round(topPx) + 'px';
        const rootStyle = window.getComputedStyle(document.documentElement);
        const rightGutter = rootStyle.getPropertyValue('--map-ui-gutter-right').trim() || '10px';
        cameraPanel.style.right = rightGutter;
      }
      const safeBottom = parseFloat(window.getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--safe-bottom')) || 0;
      const maxHeight = window.innerHeight - topPx - safeBottom - 12;
      if (maxHeight > 260) {
        cameraPanel.style.maxHeight = Math.round(maxHeight) + 'px';
      }
    }

    function isCameraDialogWindow() {
      try {
        return new URLSearchParams(window.location.search).get('cameraDialog') === '1';
      } catch (cameraDialogParamError) {
        return false;
      }
    }

    function updateDialogLayout() {
      const controlPanelElement = byId('controlPanel');
      const searchPanelElement = byId('searchPanel');
      const panelToggleButton = byId('panelToggleBtn');
      const searchToggleButton = byId('searchToggleBtn');
      const placesLegendElement = byId('placesLegend');
      if (!controlPanelElement || !searchPanelElement || !panelToggleButton || !searchToggleButton) {
        return;
      }

      const isControlOpen = !controlPanelElement.classList.contains('hidden');
      const isSearchOpen = searchPanelElement.classList.contains('open');
      panelToggleButton.classList.toggle('active', isControlOpen);
      searchToggleButton.classList.toggle('active', isSearchOpen);

      const stackGap = 8;
      const anchorTop = measureMapUiToolbarBottomPx() + stackGap;
      document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--map-ui-anchor-top', anchorTop + 'px');

      searchPanelElement.style.top = anchorTop + 'px';

      let controlPanelTop = anchorTop;
      if (isSearchOpen && searchPanelElement.offsetHeight > 0) {
        controlPanelTop = anchorTop + searchPanelElement.offsetHeight + stackGap;
      }
      controlPanelElement.style.top = controlPanelTop + 'px';

      if (placesLegendElement && placesLegendElement.classList.contains('open')) {
        placesLegendElement.style.top = anchorTop + 'px';
      }

      syncCameraFloatingPanelLayout(anchorTop);
    }

    window.__updateMapUiLayout = updateDialogLayout;
    window.__getMapUiPanelAnchorTopPx = function () {
      const anchorTopValue = window.getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--map-ui-anchor-top').trim();
      if (anchorTopValue) {
        const parsedAnchorTop = parseFloat(anchorTopValue);
        if (Number.isFinite(parsedAnchorTop)) {
          return parsedAnchorTop;
        }
      }
      return measureMapUiToolbarBottomPx() + 8;
    };

    function toggleSearchPanel() {
      const searchPanelElement = byId('searchPanel');
      if (!searchPanelElement) {
        return;
      }
      searchPanelElement.classList.toggle('open');
      if (!searchPanelElement.classList.contains('open')) {
        state.activeSearchTarget = null;
        hideRouteSuggestions();
      }
      updateDialogLayout();
      rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused();
    }

    function toggleControlPanel() {
      const controlPanelElement = byId('controlPanel');
      const settingsPanelElement = byId('settingsPanel');
      const owntracksPanelElement = byId('owntracksPanel');
      if (!controlPanelElement) {
        return;
      }

      if (settingsPanelElement) {
        settingsPanelElement.classList.remove('open');
      }
      if (owntracksPanelElement) {
        owntracksPanelElement.classList.remove('open');
      }

      controlPanelElement.classList.toggle('hidden');
      updateDialogLayout();
      rescheduleAutoFollowResumeIfMapFollowPaused();
    }

    function stopManualLocateCameraMotion() {
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      if (state.map && typeof state.map.stop === 'function') {
        try {
          state.map.stop();
        } catch (mapStopError) {}
      }
      cancelMapBearingAnimation();
      cancelLocateFollowDock();
      clearNavigationAdaptiveZoomTimer();
      state.autoFollowEnabled = false;
      state.navigationAutoViewEnabled = false;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomArmed = false;
      state.navigationAdaptiveZoomInProgress = false;
      state.shouldAutoFitTrackLine = false;
      disableHeadingUpBearingByUserInteraction();
    }

    function focusSelectedDeviceAfterValidLocate(selectedDeviceKey, startedFromAllMode) {
      if (!startedFromAllMode) return;
      state.showAllDevicesOnMap = false;
      state.mapLastCenteredDeviceKeyInAllMode = null;
      if (selectedDeviceKey) {
        enforceSelectedDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey);
      }
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      clearAllFailsafeOverlays();
    }

    function restoreLocateFollowAfterValidCenter(markerPosition) {
      // Zoom ist abgeschlossen -> Drehung wieder freigeben und in Fahrtrichtung drehen.
      state.locateZoomInProgress = false;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      state.autoFollowResumeArmed = true;
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
      if (markerPosition) {
        const heading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(markerPosition.heading);
        if (heading !== null) {
          state.latestHeadingDegrees = heading;
        }
      }
      // Mittiges Andocken + automatische Drehung/Verschiebung aktivieren: ab jetzt
      // haelt der Follow-Loop den Marker zentriert und dreht in Fahrtrichtung
      // (Center + Bearing + Pitch in EINEM Schreibvorgang pro Frame).
      startLocateFollowLoop();
    }

    function centerMapOnPositionEntryNow(positionEntry, selectedDeviceKey, softEase) {
      if (!positionEntry) return false;
      const markerPosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(positionEntry) || positionEntry;
      if (!markerPosition || typeof markerPosition.lat !== 'number' || typeof markerPosition.lon !== 'number') {
        return false;
      }
      state.latestHeadingDegrees = normalizeHeadingDegrees(markerPosition.heading);
      state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [markerPosition.lat, markerPosition.lon];
      if (selectedDeviceKey) {
        state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[selectedDeviceKey] = [markerPosition.lat, markerPosition.lon];
      }
      // Zoom-Phase markieren: bis zum Abschluss des flyTo wird nicht gedreht.
      state.locateZoomInProgress = true;
      // Verhindert den fruehen setView-Snap (und damit ein vorzeitiges 'moveend',
      // das die Drehung/Verfolgung startet, bevor der Zoom abgeschlossen ist).
      state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = true;
      applyLivePositionEntryToMap(markerPosition);
      if (softEase === true) {
        // Frischer Fix nahe der bereits angeflogenen Fallback-Position: keinen
        // zweiten Parabel-Flug starten. Laeuft noch der erste Flug, nicht
        // unterbrechen (der Follow-Loop zieht den Marker danach mittig nach);
        // sonst nur kurz kombiniert nachziehen (Center + Bearing + Pitch).
        if (!state.map._animatingZoom) {
          const flyBearing = resolveLocateFlyBearing(markerPosition.heading);
          const targetPitch = Number.isFinite(state.locatePitchDeg) ? state.locatePitchDeg : 0;
          state.map.setView(L.latLng(markerPosition.lat, markerPosition.lon), 16, {
            animate: true,
            duration: LOCATE_SOFT_EASE_DURATION_SEC,
            pitch: targetPitch,
            bearing: flyBearing
          });
          state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng = [markerPosition.lat, markerPosition.lon];
          state.hasCenteredOnCurrentLocation = true;
        }
      } else {
        flyMapToDeviceLocationAnimated(markerPosition.lat, markerPosition.lon, markerPosition.heading, true);
      }
      return true;
    }

    function tiltFollowCameraTo(pitchDeg) {
      // Neigt die Kamera (2D <-> 3D) ohne neue GPS-Anforderung. Das native
      // Follow-easeTo übernimmt den Pitch und hält den Standort mittig.
      if (!state.map || !state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng) {
        return;
      }
      state.locatePitchDeg = Number.isFinite(pitchDeg) ? pitchDeg : 0;
      state.autoFollowEnabled = true;
      state.autoFollowResumeArmed = true;
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
      startLocateFollowLoop();
    }

    let locateFollowFrameId = 0;
    let locateFollowLastFrameMs = 0;
    let locateFollowLastRouteDockMs = 0;
    // Geglaettetes Map-Bearing (Wrapper-Domaene): folgt dem gefilterten Heading
    // per kuerzestem Weg mit adaptivem tau. Kein Unwrapped/Long-Path (verursachte
    // 360°-Spins). Bei Filter-Lag waehrend schneller Drehung kurz halten.
    let locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed = null;
    let locateFollowRenderLatLng = null;
    let locateFollowLastCameraWrite = null;
    let locateFollowLastCooldownWriteMs = 0;

    function stepFollowMapBearing(dtMs, frameTimeMs) {
      if (!isHeadingUpBearingControlActive()) {
        return false;
      }
      const eff = state.latestHeadingDegrees;
      if (eff == null || !Number.isFinite(eff)) {
        return false;
      }
      const target = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(-eff);
      if (!Number.isFinite(locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed)) {
        locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(getCurrentMapBearingDegrees());
      }
      if (lastHeadingIncMs && frameTimeMs - lastHeadingIncMs > 600) {
        lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec = 0;
      }
      let delta = shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed, target);
      let step;
      const tauMs = resolveMapRotationTauMs(Math.abs(delta), lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec);
      // Filter hinter schneller Drehung: nicht 360° drehen, sondern langsam in
      // bekannter Drehrichtung weiter bis gefiltertes Heading nachzieht.
      if (lastHeadingTurnSign && Math.abs(delta) > 55 &&
        (delta > 0 ? 1 : -1) !== lastHeadingTurnSign) {
        const rateStep = Math.min(5, Math.max(1, lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec * dtMs / 1000));
        step = lastHeadingTurnSign * rateStep * (1 - Math.exp(-dtMs / tauMs));
      } else {
        if (!lastHeadingTurnSign && lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec < 4 && Math.abs(delta) < 2.5) {
          return false;
        }
        step = delta * (1 - Math.exp(-dtMs / tauMs));
      }
      const maxStepDeg = Math.max(1.5, 360 * dtMs / Math.max(tauMs, 1));
      if (Math.abs(step) > maxStepDeg) {
        step = (step > 0 ? 1 : -1) * maxStepDeg;
      }
      if (Math.abs(step) < LOCATE_FOLLOW_BEARING_EPS_DEG) {
        return false;
      }
      locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed + step);
      return true;
    }

    function locateFollowControlsMap() {
      return state.locateFollowActive &&
        state.autoFollowEnabled &&
        !state.userHasInteractedWithMap &&
        !state.showAllDevicesOnMap &&
        !navigationMapDockControlsMap() &&
        !state.locateZoomInProgress;
    }

    function cancelLocateFollowDock() {
      state.locateFollowActive = false;
      state.locateFollowTargetLatLng = null;
      locateFollowRenderLatLng = null;
      locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed = null;
      locateFollowLastCameraWrite = null;
      locateFollowLastCooldownWriteMs = 0;
      locateFollowLastFrameMs = 0;
      locateFollowLastRouteDockMs = 0;
      lastHeadingTurnSign = 0;
      lastHeadingIncMs = 0;
      lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec = 0;
      if (locateFollowFrameId) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(locateFollowFrameId);
        locateFollowFrameId = 0;
      }
    }

    function setLocateFollowTarget(latLng) {
      // Neues GPS-Ziel an den Follow-Loop uebergeben (einzige Bewegungsquelle).
      if (!Array.isArray(latLng)) {
        return;
      }
      const lat = Number(latLng[0]);
      const lng = Number(latLng[1]);
      if (!Number.isFinite(lat) || !Number.isFinite(lng)) {
        return;
      }
      state.locateFollowTargetLatLng = [lat, lng];
      if (!Array.isArray(locateFollowRenderLatLng)) {
        locateFollowRenderLatLng = [lat, lng];
      }
    }

    function startLocateFollowLoop() {
      // Startet den durchgehenden Kamera-Loop. Render-Position/-Bearing aus dem
      // aktuellen Zustand uebernehmen, damit der Loop ohne Sprung weiterlaeuft.
      state.locateFollowActive = true;
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      let baseLatLng = null;
      if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.getLatLng === 'function') {
        const cur = state.currentMarker.getLatLng();
        if (cur && Number.isFinite(cur.lat) && Number.isFinite(cur.lng)) {
          baseLatLng = [cur.lat, cur.lng];
        }
      }
      if (!baseLatLng && Array.isArray(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng)) {
        baseLatLng = [Number(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0]), Number(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1])];
      }
      if (baseLatLng && Number.isFinite(baseLatLng[0]) && Number.isFinite(baseLatLng[1])) {
        locateFollowRenderLatLng = [baseLatLng[0], baseLatLng[1]];
        if (!Array.isArray(state.locateFollowTargetLatLng)) {
          state.locateFollowTargetLatLng = [baseLatLng[0], baseLatLng[1]];
        }
      }
      if (!Number.isFinite(locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed)) {
        locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(getCurrentMapBearingDegrees());
      }
      locateFollowLastFrameMs = 0;
      locateFollowLastRouteDockMs = 0;
      locateFollowLastCameraWrite = null;
      locateFollowLastCooldownWriteMs = 0;
      if (!locateFollowFrameId && typeof window !== 'undefined' &&
        typeof window.requestAnimationFrame === 'function') {
        locateFollowFrameId = window.requestAnimationFrame(locateFollowFrame);
      }
    }

    function mapTilerCooldownActiveForFollow() {
      return runtimeMapTilerCooldownActive();
    }

    function cameraPixelDeltaFromCenter(lat, lng) {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.getCenter !== 'function' ||
          typeof state.map.latLngToContainerPoint !== 'function') {
        return Infinity;
      }
      try {
        const center = state.map.getCenter();
        const currentPoint = state.map.latLngToContainerPoint([center.lat, center.lng]);
        const targetPoint = state.map.latLngToContainerPoint([lat, lng]);
        const dx = Number(targetPoint.x) - Number(currentPoint.x);
        const dy = Number(targetPoint.y) - Number(currentPoint.y);
        return Number.isFinite(dx) && Number.isFinite(dy) ? Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy) : Infinity;
      } catch (_) {
        return Infinity;
      }
    }

    function locateFollowCameraWriteIsMeaningful(renderLat, renderLng, nextBearing, nextPitch) {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.getCenter !== 'function') return true;
      let center = null;
      try { center = state.map.getCenter(); } catch (_) { center = null; }
      if (!center || !Number.isFinite(center.lat) || !Number.isFinite(center.lng)) return true;
      const centerMeters = haversineKilometers(center.lat, center.lng, renderLat, renderLng) * 1000;
      const pixelDelta = cameraPixelDeltaFromCenter(renderLat, renderLng);
      const currentBearing = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(getCurrentMapBearingDegrees());
      const bearingDelta = Math.abs(shortestSignedBearingDeltaDegrees(currentBearing, nextBearing));
      const currentPitch = typeof state.map.getPitch === 'function' ? state.map.getPitch() : 0;
      const pitchDelta = Math.abs(Number(nextPitch || 0) - Number(currentPitch || 0));
      const currentZoom = typeof state.map.getZoom === 'function' ? Number(state.map.getZoom()) : null;
      const lastZoom = locateFollowLastCameraWrite ? Number(locateFollowLastCameraWrite.zoom) : currentZoom;
      const zoomDelta = Number.isFinite(currentZoom) && Number.isFinite(lastZoom) ? Math.abs(currentZoom - lastZoom) : 0;
      return centerMeters >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_CAMERA_MIN_METERS ||
        pixelDelta >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_CAMERA_MIN_PIXEL_DELTA ||
        bearingDelta >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_BEARING_EPS_DEG ||
        pitchDelta >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_PITCH_EPS_DEG ||
        zoomDelta >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_CAMERA_ZOOM_EPS;
    }

    function locateFollowGoalMovedSignificantly(goalLat, goalLng) {
      if (!locateFollowLastCameraWrite ||
          !Number.isFinite(locateFollowLastCameraWrite.goalLat) ||
          !Number.isFinite(locateFollowLastCameraWrite.goalLng)) {
        return true;
      }
      return haversineKilometers(locateFollowLastCameraWrite.goalLat, locateFollowLastCameraWrite.goalLng, goalLat, goalLng) * 1000 >=
        Math.max(3, LOCATE_FOLLOW_CAMERA_MIN_METERS * 4);
    }

    function shouldThrottleLocateFollowForCooldown(frameTimeMs, goalLat, goalLng) {
      if (!mapTilerCooldownActiveForFollow()) return false;
      if (currentMapViewInsideOfflineCoverageCached()) return false;
      if (locateFollowGoalMovedSignificantly(goalLat, goalLng)) return false;
      if (frameTimeMs - locateFollowLastCooldownWriteMs >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_COOLDOWN_THROTTLE_MS) return false;
      return true;
    }

    function locateFollowFrame(frameTimeMs) {
      locateFollowFrameId = 0;
      if (!locateFollowControlsMap()) {
        locateFollowLastFrameMs = 0;
        return;
      }
      applyLocateFollowCameraFrame(frameTimeMs);
      locateFollowFrameId = window.requestAnimationFrame(locateFollowFrame);
    }

    function applyLocateFollowCameraFrame(frameTimeMs) {
      if (!state.map || typeof state.map.setView !== 'function') {
        return;
      }
      let goalLat = null;
      let goalLng = null;
      if (Array.isArray(state.locateFollowTargetLatLng)) {
        goalLat = Number(state.locateFollowTargetLatLng[0]);
        goalLng = Number(state.locateFollowTargetLatLng[1]);
      }
      if ((!Number.isFinite(goalLat) || !Number.isFinite(goalLng)) && Array.isArray(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng)) {
        goalLat = Number(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[0]);
        goalLng = Number(state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng[1]);
      }
      if (!Number.isFinite(goalLat) || !Number.isFinite(goalLng)) {
        return;
      }
      const dtMs = Math.max(1, Math.min(64, frameTimeMs - (locateFollowLastFrameMs || frameTimeMs)));
      locateFollowLastFrameMs = frameTimeMs;

      // Position exponentiell zum Ziel fuehren (eine durchgehende Bewegung).
      if (!Array.isArray(locateFollowRenderLatLng)) {
        locateFollowRenderLatLng = [goalLat, goalLng];
      }
      const prevLat = locateFollowRenderLatLng[0];
      const prevLng = locateFollowRenderLatLng[1];
      const posFactor = 1 - Math.exp(-dtMs / LOCATE_FOLLOW_POS_SMOOTH_MS);
      let renderLat = prevLat + (goalLat - prevLat) * posFactor;
      let renderLng = prevLng + (goalLng - prevLng) * posFactor;
      if (Math.abs(goalLat - renderLat) < LOCATE_FOLLOW_POS_SNAP_DEG &&
        Math.abs(goalLng - renderLng) < LOCATE_FOLLOW_POS_SNAP_DEG) {
        renderLat = goalLat;
        renderLng = goalLng;
      }
      const positionMoved = Math.abs(renderLat - prevLat) > LOCATE_FOLLOW_POS_SNAP_DEG ||
        Math.abs(renderLng - prevLng) > LOCATE_FOLLOW_POS_SNAP_DEG;
      locateFollowRenderLatLng = [renderLat, renderLng];

      const bearingMoved = stepFollowMapBearing(dtMs, frameTimeMs);
      const nextBearing = wrapHeadingDegreesForMap(
        Number.isFinite(locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed)
          ? locateFollowMapBearingSmoothed
          : getCurrentMapBearingDegrees());

      // Pitch (2D <-> 3D) sanft angleichen.
      const currentPitch = typeof state.map.getPitch === 'function' ? state.map.getPitch() : 0;
      const targetPitch = Number.isFinite(state.locatePitchDeg) ? state.locatePitchDeg : 0;
      const nextPitch = currentPitch + (targetPitch - currentPitch) * (1 - Math.exp(-dtMs / LOCATE_FOLLOW_PITCH_SMOOTH_MS));
      const pitchMoved = Math.abs(targetPitch - currentPitch) > LOCATE_FOLLOW_PITCH_EPS_DEG;

      if (!positionMoved && !bearingMoved && !pitchMoved) {
        return;
      }
      if (!locateFollowCameraWriteIsMeaningful(renderLat, renderLng, nextBearing, nextPitch)) {
        return;
      }
      if (shouldThrottleLocateFollowForCooldown(frameTimeMs, goalLat, goalLng)) {
        return;
      }

      // EIN kombinierter Kameraschreibvorgang (Center + Bearing + Pitch).
      state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = true;
      state.map.setView(L.latLng(renderLat, renderLng), undefined, {
        animate: false,
        pitch: nextPitch,
        bearing: nextBearing
      });
      state.suppressMapInteractionForAutoBearing = false;
      locateFollowLastCameraWrite = {
        lat: renderLat,
        lng: renderLng,
        goalLat: goalLat,
        goalLng: goalLng,
        bearing: nextBearing,
        pitch: nextPitch,
        zoom: typeof state.map.getZoom === 'function' ? Number(state.map.getZoom()) : null,
        at: frameTimeMs
      };
      if (mapTilerCooldownActiveForFollow() && !currentMapViewInsideOfflineCoverageCached()) {
        locateFollowLastCooldownWriteMs = frameTimeMs;
      }

      // Marker exakt an die (gerade gesetzte) Kamera-Mitte kleben -> synchron mit
      // dem GL-Canvas, kein Frame-Versatz/Zittern gegenueber der Karte.
      const center = typeof state.map.getCenter === 'function' ? state.map.getCenter() : null;
      const markerLat = center && Number.isFinite(center.lat) ? center.lat : renderLat;
      const markerLng = center && Number.isFinite(center.lng) ? center.lng : renderLng;
      if (state.currentMarker && typeof state.currentMarker.setLatLng === 'function') {
        state.currentMarker.setLatLng([markerLat, markerLng]);
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker && typeof state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng === 'function') {
        state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng([markerLat, markerLng]);
      }

      if (positionMoved && frameTimeMs - locateFollowLastRouteDockMs >= LOCATE_FOLLOW_ROUTE_DOCK_MIN_MS) {
        locateFollowLastRouteDockMs = frameTimeMs;
        updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(getSelectedDeviceKey(), markerLat, markerLng);
        updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(markerLat, markerLng);
      }
    }

    function bindLocateHardRefreshLongPress(button) {
      // Langer Druck auf den Ortungs-Button -> sehr harter Refresh (frischer,
      // ungecachter GPS-Fix). Auf der Webseite loest dies den Hard-Refresh am
      // Handy aus (siehe requestOwnAppLocation/Server-Kommando). Kurzer Druck
      // bleibt der normale Klick (zentrieren/folgen).
      if (!button || button.__locateLongPressBound) {
        return;
      }
      button.__locateLongPressBound = true;
      let pressTimer = null;
      let longFired = false;
      const startPress = function () {
        longFired = false;
        clearTimeout(pressTimer);
        pressTimer = setTimeout(function () {
          longFired = true;
          centerOnCurrentLocation({ hardRefresh: true }).catch(function (error) {
            console.warn('Standort Hard-Refresh:', error);
          });
        }, LOCATE_LONG_PRESS_MS);
      };
      const cancelPress = function () { clearTimeout(pressTimer); pressTimer = null; };
      button.addEventListener('pointerdown', startPress);
      button.addEventListener('pointerup', cancelPress);
      button.addEventListener('pointerleave', cancelPress);
      button.addEventListener('pointercancel', cancelPress);
      // Den auf den Long-Press folgenden Klick unterdruecken (sonst doppelte Ortung).
      button.addEventListener('click', function (clickEvent) {
        if (longFired) {
          clickEvent.preventDefault();
          clickEvent.stopImmediatePropagation();
          longFired = false;
        }
      }, true);
    }

    async function centerOnCurrentLocation(triggerOptions) {
      const locateToggleButton = byId('locateToggleBtn');
      // Hard-Refresh wird ausschliesslich per Lang-Druck ausgeloest. Ein normaler
      // Klick darf nie einen Hard-Refresh anfordern und das Symbol bei Lang-Druck
      // nicht markieren.
      const fromLongPress = !!(triggerOptions && triggerOptions.hardRefresh);
      const hardRefresh = fromLongPress;
      const markButtonActive = function () {
        if (fromLongPress || !locateToggleButton) return;
        locateToggleButton.classList.add('active');
      };
      // Klick waehrend laufender Ortung -> 3D als Ziel merken (kein Neigen auf eine
      // evtl. veraltete Position). Die laufende Zentrierung landet so in 3D auf dem
      // echten Standort; nach dem Zoom uebernimmt der Follow-Loop das Andocken.
      if (state.locateRequestInFlight) {
        state.locatePitchActive = true;
        state.locatePitchDeg = MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG;
        return;
      }
      // Folgt die Karte bereits, schaltet ein bewusster Folgeklick zwischen 2D und
      // 3D um (ohne neue GPS-Anforderung) -> spart Daten, keine Konflikte.
      const alreadyFollowing = !state.showAllDevicesOnMap &&
        state.autoFollowEnabled && state.autoFollowResumeArmed &&
        !state.userHasInteractedWithMap;
      if (alreadyFollowing && !hardRefresh && state.lastKnownCurrentLatLng) {
        state.locatePitchActive = !state.locatePitchActive;
        state.locatePitchDeg = state.locatePitchActive ? MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG : 0;
        tiltFollowCameraTo(state.locatePitchDeg);
        markButtonActive();
        if (locateToggleButton && !fromLongPress) {
          setTimeout(function () { locateToggleButton.classList.remove('active'); }, LOCATE_BUTTON_ACTIVE_MS);
        }
        return;
      }
      // Frischer Klick -> 2D (flach). Die Drehung wird sanft im Zoom uebernommen.
      // Ein Lang-Druck behaelt den aktuellen 2D/3D-Modus bei.
      if (!fromLongPress) {
        state.locatePitchActive = false;
        state.locatePitchDeg = 0;
      } else {
        state.locatePitchDeg = state.locatePitchActive ? MAP_DRIVE_VIEW_PITCH_DEG : 0;
      }
      markButtonActive();
      stopManualLocateCameraMotion();
      state.userHasInteractedWithMap = false;
      state.lastLocateClickMs = Date.now();
      state.locateRequestInFlight = true;
      const nativeLocateKey = isNativeAppContext() ? getNativePhoneDeviceKey() : '';
      // Nur als Default auf das eigene Handy zentrieren. Hat der Nutzer in der
      // Geraeteliste bewusst ein anderes Geraet gewaehlt, bleibt dieses ausgewaehlt
      // und wird zentriert/verfolgt (nicht zwangsweise auf das eigene Handy zurueck).
      if (nativeLocateKey && !state.userSelectedDeviceKey) {
        enforceSelectedDeviceKey(nativeLocateKey);
        state.selectedDeviceKey = nativeLocateKey;
      }
      const startedFromAllMode = state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
      showLocateLoadingBadge('Standort wird angefordert...');
      try {
        const selectedTarget = getSelectedDeviceTarget();
        const selectedDeviceKey = getSelectedDeviceKey();
        if (!state.showAllDevicesOnMap && !selectedTarget && !selectedDeviceKey) {
          throw new Error('Kein ausgewaehltes Geraet verfuegbar.');
        }
        const requestSingleDevice = !!selectedDeviceKey || !state.showAllDevicesOnMap;
        const requestTarget = requestSingleDevice ? selectedTarget : null;
        const nativeSelectedDevice = requestSingleDevice && selectedDeviceKey &&
          isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey);
        const selectedStateRecord = requestSingleDevice && state.selectedDeviceKey && state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
          ? state.devicesByKey[state.selectedDeviceKey]
          : null;
        const selectedStateHasCoordinates = !!(selectedStateRecord &&
          typeof selectedStateRecord.lat === 'number' &&
          typeof selectedStateRecord.lon === 'number');
        const selectedResolvedLatLng = requestSingleDevice && selectedDeviceKey
          ? resolveMarkerLatLngForDevice(selectedDeviceKey)
          : null;
        const selectedResolvedRecord = selectedResolvedLatLng
          ? Object.assign({}, selectedStateRecord || {}, {
            user: (selectedStateRecord && selectedStateRecord.user) || (selectedTarget && selectedTarget.user),
            device: (selectedStateRecord && selectedStateRecord.device) || (selectedTarget && selectedTarget.device),
            key: selectedDeviceKey,
            lat: selectedResolvedLatLng[0],
            lon: selectedResolvedLatLng[1]
          })
          : null;
        const nativeLocalRecord = nativeSelectedDevice ? getLastNativeBridgePositionEntry() : null;
        const priorRecord = requestSingleDevice
          ? (nativeLocalRecord || (selectedStateHasCoordinates
            ? selectedStateRecord
            : (selectedResolvedRecord || (nativeSelectedDevice ? null : await fetchDevicePositionRecord(selectedTarget)))))
          : await fetchLastPositionRecord();
        const hasPriorCoordinates = !!(
          priorRecord &&
          typeof priorRecord.lat === 'number' &&
          typeof priorRecord.lon === 'number'
        );
        const shouldRequestOwnApp = requestSingleDevice &&
          !positionEntryIsOwntracksDevice(priorRecord) &&
          selectedDeviceKey &&
          ((isNativeAppContext() && isNativePhoneDeviceKey(selectedDeviceKey)) ||
            (!isNativeAppContext() && positionEntryIsOwnAppDevice(priorRecord)));

        if (!shouldRequestOwnApp) {
          if (!hasPriorCoordinates) {
            throw new Error('Fuer dieses Geraet ist noch kein Standort bekannt.');
          }
          const markerPosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(priorRecord) || priorRecord;
          focusSelectedDeviceAfterValidLocate(selectedDeviceKey, startedFromAllMode);
          const centerDone = waitForMapMoveEnd(1800);
          if (!centerMapOnPositionEntryNow(markerPosition, selectedDeviceKey)) {
            throw new Error('Fuer dieses Geraet ist noch kein gueltiger Standort bekannt.');
          }
          await centerDone;
          restoreLocateFollowAfterValidCenter(markerPosition);
          return;
        }

        const priorReceivedAt = lastPositionReceivedAtMillis(priorRecord);
        let currentPosition = null;
        let locatePublishError = null;
        let centeredFallbackPosition = null;
        showLocateLoadingBadge('Aktuellen App-Standort lade...');
        if (hasPriorCoordinates) {
          focusSelectedDeviceAfterValidLocate(selectedDeviceKey, startedFromAllMode);
          const priorMarkerPosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(priorRecord) || priorRecord;
          if (centerMapOnPositionEntryNow(priorMarkerPosition, selectedDeviceKey)) {
            centeredFallbackPosition = priorMarkerPosition;
          }
        }
        try {
          const requestResult = await requestOwnAppLocation(requestTarget, {
            hardRefresh: hardRefresh,
            firstFix: !hasPriorCoordinates
          });
          const localPoint = requestResult && requestResult.data ? requestResult.data.point : null;
          if (localPoint) {
            currentPosition = bridgePointToPositionEntry(localPoint);
          }
        } catch (requestError) {
          locatePublishError = requestError;
          console.warn('App Standort-Anforderung:', requestError);
        }
        if (!currentPosition && !locatePublishError && !nativeSelectedDevice) {
          currentPosition = await waitForLastPositionNewerThan(priorReceivedAt, {
            maxWaitMs: LOCATION_REQUEST_BUTTON_MAX_WAIT_MS,
            deviceTarget: requestSingleDevice ? selectedTarget : null
          });
        }
        if (!currentPosition) {
          const deviceLabel = getHumanDeviceLabel(selectedDeviceKey, selectedTarget);
          const failureMessage = locatePublishError && locatePublishError.message
            ? 'Geraet ' + deviceLabel + ': Standortanforderung fehlgeschlagen - ' + locatePublishError.message
            : 'Geraet ' + deviceLabel + ': kein frischer App-Standort empfangen.';
          if (requestSingleDevice && selectedDeviceKey) {
            applyDeviceConnectionFailure(selectedDeviceKey, failureMessage);
          } else {
            applyDeviceConnectionFailure('__default__', failureMessage);
          }
          if (!nativeSelectedDevice) triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
          if (!hasPriorCoordinates) {
            throw new Error(failureMessage);
          }
          if (centeredFallbackPosition) {
            restoreLocateFollowAfterValidCenter(centeredFallbackPosition);
          }
          return;
        }
        if (requestSingleDevice && selectedDeviceKey) {
          clearDeviceConnectionFailure(selectedDeviceKey);
        } else {
          clearDeviceConnectionFailure('__default__');
          if (selectedDeviceKey) {
            clearDeviceConnectionFailure(selectedDeviceKey);
          }
        }
        if (!nativeSelectedDevice) triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        const markerPosition = preparePositionEntryForMapDisplay(currentPosition) || currentPosition;
        focusSelectedDeviceAfterValidLocate(selectedDeviceKey, startedFromAllMode);
        // Ist der frische Fix nahe der bereits angeflogenen Fallback-Position, nur
        // sanft nachziehen -> der Fallback-Flug bleibt die eine sichtbare Bewegung.
        const softEase = !!centeredFallbackPosition &&
          haversineKilometers(
            centeredFallbackPosition.lat,
            centeredFallbackPosition.lon,
            markerPosition.lat,
            markerPosition.lon
          ) * 1000 <= LOCATE_REFRESH_SOFT_EASE_MAX_METERS;
        const finalCenterDone = waitForMapMoveEnd(1800);
        if (!centerMapOnPositionEntryNow(markerPosition, selectedDeviceKey, softEase)) {
          throw new Error('Der lokale GPS-Fix enthaelt keine gueltige Kartenposition.');
        }
        await finalCenterDone;
        restoreLocateFollowAfterValidCenter(markerPosition);
      } finally {
        // Zoom-Schutz auf jeden Fall wieder loesen (auch bei Fehler/Abbruch).
        state.locateZoomInProgress = false;
        state.locateRequestInFlight = false;
        hideLocateLoadingBadge();
        if (locateToggleButton) {
          setTimeout(function () { locateToggleButton.classList.remove('active'); }, LOCATE_BUTTON_ACTIVE_MS);
        }
      }
    }

    function getLiveTrackingWebSocketUrl() {
      if (window.MOBILE_LOCAL_ASSETS && window.__mobileServerAvailable !== true) return '';
      const baseUrl = currentServerBaseUrl();
      if (!baseUrl) return '';
      try {
        const parsed = new URL(baseUrl);
        const websocketProtocol = parsed.protocol === 'https:' ? 'wss:' : 'ws:';
        return websocketProtocol + '//' + parsed.host + LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH;
      } catch (_) {
        return '';
      }
    }

    function parseLiveTrackingSocketMessage(socketEvent) {
      const raw = socketEvent ? socketEvent.data : null;
      if (!raw) return null;
      if (typeof raw === 'object') return raw;
      if (typeof raw !== 'string') return null;
      try {
        return JSON.parse(raw);
      } catch (parseError) {
        return null;
      }
    }

    function handleMobileLocationRequestMessage(message) {
      const action = String(message && message.action || '').trim();
      const isLocationRequest = action === 'requestLocation' || action === 'request_location_update';
      const isSavedItemsSync = action === 'sync_saved_items' || action === 'syncSavedItems';
      if (!message || (!isLocationRequest && !isSavedItemsSync) ||
          (message.type !== 'mobile:request-location' && message.type !== 'mobile:command')) {
        return false;
      }
      const targetKey = String(message.deviceKey || '').trim();
      if (!targetKey || !isNativeAppContext() || !isNativePhoneDeviceKey(targetKey)) {
        return true;
      }
      if (isSavedItemsSync) {
        syncLocalSavedItemsAndRefresh().catch(function (error) {
          console.warn('Orte/Routen-Sync-Kommando:', error);
        });
        return true;
      }
      const bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || typeof bridge.requestLocationNow !== 'function') {
        return true;
      }
      if (typeof bridge.getLastLocalPoint === 'function') {
        const cachedPoint = bridge.getLastLocalPoint();
        if (cachedPoint) applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(cachedPoint);
      }
      const hardRefresh = !!(message && message.hardRefresh);
      const locatePromise = hardRefresh && typeof bridge.requestLocationBurst === 'function'
        ? bridge.requestLocationBurst({ tracking: state.trackingEnabled, localOnly: true, samples: 16, maxMs: 8000, firstFix: true, hardRefresh: true })
        : bridge.requestLocationNow({ tracking: state.trackingEnabled });
      locatePromise
        .then(function (point) {
          if (point) applyNativeLocalGpsPoint(point);
        })
        .catch(function (error) {
          console.warn('App Standort-Kommando:', error);
        });
      return true;
    }

    function scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect() {
      if (state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp) {
        return;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer) {
        return;
      }
      var cooldownRemainingMs = Math.max(0, Number(serverCooldownState().cooldownUntil || 0) - Date.now());
      if (cooldownRemainingMs > 0) serverCooldownBlock(LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH);
      const reconnectDelayMs = Math.max(state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs, cooldownRemainingMs);
      state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs = Math.min(
        LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_MAX_MS,
        state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs * 2
      );
      state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = setTimeout(function () {
        state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = null;
        connectLiveTrackingSocket();
      }, reconnectDelayMs);
    }

    function connectLiveTrackingSocket() {
      if (state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp || !('WebSocket' in window)) {
        return;
      }
      if (serverCooldownIsCooling()) {
        serverCooldownBlock(LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH);
        return;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingSocket &&
          (state.liveTrackingSocket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN ||
           state.liveTrackingSocket.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING)) {
        return;
      }
      let newSocket;
      try {
        const socketUrl = getLiveTrackingWebSocketUrl();
        if (!socketUrl) return;
        newSocket = new WebSocket(socketUrl);
      } catch (socketCreateError) {
        scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect();
        return;
      }
      state.liveTrackingSocket = newSocket;
      newSocket.addEventListener('open', function () {
        state.liveTrackingReconnectDelayMs = LIVE_TRACKING_RECONNECT_INITIAL_MS;
        serverCooldownClear();
      });
      newSocket.addEventListener('message', function (socketEvent) {
        if (handleMobileLocationRequestMessage(parseLiveTrackingSocketMessage(socketEvent))) {
          return;
        }
        wakeLocationRequestWaitIfAny();
        triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
      });
      newSocket.addEventListener('close', function () {
        if (state.liveTrackingSocket === newSocket) {
          state.liveTrackingSocket = null;
        }
        if (!state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp) serverCooldownStart('websocket', LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH);
        scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect();
      });
      newSocket.addEventListener('error', function () {
        serverCooldownStart('websocket', LIVE_TRACKING_WS_PATH);
        if (newSocket.readyState === WebSocket.OPEN || newSocket.readyState === WebSocket.CONNECTING) {
          newSocket.close();
        } else {
          scheduleLiveTrackingReconnect();
        }
      });
    }

    function startLiveTrackingChannel() {
      state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp = false;
      connectLiveTrackingSocket();
    }

    function triggerLiveTrackingUpdate() {
      if (serverCooldownShouldBlockManagedPath('/api/last-position')) {
        state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = false;
        return;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingUpdateInFlight) {
        state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = true;
        return;
      }
      state.liveTrackingUpdateInFlight = true;
      loadTracking()
        .catch(function (loadError) {
          console.error('Fehler bei Live-Tracking-Aktualisierung:', loadError);
        })
        .finally(function () {
          state.liveTrackingUpdateInFlight = false;
          if (state.liveTrackingUpdatePending) {
            state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = false;
            triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
          }
        });
    }

    function normalizeHeadingDegrees(rawHeadingValue) {
      if (rawHeadingValue === null || rawHeadingValue === undefined || rawHeadingValue === '') {
        return null;
      }
      const numericHeading = typeof rawHeadingValue === 'number' ? rawHeadingValue : Number(rawHeadingValue);
      if (!Number.isFinite(numericHeading)) {
        return null;
      }
      return ((numericHeading % 360) + 360) % 360;
    }

    function removeCurrentPositionMarkers() {
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
        state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
      }
      if (state.currentMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentMarker);
        state.currentMarker = null;
      }
      state.latestHeadingDegrees = null;
      state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey = {};
      try {
        localStorage.removeItem(LAST_HEADING_BY_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY);
      } catch (storageClearError) {
        console.warn('Konnte gespeicherte Karten-Richtungen nicht löschen:', storageClearError);
      }
      clearAllDeviceMarkers();
    }

    function persistLastHeadingsToStorage() {
      if (persistHeadingsTimer) return;
      persistHeadingsTimer = setTimeout(function () {
        persistHeadingsTimer = 0;
        try {
          localStorage.setItem(
            LAST_HEADING_BY_DEVICE_STORAGE_KEY,
            JSON.stringify(state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey)
          );
        } catch (storageWriteError) {
          console.warn('Konnte Karten-Richtungen nicht speichern:', storageWriteError);
        }
      }, 400);
    }

    function rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(deviceKey, normalizedHeading, headingMeta) {
      if (!deviceKey || normalizedHeading === null) {
        return;
      }
      const meta = headingMeta && typeof headingMeta === 'object' ? headingMeta : {};
      if (meta.source) state.lastHeadingSourceByDeviceKey[deviceKey] = String(meta.source);
      if (meta.mode) state.lastHeadingModeByDeviceKey[deviceKey] = String(meta.mode);
      const previous = typeof state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey] === 'number'
        ? state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey]
        : null;
      if (previous !== null) {
        const delta = ((normalizedHeading - previous + 540) % 360) - 180;
        if (Math.abs(delta) >= 3) {
          lastHeadingTurnSign = delta > 0 ? 1 : -1;
          const nowMs = (typeof performance !== 'undefined' && typeof performance.now === 'function')
            ? performance.now() : Date.now();
          if (lastHeadingIncMs) {
            lastHeadingTurnRateDegPerSec = Math.abs(delta) / Math.max(1, nowMs - lastHeadingIncMs) * 1000;
          }
          lastHeadingIncMs = nowMs;
        }
        const absDelta = Math.abs(delta);
        const mapFilter = getMapHeadingFilterLimits();
        const driveMovement = meta.mode === 'drive' && (meta.source === 'movement' || meta.source === 'gps');
        let spikeRejectDeg = mapFilter.spikeRejectDeg;
        let smoothAlphaDeg = mapFilter.smoothAlphaDeg;
        if (driveMovement) {
          spikeRejectDeg = 181;
          smoothAlphaDeg = Math.min(0.62, Math.max(smoothAlphaDeg, absDelta > 35 ? 0.48 : 0.36));
        }
        let step;
        if (absDelta > spikeRejectDeg) {
          const clampStepDeg = Math.max(28, spikeRejectDeg * 0.85);
          step = (delta < 0 ? -1 : 1) * Math.min(absDelta, clampStepDeg);
        } else {
          const smoothAlpha = driveMovement
            ? smoothAlphaDeg
            : (absDelta > mapFilter.largeJumpSoftDeg
            ? Math.max(0.08, smoothAlphaDeg * 0.65)
            : smoothAlphaDeg);
          step = delta * smoothAlpha;
        }
        normalizedHeading = (previous + step + 360) % 360;
      }
      state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey] = normalizedHeading;
      persistLastHeadingsToStorage();
    }

    function effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(deviceKey, normalizedHeading) {
      if (deviceKey && typeof state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey] === 'number') {
        return state.lastHeadingDegreesByDeviceKey[deviceKey];
      }
      return normalizedHeading !== null ? normalizedHeading : null;
    }

    function updateHeadingVisualization(positionEntry, currentLatLng) {
      if (!state.map) {
        return;
      }
      const dk = getSelectedDeviceKey() || (positionEntry && positionEntry.key) || '';
      const headingMeta = {
        source: positionEntry && positionEntry.headingSource ? String(positionEntry.headingSource) : null,
        mode: positionEntry && positionEntry.headingMode ? String(positionEntry.headingMode) : null
      };
      let nh = normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionEntry && positionEntry.heading);
      let eff;
      if (nh !== null) {
        rememberHeadingForDeviceKey(dk, nh, headingMeta);
      }
      eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(dk, nh);
      if (eff != null) {
        state.latestHeadingDegrees = eff;
        refreshMapRotationAutoFieldIfOpen();
      }

      try {
        if (eff === null) {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          if (state.currentMarker) {
            updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.currentMarker, dk, null);
          }
          if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && dk && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk] &&
            typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon === 'function') {
            updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk], dk, null, dk === getSelectedDeviceKey());
          }
          return;
        }

        if (state.currentMarker) {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.currentMarker, dk, eff);
          return;
        }

        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap && dk && state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk] &&
          typeof state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk].setIcon === 'function') {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
            state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
          }
          updateCurrentPositionIcon(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[dk], dk, eff, dk === getSelectedDeviceKey());
          return;
        }
        if (state.showAllDevicesOnMap) return;

        const hi = createCurrentPositionIcon(dk, eff);
        if (!state.currentHeadingMarker) {
          state.currentHeadingMarker = L.marker(currentLatLng, {
            icon: hi,
            interactive: false,
            keyboard: false,
            zIndexOffset: 2500,
            rotateWithView: facingMarkerRotateWithViewOption(),
            rotation: 0
          }).addTo(state.map);
        } else {
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng(currentLatLng);
          state.currentHeadingMarker.setIcon(hi);
        }
      } finally {
        syncMapBearingFromHeading(eff);
        if (!state.locateFollowActive) {
          performBearingSyncNow();
        }
      }
    }

    function resolveMarkerMoveDurationMs(pointTimestamp, fallbackDurationMs, motionState, updateTimeKey, nativeLiveMove) {
      const durationMs = resolveSmoothMarkerMoveDurationMs(
        pointTimestamp,
        fallbackDurationMs,
        motionState,
        updateTimeKey
      );
      if (!nativeLiveMove) {
        return durationMs;
      }
      return Math.max(
        MARKER_MOVE_NATIVE_MIN_DURATION_MS,
        Math.min(MARKER_MOVE_NATIVE_MAX_DURATION_MS, Math.round(durationMs * 0.55))
      );
    }

    function animateMapDeviceMarkerTo(marker, nextLatLng, pointTimestamp, animationState, animationFrameKey, onFrame, nativeLiveMove) {
      if (!marker || !nextLatLng) {
        return;
      }
      const previousLatLng = typeof marker.getLatLng === 'function' ? marker.getLatLng() : null;
      if (previousLatLng && Number.isFinite(previousLatLng.lat) && Number.isFinite(previousLatLng.lng)) {
        const stepMeters = haversineKilometers(
          previousLatLng.lat,
          previousLatLng.lng,
          nextLatLng[0],
          nextLatLng[1]
        ) * 1000;
        if (stepMeters < MARKER_MOVE_SKIP_DISTANCE_M) {
          marker.setLatLng(nextLatLng);
          if (typeof onFrame === 'function') {
            onFrame(nextLatLng[0], nextLatLng[1]);
          }
          return;
        }
      }
      const motionState = animationState || marker;
      const frameKey = animationFrameKey || '_moveAnimationFrame';
      const motionTimeKey = frameKey === 'currentMarkerAnimationFrame'
        ? 'markerMotionLastUpdateAtMs'
        : '_markerMotionLastUpdateAtMs';
      animateMarkerLatLng(
        marker,
        nextLatLng,
        resolveMarkerMoveDurationMs(
          pointTimestamp,
          MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS,
          motionState,
          motionTimeKey,
          nativeLiveMove
        ),
        motionState,
        frameKey,
        onFrame
      );
    }

    function animateMarkerLatLng(marker, nextLatLng, durationMs, animationState, animationFrameKey, onFrame) {
      if (!marker) return;
      const previousLatLng = marker.getLatLng();
      if (!previousLatLng) {
        marker.setLatLng(nextLatLng);
        return;
      }

      if (animationState && animationState[animationFrameKey]) cancelAnimationFrame(animationState[animationFrameKey]);
      const targetLat = nextLatLng[0];
      const targetLng = nextLatLng[1];
      const startLat = previousLatLng.lat;
      const startLng = previousLatLng.lng;
      const animationDurationMs = typeof durationMs === 'number' && Number.isFinite(durationMs) && durationMs > 0
        ? durationMs
        : MARKER_MOVE_MIN_DURATION_MS;
      const animationStartMs = performance.now();

      function stepMarkerAnimation(frameTimeMs) {
        const elapsedMs = frameTimeMs - animationStartMs;
        const progress = Math.max(0, Math.min(1, elapsedMs / animationDurationMs));
        const easedProgress = progress;
        const interpolatedLat = startLat + (targetLat - startLat) * easedProgress;
        const interpolatedLng = startLng + (targetLng - startLng) * easedProgress;
        marker.setLatLng([interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng]);
        if (typeof onFrame === 'function') onFrame(interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng);
        if (animationState) animationState[animationFrameKey] = progress < 1 ? requestAnimationFrame(stepMarkerAnimation) : null;
      }

      if (animationState) animationState[animationFrameKey] = requestAnimationFrame(stepMarkerAnimation);
    }

    function resolveLocalLiveMotionTargetLatLng(nextLatLng, pointTimestamp, nativeLiveMove, positionEntry) {
      if (!nativeLiveMove || !Array.isArray(nextLatLng) || !positionEntry) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const speedKmh = Number(positionEntry.speed);
      if (!Number.isFinite(speedKmh) || speedKmh < LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_MIN_SPEED_KMH) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      let heading = normalizeHeadingDegrees(positionEntry.heading);
      if (heading === null) {
        heading = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees);
      }
      if (heading === null) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const timestampMs = Number(pointTimestamp || positionEntry.timestamp);
      const ageMs = Number.isFinite(timestampMs) && timestampMs > 0
        ? Math.max(0, Date.now() - timestampMs)
        : 0;
      if (ageMs > LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_STALE_MAX_MS) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const leadMs = Math.min(LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_STALE_MAX_MS, ageMs + LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_MS);
      const lookAheadMeters = Math.min(
        LOCAL_LIVE_LOOKAHEAD_MAX_METERS,
