        Math.max(0, speedKmh / 3.6 * (leadMs / 1000))
      );
      if (lookAheadMeters < 0.25) {
        return nextLatLng;
      }
      const ahead = latLngAheadByBearing(nextLatLng[0], nextLatLng[1], heading, lookAheadMeters);
      return ahead && coordinatesArePlausibleForMap(ahead.lat, ahead.lon)
        ? [ahead.lat, ahead.lon]
        : nextLatLng;
    }

    function animateCurrentMarkerTo(nextLatLng, pointTimestamp, nativeLiveMove, positionEntry) {
      if (!state.currentMarker) return;
      if (navigationMapDockControlsMap() && state.autoFollowEnabled) {
        animateNavigationMapDockFollow(
          nextLatLng[0],
          nextLatLng[1],
          state.map.getZoom(),
          false,
          pointTimestamp
        );
        return;
      }
      // Beim mittigen Andocken besitzt der Follow-Loop die Bewegung: er zieht
      // Marker UND Kamera in EINER geglaetteten Bewegung zum Ziel. Hier wird
      // daher KEINE zweite Marker-Animation gestartet (sonst zwei Quellen ->
      // Frame-Versatz, Ruckeln, haengende Drehung). Nur das Ziel uebergeben.
      if (locateFollowControlsMap()) {
        setLocateFollowTarget(resolveLocalLiveMotionTargetLatLng(
          nextLatLng,
          pointTimestamp,
          nativeLiveMove,
          positionEntry
        ));
        return;
      }
      animateMapDeviceMarkerTo(
        state.currentMarker,
        nextLatLng,
        pointTimestamp,
        state,
        'currentMarkerAnimationFrame',
        function (interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng) {
          if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
            state.currentHeadingMarker.setLatLng([interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng]);
          }
          updateLatestTrackingRouteTailVisualToLatLng(getSelectedDeviceKey(), interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng);
          updateNavigationRouteRemainingForLatLng(interpolatedLat, interpolatedLng);
        },
        !!nativeLiveMove
      );
    }

    function stopLiveTrackingChannel() {
      state.liveTrackingSocketClosedByApp = true;
      clearAutoFollowResumeTimer();
      if (state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer) {
        clearTimeout(state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer);
        state.liveTrackingReconnectTimer = null;
      }
      if (state.liveTrackingSocket) {
        try {
          state.liveTrackingSocket.close();
        } catch (socketCloseError) {
          console.error('Fehler beim Schließen des Live-Tracking-Sockets:', socketCloseError);
        } finally {
          state.liveTrackingSocket = null;
        }
      }
      state.liveTrackingUpdatePending = false;
      if (state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame) {
        cancelAnimationFrame(state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame);
        state.currentMarkerAnimationFrame = null;
      }
      clearNavigationDockFollowAnimation();
      if (state.currentHeadingMarker) {
        state.map.removeLayer(state.currentHeadingMarker);
        state.currentHeadingMarker = null;
      }
    }

    function isCapacitorNativeApp() {
      if (typeof window.__isCapacitorNative === 'function') return window.__isCapacitorNative();
      var cap = window.Capacitor;
      if (!cap) return false;
      if (typeof cap.isNativePlatform === 'function' && cap.isNativePlatform()) return true;
      if (typeof cap.getPlatform === 'function') {
        var platform = String(cap.getPlatform() || '').toLowerCase();
        return platform === 'android' || platform === 'ios';
      }
      return false;
    }

    function isNativeAppContext() {
      return isCapacitorNativeApp() || document.documentElement.classList.contains('native-app');
    }

    var nativeProfileUiBound = false;
    var nativeManualRefreshInFlight = false;
    var toolbarPullStart = null;

    function syncToolbarButtonIcons() {
      var panelButton = byId('panelToggleBtn');
      var profileButton = byId('nativeProfileBtn');
      if (panelButton) panelButton.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true"><path d="M12 12c2.76 0 5-2.24 5-5s-2.24-5-5-5-5 2.24-5 5 2.24 5 5 5zm0 2c-3.33 0-10 1.67-10 5v2h20v-2c0-3.33-6.67-5-10-5z"/></svg>';
      if (profileButton) profileButton.innerHTML = '<svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" aria-hidden="true" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round"><path d="M4 7h10"/><path d="M18 7h2"/><circle cx="16" cy="7" r="2"/><path d="M4 17h2"/><path d="M10 17h10"/><circle cx="8" cy="17" r="2"/></svg>';
    }

    function setMapToolbarCollapsed(collapsed) {
      document.documentElement.classList.toggle('map-toolbar-collapsed', !!collapsed);
      var button = byId('mapToolbarCollapseBtn');
      if (button) button.textContent = collapsed ? '>' : '<';
      if (collapsed) {
        closeAuxiliaryDialogsForNavigationStart();
      } else {
        updateDialogLayout();
      }
    }

    async function refreshNativeMobileAppOnce() {
      if (nativeManualRefreshInFlight) return;
      nativeManualRefreshInFlight = true;
      showLocateLoadingBadge('Aktualisiere…');
      try {
        var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
        if (bridge && bridge.refreshNow) await bridge.refreshNow();
        await Promise.all([
          syncTrackingStateFromServer().catch(function () {}),
          loadTracking().catch(function () {}),
          loadSavedPlaces().catch(function () {}),
          loadSavedRoutes().catch(function () {})
        ]);
        triggerLiveTrackingUpdate();
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      } finally {
        setTimeout(hideLocateLoadingBadge, 500);
        nativeManualRefreshInFlight = false;
      }
    }

    function initToolbarPullRefresh() {
      if (window.__mapToolbarPullRefreshBound) return;
      window.__mapToolbarPullRefreshBound = true;
      window.addEventListener('touchstart', function (event) {
        if (!isNativeAppContext() || !event.touches || event.touches.length !== 1) return;
        var target = event.target;
        if (target && target.closest && target.closest('.native-profile-sheet,#placeBottomSheet,#cameraFloatingPanel,.search-panel,.panel')) return;
        var touch = event.touches[0];
        if (touch.clientY > measureMapUiToolbarBottomPx() + 12) return;
        toolbarPullStart = { x: touch.clientX, y: touch.clientY };
      }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchmove', function (event) {
        if (!toolbarPullStart || !event.touches || event.touches.length !== 1) return;
        var touch = event.touches[0], dy = touch.clientY - toolbarPullStart.y, dx = Math.abs(touch.clientX - toolbarPullStart.x);
        if (dy > 72 && dx < 56) {
          toolbarPullStart = null;
          refreshNativeMobileAppOnce().catch(function (error) {
            handleAsyncActionError(error, 'Fehler beim Aktualisieren:', 'Aktualisieren fehlgeschlagen.');
          });
        }
      }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchend', function () { toolbarPullStart = null; }, { passive: true });
      window.addEventListener('touchcancel', function () { toolbarPullStart = null; }, { passive: true });
    }

    function closeAuxiliaryDialogsForNavigationStart() {
      ['settingsPanel', 'owntracksPanel', 'searchPanel', 'placesLegend'].forEach(function (id) {
        var element = byId(id);
        if (element) element.classList.remove('open');
      });
      var controlPanel = byId('controlPanel');
      if (controlPanel) controlPanel.classList.add('hidden');
      var cameraPanel = byId('cameraFloatingPanel');
      if (cameraPanel) cameraPanel.classList.remove('open');
      var cameraButton = byId('cameraToggleBtn');
      if (cameraButton) cameraButton.classList.remove('active');
      closeNativeProfileSheet();
      hideRouteSuggestions();
      updateDialogLayout();
    }

    function initNativeAppChrome() {
      if (!isNativeAppContext()) return;
      syncToolbarButtonIcons();
      initToolbarPullRefresh();
      var cap = window.Capacitor;
      var statusBar = cap && cap.Plugins && cap.Plugins.StatusBar;
      if (statusBar) {
        Promise.resolve()
          .then(function () { return statusBar.setOverlaysWebView({ overlay: true }); })
          .then(function () { return statusBar.setBackgroundColor({ color: '#00000000' }); })
          .then(function () { return statusBar.setStyle({ style: 'LIGHT' }); })
          .catch(function () {});
      }
    }

    window.__getLeafletMap = function () {
      return state.map || null;
    };
    window.__getMapLibreNativeMap = function () {
      return (state.map && state.map._native) || null;
    };
    window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleId = function () {
      return state.currentBaseMapStyle || null;
    };
    window.__getCurrentBaseMapStyleConfig = function () {
      const config = BASE_MAP_STYLES[state.currentBaseMapStyle] || BASE_MAP_STYLES[DEFAULT_BASE_MAP_STYLE_ID];
      return config ? Object.assign({}, config) : null;
    };
    window.__listBaseMapStyles = function () {
      return BASE_MAP_STYLE_ORDER.map(function (styleId) {
        const cfg = BASE_MAP_STYLES[styleId];
        return cfg ? { id: cfg.id, label: cfg.label, mapId: cfg.mapId } : null;
      }).filter(Boolean);
    };

    window.__capacitorSelectDevice = function (deviceKey, options) {
      options = options || {};
      if (!deviceKey) return;
      var registerOnly = !!options.registerOnly;
      var force = !!options.force;
      if (state.orderedDeviceKeys.indexOf(deviceKey) < 0) {
        state.orderedDeviceKeys.push(deviceKey);
      }
      state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] = state.devicesByKey[deviceKey] || {
        user: deviceKey.split('/')[0] || 'mobile',
        device: deviceKey.split('/').slice(1).join('/') || 'phone',
        key: deviceKey,
        lat: null,
        lon: null
      };
      if (!state.selectedDeviceKey || (force && !state.userSelectedDeviceKey)) {
        state.selectedDeviceKey = deviceKey;
        if (isNativePhoneDeviceKey(deviceKey)) {
          state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
        }
      }
      syncOrderedDeviceKeysFromKnownDevices();
      if (registerOnly) {
        updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
        updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
        syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
        return;
      }
      if (state.userSelectedDeviceKey && !force) {
        return;
      }
      state.selectedDeviceKey = deviceKey;
      updateDeviceSwitcherUi();
      updateTrackingRouteButtonLabel();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
      loadTracking().catch(function () {});
    };

    function syncNativeTrackingBridge(active, deviceKey) {
      if (!window.CapacitorMobileBridge || !window.CapacitorMobileBridge.setTrackingActive) return Promise.resolve(false);
      const nativeKey = getNativePhoneDeviceKey();
      const targetKey = deviceKey || getSelectedDeviceKey();
      if (!nativeKey || targetKey !== nativeKey) return Promise.resolve(false);
      return window.CapacitorMobileBridge.setTrackingActive(!!active, nativeKey).catch(function () { return false; });
    }

    function handleNativeProfileDeviceKeyChange(oldDeviceKey, newDeviceKey) {
      if (!newDeviceKey || oldDeviceKey === newDeviceKey) return;
      if (oldDeviceKey) {
        delete state.devicesByKey[oldDeviceKey];
        delete state.lastKnownLatLngByDevice[oldDeviceKey];
        if (state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[oldDeviceKey]) {
          state.map.removeLayer(state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[oldDeviceKey]);
          delete state.allDeviceMarkersByKey[oldDeviceKey];
        }
      }
      state.selectedDeviceKey = newDeviceKey;
      state.userSelectedDeviceKey = false;
      enforceSelectedDeviceKey(newDeviceKey);
      updateSelectedDeviceTextFromState();
      syncPerDeviceCircleMarkers();
    }

    function readNativeProfileDefaults() {
      function ls(key, fallback) {
        try {
          var v = localStorage.getItem(key);
          return v != null && v !== '' ? v : fallback;
        } catch (e) {
          return fallback;
        }
      }
      var key = ls('gpsTrackingDeviceKey', '');
      var parts = key ? key.split('/') : [];
      return {
        user: ls('gpsTrackingUser', parts[0] || 'mobile'),
        deviceName: ls('gpsTrackingDeviceName', parts.length > 1 ? parts.slice(1).join('/') : ''),
        deviceKey: key,
        idleSec: Number(ls('gpsPointIdleSec', '2')) || 2,
        movingSec: Number(ls('gpsPointMovingSec', '0.5')) || 0.5,
        intervalMin: Number(ls('gpsPointIntervalMin', '0')) || 0,
        minMoveM: Number(ls('gpsMinMoveM', '1')) || 1,
        maxAccuracyM: Number(ls('gpsMaxAccuracyM', '20')) || 20,
        walkingSpeedKmh: Number(ls('gpsWalkingSpeedKmh', '1.6')) || 1.6,
        movingSpeedKmh: Number(ls('gpsMovingSpeedKmh', '3')) || 3,
        stationaryRadiusM: Number(ls('gpsStationaryRadiusM', '18')) || 18,
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: Number(ls('gpsStationaryMaxRadiusM', '80')) || 80,
        confirmPoints: Number(ls('gpsConfirmPoints', '3')) || 3,
        speedJumpKmh: Number(ls('gpsSpeedJumpKmh', '8')) || 8,
        headingBurstDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingBurstDeg', '10')) || 10,
        headingBurstSec: Number(ls('gpsHeadingBurstSec', '0.35')) || 0.35,
        headingFilterPreset: ls('gpsHeadingFilterPreset', 'calm'),
        headingFilterMaxJumpDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg', '28')) || 28,
        headingFilterDeadbandDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg', '5')) || 5,
        headingFilterSmoothLevel: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterSmoothLevel', '2')) || 2,
        headingFilterSampleMax: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterSampleMax', '11')) || 11,
        headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterTurnConfirm', '4')) || 4,
        headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg', '35')) || 35,
        headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg: Number(ls('gpsHeadingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg', '6')) || 6,
        mapRotationAuto: ls('gpsMapRotationAuto', '1') !== '0',
        mapRotationSec: Number(ls('gpsMapRotationSec', '0.35')) || 0.35,
        serverUrl: ls('gpsTrackingServerUrl', ls('gpsTrackingMqttUrl', '')),
        backgroundUploadEnabled: ls('gpsBackgroundUploadEnabled', '1') !== '0',
        serverUploadEnabled: ls('gpsServerUploadEnabled', '1') !== '0'
      };
    }

    function nativeStableProfileValues() {
      return {
        idleSec: 2,
        movingSec: 0.5,
        intervalMin: 0,
        minMoveM: 0.8,
        maxAccuracyM: 20,
        walkingSpeedKmh: 1.2,
        movingSpeedKmh: 2.5,
        stationaryRadiusM: 10,
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: 35,
        confirmPoints: 2,
        speedJumpKmh: 10,
        headingBurstDeg: 8,
        headingBurstSec: 0.35,
        headingFilterPreset: 'calm',
        headingFilterMaxJumpDeg: 28,
        headingFilterDeadbandDeg: 5,
        headingFilterSmoothLevel: 2,
        headingFilterSampleMax: 11,
        headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples: 4,
        headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg: 35,
        headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg: 6,
        mapRotationAuto: true,
        mapRotationSec: 0.35
      };

    function syncMapRotationFormUi() {
      var autoEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto');
      var secEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationSec');
      if (!autoEl || !secEl) return;
      secEl.disabled = autoEl.checked;
      if (autoEl.checked) {
        secEl.value = String(readMapRotationSmoothSec());
      }
    }

    function refreshMapRotationAutoFieldIfOpen(frameTimeMs) {
      var autoEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto');
      if (!autoEl || !autoEl.checked) return;
      if (frameTimeMs && frameTimeMs - mapRotationUiRefreshMs < 500) return;
      if (frameTimeMs) mapRotationUiRefreshMs = frameTimeMs;
      syncMapRotationFormUi();

    function readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm() {
      return {
        headingFilterPreset: byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset').value,
        headingFilterMaxJumpDeg: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg').value),
        headingFilterDeadbandDeg: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg').value),

        headingFilterSampleMax: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSampleMax').value),
        headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterTurnConfirm').value),
        headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapSpikeDeg').value),
        headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapBearingDeg').value)
      };

    function applyHeadingFilterPresetToForm(presetKey) {
      var preset = String(presetKey || 'calm').toLowerCase();
      var values = getBridgeHeadingFilterPresetValues(preset);
      if (!values) return;
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg').value = String(values.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg').value = String(values.headingFilterDeadbandDeg);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSmoothLevel').value = String(values.headingFilterSmoothLevel);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSampleMax').value = String(values.headingFilterSampleMax);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterTurnConfirm').value = String(values.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapSpikeDeg').value = String(values.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapBearingDeg').value = String(values.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg);

    function syncHeadingFilterFormUi() {
      var presetEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset');
      var fieldsEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterFields');
      if (!presetEl || !fieldsEl) return;
      var isCustom = presetEl.value === 'custom';
      fieldsEl.classList.toggle('native-profile-filter-fields-disabled', !isCustom);
      if (!isCustom) applyHeadingFilterPresetToForm(presetEl.value);
      markNativeProfileRanges();
      syncMapRotationFormUi();

    function saveHeadingFilterPrefsFromForm() {
      var filter = readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm();
      try {
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterPreset', filter.headingFilterPreset || 'calm');
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg', String(filter.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg', String(filter.headingFilterDeadbandDeg));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterSmoothLevel', String(filter.headingFilterSmoothLevel));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterSampleMax', String(filter.headingFilterSampleMax));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterTurnConfirm', String(filter.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg', String(filter.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg));
        localStorage.setItem('gpsHeadingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg', String(filter.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg));
      } catch (e) {}
    }

    function formatHeadingFilterDegrees(value) {
      return typeof value === 'number' && Number.isFinite(value) ? (Math.round(value * 10) / 10) + '°' : '-';
    }

    function updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(detail) {
      var rawEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterRaw');
      var filteredEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterFiltered');
      var effectiveEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterEffective');
      var modeEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMode');
      var driveEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterDrive');
      var rejectEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterReject');
      if (!rawEl || !filteredEl) return;
      var compass = detail && detail.compass ? detail.compass : detail;
      rawEl.textContent = formatHeadingFilterDegrees(detail && detail.raw != null ? detail.raw : (compass && compass.raw));
      filteredEl.textContent = formatHeadingFilterDegrees(
        detail && detail.filtered != null ? detail.filtered : (compass && (compass.filtered != null ? compass.filtered : compass.stable))
      );
      if (effectiveEl) {
        var effective = detail && detail.effective ? detail.effective : null;
        effectiveEl.textContent = effective && effective.value != null
          ? formatHeadingFilterDegrees(effective.value) + (effective.source ? ' / ' + effective.source : '')
          : '-';
      }
      if (modeEl) {
        var effectiveMode = detail && detail.effective && detail.effective.mode ? detail.effective.mode : '-';
        modeEl.textContent = effectiveMode;
      }
      if (driveEl) {
        driveEl.textContent = detail && detail.driveModeActive ? 'ja' : 'nein';
      }
      if (!rejectEl) return;
      var rejected = detail && detail.lastRejectedRaw;
      var rejectedMs = detail && detail.lastRejectedMs;
      if (typeof rejected === 'number' && Number.isFinite(rejected) && rejectedMs && Date.now() - rejectedMs < 4000) {
        rejectEl.textContent = 'Letzter Sprung verworfen: ' + formatHeadingFilterDegrees(rejected);
        rejectEl.classList.remove('hidden');
      } else {
        rejectEl.textContent = '';
        rejectEl.classList.add('hidden');
      }
    }

    function stopHeadingFilterLivePreview() {
      if (nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer) {
        clearInterval(nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer);
        nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer = null;
      }
    }

    function startHeadingFilterLivePreview() {
      stopHeadingFilterLivePreview();
      var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
      if (!bodyEl || bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreviewTimer = setInterval(function () {
        if (bridge && bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug) {
          updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug());
          return;
        }
        updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(null);
      }, 400);
    }

    function toggleNativeProfileHeadingFilterSection(forceOpen) {
      var toggleEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterToggle');
      var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
      if (!toggleEl || !bodyEl) return;
      var shouldOpen = typeof forceOpen === 'boolean' ? forceOpen : bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden');
      bodyEl.classList.toggle('hidden', !shouldOpen);
      toggleEl.setAttribute('aria-expanded', shouldOpen ? 'true' : 'false');
      if (shouldOpen) startHeadingFilterLivePreview();
      else stopHeadingFilterLivePreview();
    }

    function previewHeadingFilterFromForm() {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      var filter = readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm();
      if (bridge && bridge.applyHeadingFilterPreview) {
        bridge.applyHeadingFilterPreview(filter);
      }
      saveHeadingFilterPrefsFromForm();
      if (bridge && bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug) {
        applyNativeFilteredHeadingFromBridge(bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug());
      }
      var bodyEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterBody');
      if (bodyEl && !bodyEl.classList.contains('hidden') && bridge && bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug) {
        updateHeadingFilterLivePanel(bridge.getHeadingFilterDebug());
      }
    }

    function saveMapRotationPrefsFromForm() {
      try {
        localStorage.setItem('gpsMapRotationAuto', byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto').checked ? '1' : '0');
        localStorage.setItem('gpsMapRotationSec', String(Number(byId('nativeProfileMapRotationSec').value) || 0.35));
      } catch (e) {}
    }

    function applyMapRotationAutoRuntimeState() {
      if (!state.map) return;
      // Drehung ist in beiden Modi (auto/manuell) aktiv - es unterscheidet sich
      // nur die Glaettung (wird live aus readMapRotationSmoothSec gelesen). Hier
      // nur die aktuelle Fahrtrichtung uebernehmen, wenn gefolgt wird.
      if (state.autoFollowEnabled && !state.userHasInteractedWithMap) {
        enableHeadingUpBearingControl();
        var eff = effectiveHeadingForDeviceDisplay(getSelectedDeviceKey(), state.latestHeadingDegrees);
        if (eff !== null) syncMapBearingFromHeading(eff);
      }
    }

    function readNativeProfileStandard() {
      try {
        var raw = localStorage.getItem('gpsProfileStandardJson');
        return raw ? JSON.parse(raw) : nativeStableProfileValues();
      } catch (e) {
        return nativeStableProfileValues();
      }
    }

    var nativeProfileFilterDraft = { display: null, upload: null };
    var nativeProfileActiveFilterMode = 'display';

    function readNativeProfilePositionFields() {
      return {
        maxAccuracyM: Number(byId('nativeProfileMaxAccuracyM').value),
        minMoveM: Number(byId('nativeProfileMinMoveM').value),
        walkingSpeedKmh: Number(byId('nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh').value),
        movingSpeedKmh: Number(byId('nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh').value),
        confirmPoints: Number(byId('nativeProfileConfirmPoints').value),
        speedJumpKmh: Number(byId('nativeProfileSpeedJumpKmh').value),
        stationaryRadiusM: Number(byId('nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM').value),
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: Number(byId('nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM').value)
      };
    }

    function fillNativeProfilePositionFields(source) {
      if (!source) return;
      byId('nativeProfileMaxAccuracyM').value = String(source.maxAccuracyM != null ? source.maxAccuracyM : 20);
      byId('nativeProfileMinMoveM').value = String(source.minMoveM != null ? source.minMoveM : 1);
      byId('nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh').value = String(source.walkingSpeedKmh != null ? source.walkingSpeedKmh : 1.6);
      byId('nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh').value = String(source.movingSpeedKmh != null ? source.movingSpeedKmh : 3);
      byId('nativeProfileConfirmPoints').value = String(source.confirmPoints != null ? source.confirmPoints : 3);
      byId('nativeProfileSpeedJumpKmh').value = String(source.speedJumpKmh != null ? source.speedJumpKmh : 8);
      byId('nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM').value = String(source.stationaryRadiusM != null ? source.stationaryRadiusM : 18);
      byId('nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM').value = String(source.stationaryMaxRadiusM != null ? source.stationaryMaxRadiusM : 80);
    }

    function readNativeProfileUploadFields() {
      var liveHeadingEl = byId('nativeProfileServerLiveHeading');
      return {
        idleSec: Number(byId('nativeProfileIdleSec').value),
        movingSec: Number(byId('nativeProfileMovingSec').value),
        intervalMin: Number(byId('nativeProfileIntervalMin').value),
        headingBurstDeg: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingBurstDeg').value),
        headingBurstSec: Number(byId('nativeProfileHeadingBurstSec').value),
        serverLiveHeadingEnabled: !!(liveHeadingEl && liveHeadingEl.checked)
      };
    }

    function fillNativeProfileUploadFields(source) {
      if (!source) return;
      var liveHeadingEl = byId('nativeProfileServerLiveHeading');
      if (liveHeadingEl) liveHeadingEl.checked = !!source.serverLiveHeadingEnabled;
      byId('nativeProfileIdleSec').value = String(source.idleSec != null ? source.idleSec : 2);
      byId('nativeProfileMovingSec').value = String(source.movingSec != null ? source.movingSec : 0.5);
      byId('nativeProfileIntervalMin').value = String(source.intervalMin != null ? source.intervalMin : 0);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingBurstDeg').value = String(source.headingBurstDeg != null ? source.headingBurstDeg : 10);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingBurstSec').value = String(source.headingBurstSec != null ? source.headingBurstSec : 0.35);
    }

    function storeNativeProfileFilterDraftFromForm() {
      var pos = readNativeProfilePositionFields();
      if (nativeProfileActiveFilterMode === 'upload') {
        nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload || {}, readNativeProfileUploadFields());
      } else {
        nativeProfileFilterDraft.display = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.display || {}, pos, readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm());
      }
    }

    function setNativeProfileFilterMode(nextMode) {
      var mode = nextMode === 'upload' ? 'upload' : 'display';
      if (mode === nativeProfileActiveFilterMode) return;
      storeNativeProfileFilterDraftFromForm();
      nativeProfileActiveFilterMode = mode;
      syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi();
    }

    function syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi() {
      var online = nativeProfileActiveFilterMode === 'upload';
      var offlineBtn = byId('nativeProfileFilterModeOffline');
      var onlineBtn = byId('nativeProfileFilterModeOnline');
      var sharedSection = byId('nativeProfileSharedPositionFields');
      var displaySection = byId('nativeProfileDisplayFilterSection');
      var uploadSection = byId('nativeProfileUploadFilterSection');
      var backgroundSection = byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUploadSection');
      var legendEl = byId('nativeProfileSharedPositionLegend');
      var hintEl = byId('nativeProfileFilterModeHint');
      if (offlineBtn) {
        offlineBtn.classList.toggle('active', !online);
        offlineBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', online ? 'false' : 'true');
      }
      if (onlineBtn) {
        onlineBtn.classList.toggle('active', online);
        onlineBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', online ? 'true' : 'false');
      }
      if (sharedSection) sharedSection.classList.toggle('hidden', online);
      if (displaySection) displaySection.classList.toggle('hidden', online);
      if (uploadSection) uploadSection.classList.toggle('hidden', !online);
      if (backgroundSection) backgroundSection.classList.toggle('hidden', !online);
      if (legendEl) legendEl.textContent = 'Anzeige-Filter';
      if (hintEl) {
        hintEl.textContent = online
          ? 'Online: steuert wann gesendet wird. Position kommt immer aus dem Anzeige-Filter (Offline).'
          : 'Offline: Filter fuer die live Anzeige auf dem Handy.';
      }
      var liveHeadingEl = byId('nativeProfileServerLiveHeading');
      var intervalFieldsEl = byId('nativeProfileUploadIntervalFields');
      var burstFieldsEl = byId('nativeProfileHeadingBurstFields');
      var liveHeadingOn = !!(liveHeadingEl && liveHeadingEl.checked);
      if (intervalFieldsEl) intervalFieldsEl.classList.toggle('native-profile-filter-fields-disabled', online && liveHeadingOn);
      if (burstFieldsEl) burstFieldsEl.classList.toggle('hidden', online && !liveHeadingOn);
      if (online && intervalFieldsEl) {
        ['nativeProfileIdleSec', 'nativeProfileMovingSec', 'nativeProfileIntervalMin'].forEach(function (fieldId) {
          var fieldEl = byId(fieldId);
          if (fieldEl) fieldEl.disabled = liveHeadingOn;
        });
      }
      if (!online) fillNativeProfilePositionFields(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display || {});
      if (online) fillNativeProfileUploadFields(nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload || {});
      markNativeProfileRanges();
    }

    function nativeProfilePayload(overrides) {
      storeNativeProfileFilterDraftFromForm();
      var display = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.display || readNativeProfilePositionFields(), readNativeProfileHeadingFilterFromForm());
      var upload = Object.assign({}, nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload || {}, readNativeProfileUploadFields());
      return Object.assign({
        user: byId('nativeProfileUser').value,
        deviceName: byId('nativeProfileDevice').value,
        display: display,
        upload: upload,
        serverUrl: byId('nativeProfileServerUrl') ? byId('nativeProfileServerUrl').value : '',
        backgroundUploadEnabled: !!(byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUpload') && byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUpload').checked),
        serverUploadEnabled: !!(byId('nativeProfileServerUpload') && byId('nativeProfileServerUpload').checked)
      }, overrides || {});
    }

    async function saveNativeProfilePayload(payload) {
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (!bridge || !bridge.saveProfileSettings) {
        window.alert('GPS-Bridge nicht geladen. Bitte flows.json auf dem Pi deployen und App neu starten.');
        return null;
      }
      var data = await bridge.saveProfileSettings(payload);
      if (data && data.deviceKey) {
        handleNativeProfileDeviceKeyChange(data.oldDeviceKey, data.deviceKey);
        byId('nativeProfileDeviceKey').textContent = data.deviceKey;
      }
      fillNativeProfileForm(data || payload);
      await refreshNativeMobileAppOnce();
      return data;
    }

    var nativeProfileRules = {
      nativeProfileIdleSec: [1, 3600, 's', 'empfohlen 2-10'],
      nativeProfileMovingSec: [0.2, 60, 's', 'empfohlen 0.3-1'],
      nativeProfileIntervalMin: [0, 1440, 'min', '0 = Sekunden-Modus'],
      nativeProfileMaxAccuracyM: [5, 100, 'm', 'streng 10, stabil 15-25'],
      nativeProfileMinMoveM: [0.2, 20, 'm', 'empfohlen 0.8'],
      nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh: [0.5, 8, 'km/h', 'empfohlen 1.2'],
      nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh: [1, 30, 'km/h', 'muss >= Fussgaenger sein'],
      nativeProfileConfirmPoints: [1, 8, 'Punkte', 'empfohlen 2'],
      nativeProfileSpeedJumpKmh: [2, 60, 'km/h', 'empfohlen 10'],
      nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM: [3, 80, 'm', 'empfohlen 10'],
      nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM: [3, 150, 'm', 'empfohlen 35'],
      nativeProfileHeadingBurstDeg: [3, 90, 'Grad', 'empfohlen 8'],
      nativeProfileHeadingBurstSec: [0.15, 5, 's', 'empfohlen 0.25-0.5'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg: [15, 60, 'Grad', 'Ruhig ~28'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg: [1, 8, 'Grad', 'Ruhig ~5'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterSmoothLevel: [1, 10, 'Stufe', '1 ruhig, 10 reaktiv'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterSampleMax: [5, 13, 'Samples', 'Ruhig ~11'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterTurnConfirm: [2, 6, 'Samples', 'Ruhig ~4'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapSpikeDeg: [20, 70, 'Grad', 'Karten-Spike'],
      nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapBearingDeg: [1, 10, 'Grad', 'Karten-Totband'],
      nativeProfileMapRotationSec: [0.15, 5, 's', 'Glaettung der Kartendrehung'],
    };

    function markNativeProfileRanges() {
      Object.keys(nativeProfileRules).forEach(function (id) {
        var el = byId(id), rule = nativeProfileRules[id];
        if (!el) return;
        var hint = el.nextElementSibling && el.nextElementSibling.classList.contains('native-profile-range')
          ? el.nextElementSibling
          : document.createElement('span');
        if (!hint.parentNode) {
          hint.className = 'native-profile-range';
          el.insertAdjacentElement('afterend', hint);
        }
        var n = Number(el.value), invalid = !Number.isFinite(n) || n < rule[0] || n > rule[1];
        if (id === 'nativeProfileMovingSpeedKmh') invalid = invalid || n < Number(byId('nativeProfileWalkingSpeedKmh').value);
        if (id === 'nativeProfileStationaryMaxRadiusM') invalid = invalid || n < Number(byId('nativeProfileStationaryRadiusM').value);
        el.classList.toggle('invalid', invalid);
        hint.className = 'native-profile-range' + (invalid ? ' invalid' : '');
        hint.textContent = 'Gueltig: ' + rule[0] + '-' + rule[1] + ' ' + rule[2] + ' · ' + rule[3];
      });
    }

    function fillNativeProfileForm(data) {
      data = data || readNativeProfileDefaults();
      if (data.mapRotationAuto == null || data.mapRotationSec == null) {
        var rotStored = readNativeProfileDefaults();
        if (data.mapRotationAuto == null) data.mapRotationAuto = rotStored.mapRotationAuto;
        if (data.mapRotationSec == null) data.mapRotationSec = rotStored.mapRotationSec;
      }
      nativeProfileFilterDraft.display = data.display || {
        maxAccuracyM: data.maxAccuracyM,
        minMoveM: data.minMoveM,
        walkingSpeedKmh: data.walkingSpeedKmh,
        movingSpeedKmh: data.movingSpeedKmh,
        confirmPoints: data.confirmPoints,
        speedJumpKmh: data.speedJumpKmh,
        stationaryRadiusM: data.stationaryRadiusM,
        stationaryMaxRadiusM: data.stationaryMaxRadiusM,
        headingFilterPreset: data.headingFilterPreset,
        headingFilterMaxJumpDeg: data.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg,
        headingFilterDeadbandDeg: data.headingFilterDeadbandDeg,
        headingFilterSmoothLevel: data.headingFilterSmoothLevel,
        headingFilterSampleMax: data.headingFilterSampleMax,
        headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples: data.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples,
        headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg: data.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg,
        headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg: data.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg
      };
      nativeProfileFilterDraft.upload = data.upload || {
        idleSec: data.idleSec,
        movingSec: data.movingSec,
        intervalMin: data.intervalMin,
        headingBurstDeg: data.headingBurstDeg,
        headingBurstSec: data.headingBurstSec,
        serverLiveHeadingEnabled: !!data.serverLiveHeadingEnabled
      };
      byId('nativeProfileUser').value = data.user || 'mobile';
      byId('nativeProfileDevice').value = data.deviceName || '';
      if (byId('nativeProfileServerUrl')) {
        byId('nativeProfileServerUrl').value = data.serverUrl || data.mqttWebSocketUrl || '';
      }
      var filterPreset = nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterPreset != null
        ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterPreset : 'calm';
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterPreset').value = filterPreset;
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMaxJumpDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMaxJumpDeg : 28);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterDeadbandDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterDeadbandDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterDeadbandDeg : 5);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSmoothLevel').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSmoothLevel != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSmoothLevel : 2);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterSampleMax').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSampleMax != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterSampleMax : 11);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterTurnConfirm').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterTurnConfirmSamples : 4);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapSpikeDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapSpikeRejectDeg : 35);
      byId('nativeProfileHeadingFilterMapBearingDeg').value = String(nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg != null ? nativeProfileFilterDraft.display.headingFilterMapBearingDeadbandDeg : 6);
      syncHeadingFilterFormUi();
      var rotAutoEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationAuto');
      var rotSecEl = byId('nativeProfileMapRotationSec');
      if (rotAutoEl) rotAutoEl.checked = !!data.mapRotationAuto;
      if (rotSecEl) rotSecEl.value = String(data.mapRotationSec != null ? data.mapRotationSec : 0.35);
      syncMapRotationFormUi();
      byId('nativeProfileDeviceKey').textContent = data.deviceKey || '-';
      var bgUploadEl = byId('nativeProfileBackgroundUpload');
      if (bgUploadEl) bgUploadEl.checked = data.backgroundUploadEnabled !== false;
      var serverUploadEl = byId('nativeProfileServerUpload');
      if (serverUploadEl) serverUploadEl.checked = data.serverUploadEnabled !== false;
      nativeProfileActiveFilterMode = 'display';
      syncNativeProfileFilterModeUi();
    }

    function showNativeProfileSheet(data) {
      fillNativeProfileForm(data);
      var sheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      sheet.classList.remove('hidden');
      sheet.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    }

    function openNativeProfileSheet() {
      var sheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      if (sheet && !sheet.classList.contains('hidden')) {
        closeNativeProfileSheet();
        return;
      }
      var bridge = window.CapacitorMobileBridge;
      if (bridge && bridge.getProfileSettings) {
        bridge.getProfileSettings().then(showNativeProfileSheet).catch(function () {
          showNativeProfileSheet();
        });
        return;
      }
      showNativeProfileSheet();
    }

    function closeNativeProfileSheet() {
      var sheet = byId('nativeProfileSheet');
      if (!sheet || sheet.classList.contains('hidden')) return;
      stopHeadingFilterLivePreview();
      sheet.classList.add('hidden');
      sheet.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
      updateDialogLayout();
    }
